class_features.name: Magical Tinkering
class_features.description: Touch a Tiny nonmagical object (with thieves'/artisan's tools in hand) to give it a minor magical property of your choice: dim/bright light, a recorded 6-second message triggered on tap, a continuous sound/smell, or a static visual effect. Property lasts indefinitely until you end it as an action. Max objects affected at once equals your Intelligence modifier (minimum 1); exceeding that ends the oldest one.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast artificer spells using Intelligence, requiring thieves' tools or artisan's tools as a spellcasting focus. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + INT modifier; spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + INT modifier. Prepare a number of spells equal to INT modifier + half artificer level (rounded down, minimum 1); can change the prepared list after a long rest. Can cast ritual-tagged prepared spells as rituals.

class_features.name: Infuse Item
class_features.description: Learn 4 artificer infusions (more at higher levels per the Infusions Known column). At the end of a long rest, infuse a number of nonmagical objects (up to the Infused Items column maximum) with known infusions, turning each into a magic item; can attune instantly if required. Infusion lasts until replaced or you die (then fades after days equal to INT modifier, minimum 1). Exceeding your max infused items ends the oldest infusion.

class_features.name: The Right Tool for the Job
class_features.description: With thieves' tools or artisan's tools, spend 1 hour of uninterrupted work (can coincide with a short/long rest) to magically create one set of artisan's tools in an empty space within 5 feet of you. Nonmagical; vanishes when you use this feature again.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20). Also gained at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Tool Expertise
class_features.description: Your proficiency bonus is doubled for any ability check that uses your proficiency with a tool.

class_features.name: Flash of Genius
class_features.description: When you or a creature you can see within 30 feet makes an ability check or saving throw, use your reaction to add your INT modifier to the roll. Usable a number of times equal to INT modifier (minimum 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Magic Item Adept
class_features.description: You can attune to up to 4 magic items at once. Crafting a common or uncommon magic item takes only a quarter of the normal time and half the usual gold cost.

class_features.name: Spell-Storing Item
class_features.description: After a long rest, store a 1st- or 2nd-level artificer spell (1-action casting time, doesn't need to be prepared) into a weapon or spellcasting focus you touch. Any creature holding it can use an action to trigger the spell using your spellcasting modifier; spell remains until used a number of times equal to twice your INT modifier (minimum 2) or until you store a new spell.

class_features.name: Magic Item Savant
class_features.description: You can attune to up to 5 magic items at once, and you ignore all class, race, spell, and level requirements for attuning to or using a magic item.

class_features.name: Magic Item Master
class_features.description: You can attune to up to 6 magic items at once.

class_features.name: Soul of Artifice
class_features.description: Gain a +1 bonus to all saving throws per magic item you're currently attuned to. If reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, use your reaction to end one of your artificer infusions to drop to 1 HP instead of 0.

class_features.name: Replicate Magic Item: Enhanced Weapon
class_features.description: Infusion (2nd-level artificer minimum to learn alongside Infuse Item). Applied to a simple or martial weapon: grants +1 to attack and damage rolls with it, increasing to +2 at 10th artificer level.

class_features.name: Replicate Magic Item: Enhanced Defense
class_features.description: Infusion applied to a suit of armor or a shield: grants +1 AC while worn/wielded, increasing to +2 at 10th artificer level.

class_features.name: Replicate Magic Item: Homunculus Servant
class_features.description: Infusion that creates a friendly Tiny construct companion (AC 13, HP = 1 + INT mod + artificer level, fly/walk speed, ranged force attack using your spell attack modifier). Shares your initiative, acts immediately after you; only takes Dodge unless you spend a bonus action to command another action. Heals 2d6 HP from mending; vanishes if it or you die.

class_features.name: Replicate Magic Item: Repeating Shot
class_features.description: Infusion applied to a weapon with the ammunition property (requires attunement): grants +1 attack/damage on ranged attacks, ignores the loading property, and auto-generates magic ammunition that vanishes after the attack if the weapon has none loaded.

class_features.name: Replicate Magic Item: Arcane Propulsion Armor
class_features.description: Infusion applied to a suit of armor (requires attunement): +5 ft walking speed; includes gauntlets that are proficient magic melee weapons (1d8 force, thrown 20/60 ft, return to wearer); armor can't be removed against the wearer's will and replaces missing limbs.

class_features.name: Tool Proficiency (Alchemist)
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with alchemist's supplies (or one other artisan's tool type if you already have it).

class_features.name: Alchemist Spells
class_features.description: Always have certain spells prepared (doesn't count against prepared spell total) at set levels: 3rd (healing word, ray of sickness), 5th (flaming sphere, Melf's acid arrow), 9th (gaseous form, mass healing word), 13th (blight, death ward), 17th (cloudkill, raise dead).

class_features.name: Experimental Elixir
class_features.description: After a long rest, create a random experimental elixir (roll d6 for effect: healing 2d4+INT, +10 ft speed for 1 hour, +1 AC for 10 min, +d4 to attack/save rolls for 1 minute, 10 ft fly speed for 10 min, or alter self transformation for 10 min) in an empty flask. A creature drinks it or has it administered as an action. Can create additional elixirs by spending a spell slot (1 per elixir, choosing the effect). Requires alchemist's supplies; elixirs last until drunk or the next long rest ends. Produces 2 elixirs at 6th level, 3 at 15th level.

class_features.name: Alchemical Savant
class_features.description: When casting a spell using alchemist's supplies as your focus, add your INT modifier (minimum +1) to one roll of the spell that restores HP or deals acid, fire, necrotic, or poison damage.

class_features.name: Restorative Reagents
class_features.description: Creatures who drink your experimental elixirs gain temporary HP equal to 2d6 + INT modifier (minimum 1). You can cast lesser restoration without a spell slot or preparing it (using alchemist's supplies as focus) a number of times equal to INT modifier (minimum 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Chemical Mastery
class_features.description: Gain resistance to acid and poison damage and immunity to the poisoned condition. Can cast greater restoration and heal once each per long rest without a spell slot, preparation, or material components, using alchemist's supplies as focus.

class_features.name: Tools of the Trade
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor and smith's tools (or one other artisan's tool type if you already have smith's tools).

class_features.name: Armorer Spells
class_features.description: Always have certain spells prepared (doesn't count against prepared spell total) at set levels: 3rd (magic missile, thunderwave), 5th (mirror image, shatter), 9th (hypnotic pattern, lightning bolt), 13th (fire shield, greater invisibility), 17th (passwall, wall of force).

class_features.name: Arcane Armor
class_features.description: With smith's tools in hand, turn worn armor into Arcane Armor: ignores its Strength requirement, can be used as a spellcasting focus, can't be removed against your will, replaces missing limbs, and can be donned/doffed as an action. Remains Arcane Armor until you wear different armor or die. Helmet can be retracted/deployed as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Armor Model: Guardian
class_features.description: Arcane Armor customization (choose Guardian or Infiltrator, changeable on a short/long rest with smith's tools). Guardian's gauntlets are a simple melee weapon dealing 1d8 thunder damage and imposing disadvantage on the target's attacks against others; armor attacks use INT instead of STR/DEX. As a bonus action, gain temporary HP equal to your artificer level (replacing any existing temp HP); usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Armor Model: Infiltrator
class_features.description: Arcane Armor customization. Infiltrator's Lightning Launcher is a simple ranged weapon (range 90/300 ft) dealing 1d6 lightning damage, with an extra 1d6 lightning damage once per turn on a hit; armor attacks use INT instead of STR/DEX. Walking speed +5 ft. Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks (cancels any disadvantage from the armor instead of stacking).

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Armor Modifications
class_features.description: Your Arcane Armor's chest piece, boots, helmet, and special weapon each count as separate items that can bear one of your infusions (infusions transfer if you change armor model). Your max infused items increases by 2, but the extra items must be part of your Arcane Armor.

class_features.name: Perfected Armor
class_features.description: Guardian: as a reaction, force a Huge-or-smaller creature within 30 feet that ends its turn there to make a Strength save or be pulled up to 25 feet to an unoccupied space (melee attack if pulled adjacent); usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest. Infiltrator: a creature damaged by your Lightning Launcher glimmers with light until your next turn, granting disadvantage on its attacks against you and advantage to the next attack against it (which deals an extra 1d6 lightning damage on a hit).

class_features.name: Tool Proficiency (Artillerist)
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with woodcarver's tools (or one other artisan's tool type if you already have it).

class_features.name: Artillerist Spells
class_features.description: Always have certain spells prepared (doesn't count against prepared spell total) at set levels: 3rd (shield, thunderwave), 5th (scorching ray, shatter), 9th (fireball, wind wall), 13th (ice storm, wall of fire), 17th (cone of cold, wall of force).

class_features.name: Eldritch Cannon
class_features.description: Create a Small or Tiny magical cannon (AC 18, HP = 5x artificer level, immune to poison/psychic) in an unoccupied space within 5 feet, choosing Flamethrower (15-ft cone, 2d8 fire, DEX save half), Force Ballista (ranged spell attack, 2d8 force + 5-ft push), or Protector (1d8+INT temp HP burst). Once per long rest free, or spend a spell slot to create another; only one cannon at a time. Activate with a bonus action within 60 feet (can also move it up to 15 feet if it has legs). Disappears at 0 HP or after 1 hour, or dismissed as an action.

class_features.name: Arcane Firearm
class_features.description: After a long rest, carve sigils (with woodcarver's tools) into a wand, staff, or rod to make it your arcane firearm, usable as a spellcasting focus. When casting an artificer spell through it, roll a d8 and add the result to one of the spell's damage rolls.

class_features.name: Explosive Cannon
class_features.description: Your Eldritch Cannon's damage rolls increase by 1d8. As an action while within 60 feet, you can detonate the cannon, destroying it and forcing creatures within 20 feet to make a DEX save (DC = your spell save DC) or take 3d8 force damage (half on success).

class_features.name: Fortified Position
class_features.description: You and allies within 10 feet of your Eldritch Cannon have half cover. You can have two cannons at once (created simultaneously with the same action but different spell slots if needed, activated together with one bonus action); can't create a third while you have two.

class_features.name: Tool Proficiency (Battle Smith)
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with smith's tools (or one other artisan's tool type if you already have it).

class_features.name: Battle Smith Spells
class_features.description: Always have certain spells prepared (doesn't count against prepared spell total) at set levels: 3rd (heroism, shield), 5th (branding smite, warding bond), 9th (aura of vitality, conjure barrage), 13th (aura of purity, fire shield), 17th (banishing smite, mass cure wounds).

class_features.name: Battle Ready
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons. When attacking with a magic weapon, you can use INT instead of STR/DEX for attack and damage rolls.

class_features.name: Steel Defender
class_features.description: Create a friendly Medium construct companion (AC 15, HP = 2 + INT mod + 5x artificer level, speed 40 ft) with melee force attack using your spell attack modifier and a self-heal action. Shares your initiative, acts immediately after you; only takes Dodge unless commanded via bonus action. Heals 2d6 from mending; can be revived within an hour of dying (smith's tools, action, within 5 feet, expend a spell slot of 1st level or higher) returning after 1 minute at full HP. Create a new one after a long rest with smith's tools (old one perishes); also perishes if you die.

class_features.name: Extra Attack (Battle Smith)
class_features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Arcane Jolt
class_features.description: When you hit with a magic weapon attack or your steel defender hits a target, channel energy to deal an extra 2d6 force damage, or instead heal 2d6 HP to a creature/object within 30 feet of the target. Usable a number of times equal to INT modifier (minimum 1) per long rest, no more than once per turn.

class_features.name: Improved Defender
class_features.description: Arcane Jolt's extra damage and healing both increase to 4d6. Your steel defender gains +2 AC, and its Deflect Attack now also deals 1d4 + INT modifier force damage to the attacker.

class_features.name: Rage
class_features.description: Enter a rage lasting 1 minute (ends early if knocked unconscious, or if you go a turn without attacking a hostile creature or taking damage; can also end voluntarily as a bonus action). While raging (and not in heavy armor): advantage on STR checks/saves, a damage bonus on STR-based melee weapon attacks (scales by level), and resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage. Can't cast or concentrate on spells while raging.

class_features.name: Unarmored Defense
class_features.description: While wearing no armor, AC = 10 + DEX modifier + CON modifier. Can still use a shield and gain this benefit.

class_features.name: Reckless Attack
class_features.description: On your first attack of the turn, choose to attack recklessly: gain advantage on melee weapon attack rolls using STR this turn, but attack rolls against you have advantage until your next turn.

class_features.name: Danger Sense
class_features.description: Advantage on Dexterity saving throws against effects you can see (traps, spells, etc.), as long as you aren't blinded, deafened, or incapacitated.

class_features.name: Primal Path
class_features.description: Choose a Primal Path subclass, granting features at 3rd level and again at 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20); may instead take a feat if using the optional feat rules. Also gained at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Fast Movement
class_features.description: Speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing heavy armor.

class_features.name: Feral Instinct
class_features.description: Advantage on initiative rolls. If surprised at the start of combat and not incapacitated, you can still act normally on your first turn provided you enter your rage before doing anything else that turn.

class_features.name: Brutal Critical (1 die)
class_features.description: Roll one additional weapon damage die for extra damage on a critical hit with a melee attack.

class_features.name: Relentless Rage
class_features.description: If you drop to 0 HP while raging (and don't die outright), make a DC 10 Constitution save to drop to 1 HP instead. DC increases by 5 each time you use this again before resting; resets to 10 after a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Brutal Critical (2 dice)
class_features.description: Roll two additional weapon damage dice for extra damage on a critical hit with a melee attack.

class_features.name: Persistent Rage
class_features.description: Your rage now ends early only if you fall unconscious or choose to end it (no longer ends from a turn without attacking/taking damage).

class_features.name: Brutal Critical (3 dice)
class_features.description: Roll three additional weapon damage dice for extra damage on a critical hit with a melee attack.

class_features.name: Indomitable Might
class_features.description: If your total on a Strength check is less than your Strength score, use the Strength score in place of that total.

class_features.name: Primal Champion
class_features.description: Strength and Constitution scores increase by 4 each, and their maximum increases to 24.

class_features.name: Primal Knowledge
class_features.description: Optional class feature. Gain proficiency in one skill of your choice from the barbarian's 1st-level skill list. Gained again at 10th level.

class_features.name: Instinctive Pounce
class_features.description: Optional class feature. As part of the bonus action used to enter your rage, you can move up to half your speed.

class_features.name: Ancestral Protectors
class_features.description: While raging, the first creature you hit on your turn becomes marked by spectral warriors until the start of your next turn: it has disadvantage on attacks not against you, and creatures it hits (other than you) gain resistance to that damage. Ends early if your rage ends.

class_features.name: Spirit Shield (2d6)
class_features.description: While raging, use your reaction to reduce damage taken by a creature you can see within 30 feet by 2d6 (increases to 3d6 at 10th level, 4d6 at 14th level).

class_features.name: Consult the Spirits
class_features.description: Cast augury or clairvoyance (using WIS as spellcasting ability) without a spell slot or material components; the clairvoyance sensor is an invisible ancestral spirit instead. Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Spirit Shield (3d6)
class_features.description: Spirit Shield's damage reduction increases to 3d6.

class_features.name: Vengeful Ancestors
class_features.description: When you use Spirit Shield to reduce damage from an attack, the attacker takes force damage equal to the amount of damage prevented.

class_features.name: Spirit Shield (4d6)
class_features.description: Spirit Shield's damage reduction increases to 4d6.

class_features.name: Battlerager Armor
class_features.description: While wearing spiked armor and raging, use a bonus action to make a melee attack with your armor spikes (1d4 piercing, STR modifier) against a target within 5 feet. When you successfully grapple a creature with the Attack action, it also takes 3 piercing damage. Restricted to dwarves by default.

class_features.name: Reckless Abandon
class_features.description: When you use Reckless Attack while raging, also gain temporary HP equal to your CON modifier (minimum 1); they vanish when your rage ends.

class_features.name: Battlerager Charge
class_features.description: While raging, take the Dash action as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Spiked Retribution
class_features.description: While raging, not incapacitated, and wearing spiked armor, any creature within 5 feet that hits you with a melee attack takes 3 piercing damage.

class_features.name: Form of the Beast
class_features.description: When you rage, manifest a natural weapon (chosen each time): Bite (1d8 piercing, regain HP equal to proficiency bonus once per turn when you hit while below half HP), Claws (1d6 slashing, extra claw attack once per turn on hit), or Tail (1d8 piercing, reach, reaction to add a d8 roll to your AC against an attack from a creature within 10 feet). Counts as a simple melee weapon, uses STR modifier, lasts until rage ends.

class_features.name: Bestial Soul
class_features.description: Natural weapons from Form of the Beast count as magical. After a short or long rest, choose one benefit lasting until your next rest: climbing speed equal to walking speed (and climb difficult surfaces without a check), an extended jump distance via a Strength (Athletics) check once per turn, or swimming speed equal to walking speed plus water breathing.

class_features.name: Infectious Fury
class_features.description: While raging, when you hit with a natural weapon, force a WIS save (DC = 8 + CON modifier + proficiency bonus) or the target must use its reaction to attack another creature of your choice, or takes 2d12 psychic damage (your choice). Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Call the Hunt
class_features.description: When you enter your rage, choose a number of willing creatures within 30 feet equal to your CON modifier (minimum 1); gain 5 temp HP per creature that accepts. Until your rage ends, each chosen creature can once per turn roll a d6 and add it to a damage roll on a hit. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Frenzy
class_features.description: While raging, can enter a frenzy to make a single melee weapon attack as a bonus action on each of your turns after the first. When the rage ends, you suffer one level of exhaustion.

class_features.name: Mindless Rage
class_features.description: Can't be charmed or frightened while raging. If already charmed or frightened when you enter your rage, the effect is suspended for the rage's duration.

class_features.name: Intimidating Presence
class_features.description: Force a creature within 30 feet that can see or hear you to make a WIS save (DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + CHA modifier) or be frightened of you until the end of your next turn; can extend the duration each subsequent turn with another action. Ends if the target loses line of sight or moves beyond 60 feet. If the save succeeds, can't use this on that creature again for 24 hours.

class_features.name: Retaliation
class_features.description: When you take damage from a creature within 5 feet, use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it.

class_features.name: Giant's Power
class_features.description: Learn Giant (or another language if you know Giant) and a cantrip (druidcraft or thaumaturgy), using WIS as the spellcasting ability for it.

class_features.name: Giant's Havoc
class_features.description: While raging: add your Rage Damage bonus to thrown weapon attacks made with STR (Crushing Throw), and your reach increases by 5 feet while you become Large if smaller (Giant Stature, no change if there's insufficient room).

class_features.name: Elemental Cleaver
class_features.description: When you enter your rage, infuse a held weapon with acid, cold, fire, thunder, or lightning: its damage type changes to that type, it deals an extra 1d6 damage of that type on a hit, and gains the thrown property (range 20/60 ft, returns to your hand). Benefits suppressed if another creature wields it. While raging, change the infused damage type as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Mighty Impel
class_features.description: While raging, choose a Medium or smaller creature within your reach and move it to an unoccupied space within 30 feet; an unwilling creature can avoid this with a successful STR save (DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + STR modifier). If the destination can't support the creature, it falls and lands prone, taking fall damage as normal.

class_features.name: Demiurgic Colossus
class_features.description: While raging, reach increases by 10 feet, size can increase to Large or Huge (your choice), and Mighty Impel can move Large-or-smaller creatures. Elemental Cleaver's extra damage increases to 2d6.

class_features.name: Storm Aura
class_features.description: While raging, emanate a 10-foot aura (no total cover) with an effect based on a chosen environment (desert, sea, or tundra; changeable on level up). Activates when you enter rage and again each turn as a bonus action. Desert: other creatures in the aura take 2 fire damage (scaling up by level). Sea: choose a creature for a DEX save vs 1d6 lightning damage, half on success (scaling up by level). Tundra: chosen creatures gain 2 temp HP (scaling up by level). Save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + CON modifier.

class_features.name: Storm Soul
class_features.description: Gain a passive benefit even outside of rage, based on Storm Aura's environment. Desert: fire resistance, immunity to extreme heat effects, can ignite flammable unworn/uncarried objects as an action. Sea: lightning resistance, water breathing, 30-ft swim speed. Tundra: cold resistance, immunity to extreme cold effects, can freeze a 5-foot cube of water as an action.

class_features.name: Shielding Storm
class_features.description: Chosen creatures gain your Storm Soul damage resistance while inside your Storm Aura.

class_features.name: Raging Storm
class_features.description: A reaction effect based on Storm Aura's environment. Desert: after a creature in your aura hits you, force a DEX save or it takes fire damage equal to half your barbarian level. Sea: after you hit a creature in your aura, force a STR save or it's knocked prone. Tundra: when Storm Aura activates, force a chosen creature to make a STR save or its speed becomes 0 until your next turn.

class_features.name: Spirit Seeker
class_features.description: Cast beast sense and speak with animals, but only as rituals.

class_features.name: Totem Spirit
class_features.description: Choose a totem animal for a passive rage benefit: Bear (resistance to all damage except psychic while raging), Eagle (enemies have disadvantage on opportunity attacks against you, and you can Dash as a bonus action while raging), Elk (+15 ft walking speed while raging, no heavy armor), Tiger (+10 ft long jump / +3 ft high jump while raging), or Wolf (allies have advantage on melee attacks against creatures hostile to you within 5 feet while you rage).

class_features.name: Aspect of the Beast
class_features.description: Choose a totem animal (same or different from before) for a permanent benefit: Bear (double carrying capacity, advantage on STR checks to push/pull/lift/break), Eagle (see 1 mile clearly, no Perception disadvantage in dim light), Elk (double travel pace for you and up to 10 companions within 60 feet), Tiger (proficiency in two of Athletics/Acrobatics/Stealth/Survival), or Wolf (track at a fast pace, move stealthily at normal pace).

class_features.name: Spirit Walker
class_features.description: Cast commune with nature, but only as a ritual; a spirit version of a previously chosen totem animal conveys the information.

class_features.name: Totemic Attunement
class_features.description: Choose a totem animal (same or different) for a powerful rage benefit: Bear (hostile creatures within 5 feet have disadvantage attacking anyone but you or others with this feature while you rage), Eagle (flying speed equal to walking speed while raging, in short bursts), Elk (bonus action to move through a Large-or-smaller creature's space, forcing a STR save or it's knocked prone and takes 1d12+STR bludgeoning), or Tiger/Wolf (bonus action extra attack after a 20-ft charge, or bonus action to knock a hit Large-or-smaller creature prone, respectively).

class_features.name: Divine Fury
class_features.description: While raging, the first creature you hit each turn with a weapon attack takes extra damage equal to 1d6 + half your barbarian level (necrotic or radiant, chosen when you gain this feature).

class_features.name: Warrior of the Gods
class_features.description: A spell that solely restores you to life (e.g. raise dead, not undeath) doesn't require material components when cast on you.

class_features.name: Fanatical Focus
class_features.description: If you fail a saving throw while raging, reroll it once (must use the new result). Resets each time you enter a new rage.

class_features.name: Zealous Presence
class_features.description: Grant up to 10 creatures within 60 feet who can hear you advantage on attack rolls and saving throws until the start of your next turn. Usable once per long rest.

class_features.name: Rage beyond Death
class_features.description: While raging, dropping to 0 HP doesn't knock you unconscious (death saves and normal 0-HP effects still apply); if you'd die from failed death saves, you don't die until your rage ends, and only then if still at 0 HP.

class_features.name: Magic Awareness
class_features.description: Sense the location (and spell school, for spells) of any spell or magic item within 60 feet not behind total cover, until the end of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Wild Surge
class_features.description: When you enter your rage, roll d8 on the Wild Magic table for a random magical effect (necrotic burst + temp HP, short teleport, exploding spirit, force-infused weapon, retributive force damage, AC bonus aura, difficult terrain, or radiant blinding bolt). Save DC (if applicable) = 8 + proficiency bonus + CON modifier.

class_features.name: Bolstering Magic
class_features.description: Touch a creature (or yourself) to grant one of: for 10 minutes, roll a d3 and add it to attack rolls/ability checks; or roll a d3 to restore an expended spell slot of that level or lower (once per creature per long rest). Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Unstable Backlash
class_features.description: Immediately after taking damage or failing a save while raging, use your reaction to roll on the Wild Magic table and produce the new effect, replacing your current one.

class_features.name: Controlled Surge
class_features.description: When rolling on the Wild Magic table, roll twice and choose which result to use (or pick any result if both rolls match).

class_features.name: Hellfire Claw
class_features.description: When you rage, one hand transforms into a fiery claw for the duration. A weapon held in that hand is wreathed in flames, dealing an extra 1d6 fire damage to the first target hit each turn (scaling to 1d8 at 6th, 1d10 at 10th, 1d12 at 14th level). If you don't deal this fire damage via weapon attack on your turn, you can spend a bonus action for an unarmed strike with the claw (bludgeoning or slashing, your choice, plus the fire damage).

class_features.name: Hellborn
class_features.description: Learn Abyssal or Infernal. Add STR modifier to Intimidation/Persuasion checks against fiends (against any creature at 10th level).

class_features.name: Infernal Warrior
class_features.description: Gain resistance to fire damage. While raging, a creature you successfully grapple takes your Hellfire Claw's fire damage on the grapple and again at the end of each of its turns while grappled.

class_features.name: Planar Conspirator
class_features.description: Spend 2 Hit Dice (without regaining HP) to cast detect thoughts; DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + CON modifier.

class_features.name: Incinerating Wrath
class_features.description: While raging, when you take damage from a creature within 60 feet you can see, use your reaction to duplicate hellish rebuke (3rd-level version, DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + CON modifier). Usable twice per rage.

class_features.name: Thunderous Blows
class_features.description: While raging, hitting a creature with a melee attack lets you push it up to 5 feet (10 feet at 10th level); Huge or larger creatures get a STR save (DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + STR modifier) to avoid being pushed.

class_features.name: Spirit of the Mountain
class_features.description: While raging, you can't be knocked prone or forcibly moved along the ground.

class_features.name: Demolishing Might
class_features.description: Melee weapon attacks deal an extra 1d8 damage to constructs and double damage to objects/structures.

class_features.name: Resolute Stance
class_features.description: At the start of your turn (no action required), assume a defensive stance until your next turn: can't be grappled, attack rolls against you have disadvantage, and your own weapon attacks have disadvantage.

class_features.name: Hurricane Strike
class_features.description: When you push a creature at least 5 feet, use a reaction to leap (no movement cost, no opportunity attacks) into an unoccupied space next to it, forcing a STR save (DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + STR modifier) or it's knocked prone. Additionally, when you push a creature within 5 feet of an ally, that ally can use its reaction to make a melee attack against it.

class_features.name: Unstoppable
class_features.description: While raging, your speed can't be reduced, and you're immune to frightened, paralyzed, prone, and stunned. If already frightened, paralyzed, or stunned, you can still use a bonus action to rage, and entering the rage suppresses those conditions.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Know 2 cantrips and 4 1st-level spells from the bard spell list; learn more per the table. Charisma is your spellcasting ability. Can cast known spells as rituals if tagged ritual; can use a musical instrument as a spellcasting focus. Swap one known spell for another on leveling up.

class_features.name: Bardic Inspiration
class_features.description: As a bonus action, give one creature within 60 feet who can hear you a Bardic Inspiration die (d6). Within 10 minutes, that creature can add the die to one ability check, attack roll, or saving throw. Uses equal to Charisma modifier (minimum 1), regained on a long rest. Die becomes d8 at 5th level, d10 at 10th, d12 at 15th.

class_features.name: Jack of All Trades
class_features.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (rounded down) to any ability check that doesn't already include your proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Song of Rest
class_features.description: During a short rest, you and friendly creatures who can hear your performance and spend Hit Dice to heal regain an extra 1d6 hit points each. Extra die increases to 1d8 at 9th level, 1d10 at 13th, 1d12 at 17th.

class_features.name: Bard College
class_features.description: Choose a bard college (subclass), granting features at 3rd, 6th, and 14th level.

class_features.name: Expertise
class_features.description: Choose two skill proficiencies; your proficiency bonus is doubled for ability checks using either. A second pair is chosen at 10th level.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat if using that optional rule. Also gained at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Font of Inspiration
class_features.description: You regain all expended uses of Bardic Inspiration on finishing a short or long rest, instead of only a long rest.

class_features.name: Countercharm
class_features.description: As an action, start a performance lasting until the end of your next turn; you and friendly creatures within 30 feet who can hear you have advantage on saves against being frightened or charmed. Ends early if you're incapacitated, silenced, or end it voluntarily (free).

class_features.name: Magical Secrets
class_features.description: Learn two spells of any class (of a level you can cast, or a cantrip); they count as bard spells and count against your Spells Known. Two more learned at 14th and 18th level.

class_features.name: Superior Inspiration
class_features.description: When you roll initiative and have no Bardic Inspiration uses left, you regain one use.

class_features.name: Magical Inspiration
class_features.description: Optional rule: if a creature holding your Bardic Inspiration die casts a healing or damaging spell, it can roll the die and add it as a bonus to the healing or damage; the die is then lost.

class_features.name: Bardic Versatility
class_features.description: Optional rule: whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you may instead swap one Expertise skill for another proficiency, or swap one known cantrip for a different bard cantrip.

class_features.name: Mote of Potential
class_features.description: Whenever you give a creature a Bardic Inspiration die, create an intangible, invulnerable mote near it that lasts until the die is used/lost. When the die is used: on an ability check, the creature may reroll the die and pick either result; on an attack roll, the target and chosen creatures within 5 feet take thunder damage equal to the die result on a failed Con save (your spell DC); on a saving throw, the creature gains temp HP equal to the die result plus your Charisma modifier (min 1).

class_features.name: Performance of Creation
class_features.description: As an action, create one nonmagical item (Medium or smaller, value up to 20 x your bard level) in an unoccupied space within 10 feet of you; it disappears after a number of hours equal to your proficiency bonus. Only one such item can exist at a time. Can be used again before a long rest by expending a 2nd-level+ spell slot. Max item size increases to Large at 6th level, Huge at 14th.

class_features.name: Animating Performance
class_features.description: As an action, animate one Large or smaller nonmagical, unattended item within 30 feet as a friendly Dancing Item construct (AC 16, HP 10 + 5x bard level, uses your proficiency bonus) for 1 hour, until reduced to 0 HP, or until you die. It acts on your initiative after you; only Dodges unless you spend a bonus action to command it (or it acts freely if you're incapacitated). Can be reused before a long rest by expending a 3rd-level+ spell slot; only one dancing item at a time.

class_features.name: Creative Crescendo
class_features.description: Performance of Creation can create multiple items at once, up to your Charisma modifier (minimum two); only one can be the maximum size, the rest Small or Tiny. No longer limited by gp value.

class_features.name: Silver Tongue
class_features.description: When you make a Charisma (Persuasion) or Charisma (Deception) check, treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

class_features.name: Unsettling Words
class_features.description: As a bonus action, expend one Bardic Inspiration use and target a creature within 60 feet; roll the Bardic Inspiration die and the creature subtracts that number from the next save it makes before the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Unfailing Inspiration
class_features.description: When a creature adds one of your Bardic Inspiration dice to a check, attack roll, or save and still fails, it keeps the die instead of losing it.

class_features.name: Universal Speech
class_features.description: As an action, choose creatures within 60 feet (up to your Charisma modifier, min 1); they magically understand your speech regardless of language for 1 hour. Usable again before a long rest by expending a spell slot.

class_features.name: Infectious Inspiration
class_features.description: When a creature within 60 feet succeeds on a check/attack/save using one of your Bardic Inspiration dice, use your reaction to give a different creature within 60 feet a Bardic Inspiration die without expending a use. Usable a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Mantle of Inspiration
class_features.description: As a bonus action, expend one Bardic Inspiration use; choose creatures within 60 feet (up to your Charisma modifier, min 1) who each gain 5 temporary hit points and may immediately use their reaction to move up to their speed without provoking opportunity attacks. Temp HP increases to 8 at 5th level, 11 at 10th, 14 at 15th.

class_features.name: Enthralling Performance
class_features.description: After performing for at least 1 minute, target humanoids within 60 feet who watched/listened (up to your Charisma modifier, min 1); each must succeed on a Wisdom save (your spell DC) or become charmed for 1 hour, idolizing and aiding you, ending early if they take damage, are attacked by you, or witness you harming their allies. A success leaves no hint of the attempt.

class_features.name: Mantle of Majesty
class_features.description: As a bonus action, cast command without a slot and gain an appearance of unearthly beauty for 1 minute or until concentration ends; while active you can cast command as a bonus action each turn without a slot, and creatures already charmed by you automatically fail their save against it.

class_features.name: Unbreakable Majesty
class_features.description: Your appearance permanently gains an otherworldly aspect. As a bonus action, assume a majestic presence for 1 minute or until incapacitated: any creature attacking you for the first time on its turn must succeed on a Charisma save (your spell DC) or be unable to attack you that turn (must retarget or waste the attack); on a success it can attack but has disadvantage on saves against your spells on your next turn.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with three skills of your choice.

class_features.name: Cutting Words
class_features.description: When a creature you can see within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or damage roll, use your reaction to expend a Bardic Inspiration use, roll the die, and subtract the result from that roll (can be used after the roll but before the outcome is known, or before damage is applied). Doesn't work on a creature that can't hear you or is immune to being charmed.

class_features.name: Additional Magical Secrets
class_features.description: Learn two spells of any class (of a level you can cast, or a cantrip); they count as bard spells but don't count against your number of bard spells known.

class_features.name: Peerless Skill
class_features.description: When you make an ability check, you may expend one Bardic Inspiration use, roll the die, and add it to the check (can be done after rolling but before the outcome is known).

class_features.name: Guiding Whispers
class_features.description: Learn the guidance cantrip (doesn't count against cantrips known); for you it has a 60-foot range.

class_features.name: Spiritual Focus
class_features.description: You can use a candle, crystal ball, skull, spirit board, or tarokka deck as a spellcasting focus. Starting at 6th level, when you cast a bard spell that damages or heals through this focus, roll a d6 and add it as a bonus to one damage or healing roll of the spell.

class_features.name: Tales from Beyond
class_features.description: While holding your Spiritual Focus, use a bonus action to expend a Bardic Inspiration use and roll on the Spirit Tales table (1-12, using the Bardic Inspiration die) to determine a retained tale effect. Use an action to apply the tale's effect to one creature within 30 feet (can be yourself); applying it ends the retained tale. Only one tale can be retained at a time; rolling again replaces it. Tale save DCs equal your spell DC.

class_features.name: Spirit Session
class_features.description: During a short or long rest, conduct an hour-long ritual with willing creatures (including yourself) up to your proficiency bonus, using your Spiritual Focus. At the end, temporarily learn one divination or necromancy spell of any class, of a level no higher than the number of participants (and a level you can cast); it counts as a bard spell but not against your spells known. You know it until your next long rest, after which you can't repeat the ritual until you start another long rest.

class_features.name: Mystical Connection
class_features.description: When you roll on the Spirit Tales table, roll twice and choose which result to use; if both rolls match, you may instead choose any effect on the table.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with medium armor and the scimitar. Any simple or martial melee weapon you're proficient with can be used as a spellcasting focus for bard spells.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: Choose Dueling (+2 damage with a one-handed melee weapon when wielding no other weapons) or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability modifier to the second attack's damage when two-weapon fighting). Can't be chosen more than once.

class_features.name: Blade Flourish
class_features.description: Whenever you take the Attack action, your speed increases by 10 feet until end of turn, and if a weapon attack as part of it hits, you can apply one Blade Flourish option (once per turn): Defensive Flourish (expend Bardic Inspiration for bonus damage equal to the die roll, and add that roll to your AC until your next turn), Slashing Flourish (expend Bardic Inspiration for bonus damage to the target and one other creature within 5 feet, equal to the die roll), or Mobile Flourish (expend Bardic Inspiration for bonus damage equal to the die roll, push the target 5 feet + the die roll, then use your reaction to move up to your speed to stay within 5 feet of the target).

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Master's Flourish
class_features.description: Whenever you use a Blade Flourish option, you can roll a d6 and use it instead of expending a Bardic Inspiration die.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons.

class_features.name: Combat Inspiration
class_features.description: A creature holding your Bardic Inspiration die can add the roll to a weapon damage roll it just made, or use its reaction to roll the die and add it to its AC against an attack after seeing the roll but before knowing the result.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Battle Magic
class_features.description: When you use your action to cast a bard spell, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Psychic Blades
class_features.description: When you hit with a weapon attack, expend one Bardic Inspiration use to deal an extra 2d6 psychic damage, once per round on your turn. Damage increases to 3d6 at 5th level, 5d6 at 10th, 8d6 at 15th.

class_features.name: Words of Terror
class_features.description: After speaking privately with a humanoid for at least 1 minute, it must succeed on a Wisdom save (your spell DC) or become frightened of you or another creature of your choice for 1 hour, until attacked/damaged, or until it witnesses an ally attacked/damaged. A success leaves no hint of the attempt.

class_features.name: Mantle of Whispers
class_features.description: When a humanoid dies within 30 feet, use your reaction to capture its shadow (retained until used or until a long rest). As an action, consume the shadow to disguise yourself as the dead person (alive and healthy) for 1 hour or until ended as a bonus action; you gain access to information the person would freely share with an acquaintance. A Wisdom (Insight) check contested by your Charisma (Deception) check (+5 bonus to yours) is needed to see through it. Recharges on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Shadow Lore
class_features.description: As an action, whisper to one creature within 30 feet who can hear and share a language with you; on a failed Wisdom save (your spell DC) it's charmed for 8 hours (or until you/allies attack, damage, or force a save on it), believing you know its deepest secret and obeying your commands out of fear (won't risk its life or fight for you unless already willing). Automatic success if it doesn't share a language with you or can't hear you.

class_features.name: Culinary Exploration
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with cook's utensils (usable as a spellcasting focus) with doubled proficiency bonus for related checks. When crafting food, you can add one additional ingredient's benefit to the dish on a successful check.

class_features.name: Petit Fours
class_features.description: During a short or long rest, create magical treats equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1), choosing a flavor (Bitter: poison resistance + advantage vs. poisoned; Salty: advantage on Wisdom saves + immune to charmed; Sour: weapon attacks deal bonus acid damage equal to a Bardic Inspiration die roll; Sweet: temp HP equal to a die roll + Charisma modifier for 1 hour; Umami: +2 AC) that a creature can eat as an action or bonus action for the effect (lasting until end of its next turn unless noted). As a bonus action, expend a Bardic Inspiration use to teleport any number of treats to creatures within 60 feet for them to eat via reaction or bonus action. Treats last until your next short/long rest.

class_features.name: Culinary Specialization
class_features.description: Choose one: Slow Cooking (proficiency with medium/heavy armor, shields, martial weapons; gain temp HP equal to proficiency bonus at the start of each turn), Fast Food (proficiency with medium armor; attack twice instead of once with the Attack action), or Patissier (learn two spells of any level you can cast or a cantrip, not counted against spells known; on finishing a short rest, expend a Bardic Inspiration use to recover spell slot levels totaling the die roll, none 6th level or higher, once per long rest).

class_features.name: Executive Chef
class_features.description: When a creature who can hear you rolls a Bardic Inspiration die or eats a Petit Four, you may shout encouragement (no action) letting it use its reaction to make a weapon attack or move its speed without provoking opportunity attacks; eating a Petit Four lets it combine this with the same action/bonus action used to eat it.

class_features.name: Malleable Visage
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with surgeon's tools (usable as a spellcasting focus) and learn alter self (counts as a bard spell, doesn't count against spells known). Over 1 minute, cast it without a slot using only Change Appearance, without requiring concentration. Over 10 minutes, use surgeon's tools to grant a willing creature the Change Appearance effect until its next long rest. Once used this way, can't reuse until a long rest.

class_features.name: Suturer
class_features.description: Learn spiritual weapon (counts as a bard spell, doesn't count against spells known); cast it once per long rest without a slot, manifesting as a giant needle dealing piercing damage. Grants the Suture benefit (bonus action or action: expend Bardic Inspiration to move the weapon 20 feet and grant temp HP equal to the die roll to a creature within 5 feet, or stabilize it at 0 HP) plus Unspool at 5th level (action: expend Bardic Inspiration, move the weapon 20 feet, force a Strength save against your spell DC or restrain a creature within 5 feet for 1 minute, escapable via action) and Acupuncture at 10th level (action: expend Bardic Inspiration, move the weapon 20 feet, melee spell attack dealing piercing damage equal to the die roll + Charisma modifier, forcing a Constitution save against your spell DC or paralyzing until end of its next turn).

class_features.name: Ritual Reskin
class_features.description: Over 10 minutes, perform a ritual on creatures within 60 feet (including yourself), up to your Charisma modifier (min 1), granting one chosen adaptation for 1 hour: Bull's Buns (advantage on Strength checks, one size larger for carrying capacity), Cactus Skin (grapplers take piercing damage equal to a Bardic Inspiration die roll on a failed Con save or release the grapple), Cat's Paws (advantage on Dexterity checks, no fall damage from 20 feet or less), Fish Form (waterbreathing and swim speed equal to walking speed), Owl's Sight (advantage on Wisdom checks and initiative), or Rhino's Hide (advantage on Constitution checks, temp HP equal to a die roll + Charisma modifier). Usable again before a long rest by expending a 3rd-level+ spell slot.

class_features.name: Soulsew
class_features.description: When a creature uses one of your Bardic Inspiration dice, or fails a save against your Unspool/Acupuncture, it becomes soulsewn to you for 1 minute (a visible thread that breaks beyond 100 feet). As a bonus action, teleport to a soulsewn creature's nearest unoccupied space, or attempt to swap places with it (contested Charisma check if unwilling). Usable a number of times equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Coin Flip
class_features.description: A creature using one of your Bardic Inspiration dice may flip a coin instead of rolling: heads treats the die as its maximum value; tails gives the GM the die to grant to another creature instead. GM-held dice are lost at your next long rest.

class_features.name: Magic Coin
class_features.description: Use a coin (worth at least 1 cp) as a spellcasting focus. As an action, make a ranged spell attack (Charisma) by flinging a coin at a target within 60 feet, dealing 1 bludgeoning + 1d12 thunder damage on a hit; the coin returns to your hand. A natural 20 against a hostile creature with a nonmagical coin duplicates the coin. Thunder damage increases to 2d12 at 6th level, 3d12 at 14th.

class_features.name: Money Talks
class_features.description: As an action, magically enchant a held coin for 10 minutes (or until ended): a holder who knows a language can understand your speech and vice versa, plus advantage on the first Persuasion check negotiating value with the holder. Alternatively, use an action to see/hear through the coin until your next turn, being deaf and blind to your own senses. Usable equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Shrewd Consumer
class_features.description: Whenever you cast a spell with a material component, drink a potion, or use a scroll worth 500 gp or less, there's a 50% chance it isn't consumed. You can also use a bonus action to take the Use an Object action or drink a potion.

class_features.name: Poetry in Misery
class_features.description: Whenever you or an ally within 30 feet rolls a 1 on an attack roll, ability check, or save, use your reaction to regain one expended use of Bardic Inspiration.

class_features.name: Sorrowful Fate
class_features.description: When you or an ally forces a creature to make a save, expend a Bardic Inspiration use to change it to a Charisma save instead. On a failure, roll a Bardic Inspiration die for psychic damage and the target is plagued with regret for 1 minute (uttering darkly poetic final words if reduced to 0 HP and able to speak).

class_features.name: Tale of Hubris
class_features.description: When a creature scores a critical hit against you or an ally within 60 feet, use your reaction and expend a Bardic Inspiration use to curse the attacker: for 1 minute (or until it suffers a critical hit), any weapon attack against it crits on 18-20. Range becomes 17-20 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Impending Misfortune
class_features.description: When you make an attack roll or save, gain a +10 bonus, but your next attack roll or save takes a -10 penalty (cleared at your next short/long rest if unused). Can't be used again until a short/long rest, or until reduced to 0 HP.

class_features.name: Nimbus of Pathos
class_features.description: Touch a willing creature to grant tragic heroism for 1 minute: +4 AC, advantage on attack rolls and saves, targets it hits take an extra 1d10 radiant damage, and it's critically hit on an 18-20. When the effect ends, the creature drops to 0 HP and is dying.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Know 3 cantrips from the cleric list, gaining more per the table. Prepare a number of cleric spells equal to your Wisdom modifier + cleric level (minimum 1), choosable from the full cleric spell list; can re-prepare on finishing a long rest. Wisdom is your spellcasting ability. Can cast prepared ritual-tagged spells as rituals; can use a holy symbol as a spellcasting focus.

class_features.name: Divine Domain
class_features.description: Choose a divine domain (subclass) related to your deity, granting domain spells and features at 1st, 2nd, 6th, 8th, and 17th level.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity
class_features.description: Channel divine energy to fuel one of several effects, including the base Turn Undead option and one from your domain. Some effects require a save with DC equal to your cleric spell save DC. Uses increase to 2 at 6th level and 3 at 18th level, regained on finishing a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity (2 uses)
class_features.description: Your Channel Divinity can now be used twice between rests.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn Undead
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol; each undead within 30 feet that can see/hear you must succeed on a Wisdom save (your spell DC) or be turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage. A turned creature must flee from you, can't willingly approach within 30 feet, can't take reactions, and can only Dash or attempt to escape a restraint (or Dodge if it can't move).

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat if using that optional rule. Also gained at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Destroy Undead
class_features.description: When an undead fails its save against your Turn Undead, it's instantly destroyed if its CR is at or below a threshold (1/2 at 5th level, 1 at 8th, 2 at 11th, 3 at 14th, 4 at 17th).

class_features.name: Divine Intervention
class_features.description: As an action, describe the aid sought and roll percentile dice; on a result at or below your cleric level, your deity intervenes with an effect chosen by the DM (comparable to a cleric/domain spell). If it succeeds, you can't use this again for 7 days; otherwise it recharges on a long rest. At 20th level, it succeeds automatically with no roll.

class_features.name: Harness Divine Power
class_features.description: Optional rule: as a bonus action, expend a Channel Divinity use to touch your holy symbol and regain one expended spell slot of a level no higher than half your proficiency bonus (rounded up). Usable once at 2nd level, twice at 6th, thrice at 18th; uses regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Cantrip Versatility
class_features.description: Optional rule: whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you may swap one known cantrip for another from the cleric spell list.

class_features.name: Blessed Strikes
class_features.description: Optional rule replacing Divine Strike/Potent Spellcasting: once per turn, when a creature takes damage from one of your cantrips or weapon attacks, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage to it. Usable once until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Arcane Initiate
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Arcana and learn two cantrips of your choice from the wizard spell list; they count as cleric cantrips for you.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Arcane Abjuration
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol; one celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend within 30 feet that can see/hear you must succeed on a Wisdom save (your spell DC) or be turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage (same turning rules as Turn Undead). At 5th level, a creature that fails this save is also banished for 1 minute (as banishment, no concentration) if off its plane of origin and at or below a CR threshold (1/2 at 5th level, 1 at 8th, 2 at 11th, 3 at 14th, 4 at 17th).

class_features.name: Spell Breaker
class_features.description: When you restore hit points to an ally with a spell of 1st level or higher, you can also end one spell on that creature whose level is equal to or lower than the healing spell's slot level.

class_features.name: Potent Spellcasting
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

class_features.name: Arcane Mastery
class_features.description: Choose four wizard spells, one each of 6th, 7th, 8th, and 9th level; they're added to your domain spells, always prepared, and count as cleric spells.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons.

class_features.name: Reaper
class_features.description: Learn one necromancy cantrip of your choice from any spell list. When you cast a necromancy cantrip that normally targets only one creature, it can instead target two creatures within range and within 5 feet of each other.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Touch of Death
class_features.description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack, use Channel Divinity to deal extra necrotic damage equal to 5 + twice your cleric level.

class_features.name: Inescapable Destruction
class_features.description: Necrotic damage dealt by your cleric spells and Channel Divinity options ignores resistance to necrotic damage.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 necrotic damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Improved Reaper
class_features.description: When you cast a necromancy spell of 1st through 5th level that targets only one creature, it can instead target two creatures within range and within 5 feet of each other (providing material components for both if needed).

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor and smith's tools.

class_features.name: Blessing of the Forge
class_features.description: At the end of a long rest, touch one nonmagical suit of armor or simple/martial weapon to make it magical until your next long rest ends or you die: +1 AC if armor, or +1 to attack and damage rolls if a weapon.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Artisan's Blessing
class_features.description: Conduct an hour-long ritual using Channel Divinity to craft a nonmagical item containing metal (weapon, armor, ammunition, tools, etc.) worth up to 100 gp, consuming metal of equal value as the crafting material; can duplicate a nonmagical metal item you possess.

class_features.name: Soul of the Forge
class_features.description: Gain resistance to fire damage. While wearing heavy armor, gain a +1 bonus to AC.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 fire damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Saint of Forge and Fire
class_features.description: Gain immunity to fire damage. While wearing heavy armor, gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.

class_features.name: Circle of Mortality
class_features.description: When you would roll dice to restore hit points with a spell to a creature at 0 HP, use the maximum possible result for each die instead. Also learn the spare the dying cantrip (doesn't count against cantrips known), with a 30-foot range and castable as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Eyes of the Grave
class_features.description: As an action, sense the location of undead within 60 feet (not behind total cover, not protected from divination) until the end of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Path to the Grave
class_features.description: As an action, curse one creature you can see within 30 feet until the end of your next turn; the next attack against it by you or an ally gives it vulnerability to that attack's damage, then the curse ends.

class_features.name: Sentinel at Death's Door
class_features.description: When you or a creature within 30 feet suffers a critical hit, use your reaction to turn it into a normal hit, canceling any critical-hit-triggered effects. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Potent Spellcasting
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

class_features.name: Keeper of Souls
class_features.description: When an enemy you can see dies within 60 feet (and you aren't incapacitated), you or a creature you choose within 60 feet regains hit points equal to the dead enemy's Hit Dice. Usable once, then again at the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Blessings of Knowledge
class_features.description: Learn two languages of your choice. Gain proficiency in two of: Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion; your proficiency bonus is doubled for ability checks using either.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Knowledge of the Ages
class_features.description: As an action, choose one skill or tool; gain proficiency with it for 10 minutes.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Read Thoughts
class_features.description: As an action, target a creature within 60 feet; it must succeed on a Wisdom save or you can read its surface thoughts for 1 minute while within 60 feet (success means you can't try again on it until a long rest). While reading its thoughts, you can spend your action to end the effect and cast suggestion on it without a slot, with the target automatically failing its save.

class_features.name: Potent Spellcasting
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

class_features.name: Visions of the Past
class_features.description: Meditate (requiring concentration) for up to your Wisdom score in minutes to see visions of the past: either of an object's previous owner(s) (1 minute per owner) or of significant recent events in your vicinity within a 50-foot cube (1 minute per event, most recent first), looking back a number of days equal to your Wisdom score. Recharges on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor.

class_features.name: Disciple of Life
class_features.description: Whenever you use a spell of 1st level or higher to restore hit points to a creature, it regains additional hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Preserve Life
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol and distribute healing equal to 5 x your cleric level among creatures within 30 feet, restoring no creature above half its hit point maximum. Can't target undead or constructs.

class_features.name: Blessed Healer
class_features.description: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher that restores hit points to a creature other than yourself, you also regain hit points equal to 2 + the spell's level.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Supreme Healing
class_features.description: When you would roll dice to restore hit points with a spell, use the maximum possible result for each die instead.

class_features.name: Bonus Cantrip
class_features.description: Gain the light cantrip if you don't already know it; doesn't count against cantrips known.

class_features.name: Warding Flare
class_features.description: When attacked by a creature within 30 feet that you can see, use your reaction to impose disadvantage on the attack roll (no effect on an attacker immune to blindness). Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Radiance of the Dawn
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol to dispel magical darkness within 30 feet; each hostile creature within 30 feet (not behind total cover) must make a Constitution save, taking 2d10 + your cleric level radiant damage on a failure, or half as much on a success.

class_features.name: Improved Flare
class_features.description: Your Warding Flare can also be used when a creature you can see within 30 feet attacks a creature other than you.

class_features.name: Potent Spellcasting
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

class_features.name: Corona of Light
class_features.description: As an action, emit bright light in a 60-foot radius (dim light 30 feet beyond) for 1 minute or until dismissed; enemies in the bright light have disadvantage on saves against spells that deal fire or radiant damage.

class_features.name: Acolyte of Nature
class_features.description: Learn one druid cantrip (counts as a cleric cantrip, doesn't count against cantrips known). Gain proficiency in one of: Animal Handling, Nature, or Survival.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Charm Animals and Plants
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol; each beast or plant creature within 30 feet that can see you must succeed on a Wisdom save or be charmed for 1 minute or until it takes damage, becoming friendly to you and creatures you designate.

class_features.name: Dampen Elements
class_features.description: When you or a creature within 30 feet takes acid, cold, fire, lightning, or thunder damage, use your reaction to grant resistance to that creature against that instance of damage.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 cold, fire, or lightning damage (your choice). Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Master of Nature
class_features.description: While creatures are charmed by your Charm Animals and Plants, you can use a bonus action to verbally command what each will do on its next turn.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor and one of Intimidation or Persuasion (your choice).

class_features.name: Voice of Authority
class_features.description: If you cast a spell with a 1st-level+ slot targeting an ally, that ally can use its reaction immediately after the spell to make one weapon attack against a creature you choose that you can see. If multiple allies are targeted, you choose which one attacks.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Order's Demand
class_features.description: As an action, present your holy symbol; each creature of your choice within 30 feet that can see/hear you must succeed on a Wisdom save or be charmed until the end of your next turn or until it takes damage. You may also force charmed creatures to drop what they're holding on a failed save.

class_features.name: Embodiment of the Law
class_features.description: If you cast an enchantment spell with a 1st-level+ slot whose normal casting time is 1 action, you can change its casting time to 1 bonus action. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 psychic damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Order's Wrath
class_features.description: If you deal your Divine Strike damage to a creature on your turn, you can curse it until the start of your next turn; the next time an ally hits the cursed creature, it also takes 2d8 psychic damage and the curse ends. Usable once per turn.

class_features.name: Implement of Peace
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in one of Insight, Performance, or Persuasion (your choice).

class_features.name: Emboldening Bond
class_features.description: As an action, bond a number of willing creatures within 30 feet (including yourself) equal to your proficiency bonus for 10 minutes or until used again. While bonded creatures are within 30 feet of each other, each can add a d4 to one attack roll, ability check, or save per turn. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Balm of Peace
class_features.description: As an action, move up to your speed without provoking opportunity attacks; whenever you move within 5 feet of a creature during this move, restore 2d6 + your Wisdom modifier (min 1) hit points to it, each creature healable only once per use of this action.

class_features.name: Protective Bond
class_features.description: When a creature affected by your Emboldening Bond is about to take damage, a second bonded creature within 30 feet can use its reaction to teleport adjacent to the first and take all the damage instead.

class_features.name: Potent Spellcasting
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to the damage you deal with any cleric cantrip.

class_features.name: Expansive Bond
class_features.description: Emboldening Bond and Protective Bond now work at 60 feet instead of 30. When a creature uses Protective Bond to take another's damage, it has resistance to that damage.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

class_features.name: Wrath of the Storm
class_features.description: When a creature within 5 feet that you can see hits you with an attack, use your reaction to force a Dexterity save on it; on a failure it takes 2d8 lightning or thunder damage (your choice), half as much on a success. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Destructive Wrath
class_features.description: When you roll lightning or thunder damage, use Channel Divinity to deal maximum damage instead of rolling.

class_features.name: Thunderbolt Strike
class_features.description: When you deal lightning damage to a Large or smaller creature, you can also push it up to 10 feet away from you.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 thunder damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Stormborn
class_features.description: You have a flying speed equal to your walking speed whenever you're not underground or indoors.

class_features.name: Blessing of the Trickster
class_features.description: As an action, touch a willing creature other than yourself to grant advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks for 1 hour or until used again.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Invoke Duplicity
class_features.description: As an action, create an illusory duplicate of yourself within 30 feet for 1 minute or until you lose concentration; as a bonus action, move it up to 30 feet (within 120 feet of you). You can cast spells as though from the illusion's space (using your own senses), and you have advantage on attack rolls against a creature within 5 feet of both you and the illusion.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Cloak of Shadows
class_features.description: As an action, become invisible until the end of your next turn; you become visible if you attack or cast a spell.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 poison damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Improved Duplicity
class_features.description: Invoke Duplicity now creates up to four duplicates instead of one; as a bonus action, move any number of them up to 30 feet each (within 120 feet of you).

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

class_features.name: Eyes of Night
class_features.description: Gain darkvision out to 300 feet, treating dim light as bright and darkness as dim within that range. As an action, share this darkvision with willing creatures within 10 feet (up to your Wisdom modifier, min 1) for 1 hour; usable again before a long rest by expending any spell slot.

class_features.name: Vigilant Blessing
class_features.description: As an action, touch a creature (possibly yourself) to grant advantage on its next initiative roll; ends after the roll or if used again.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Twilight Sanctuary
class_features.description: As an action, create a 30-foot-radius sphere of dim light centered on you for 1 minute (moves with you, ends if you're incapacitated or die); whenever a creature ends its turn inside, grant it temp HP equal to 1d6 + your cleric level, or end one charmed/frightened effect on it.

class_features.name: Steps of Night
class_features.description: While in dim light or darkness, use a bonus action to gain a flying speed equal to your walking speed for 1 minute. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Twilight Shroud
class_features.description: You and allies have half cover while inside the sphere created by Twilight Sanctuary.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons and heavy armor.

class_features.name: War Priest
class_features.description: When you use the Attack action, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
class_features.description: When you make an attack roll, use Channel Divinity to gain a +10 bonus to the roll, choosing after seeing the roll but before the outcome is known.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: War God's Blessing
class_features.description: When a creature within 30 feet makes an attack roll, use your reaction and Channel Divinity to grant it a +10 bonus to the roll, choosing after seeing the roll but before the outcome is known.

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 damage of the same type as the weapon. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Avatar of Battle
