class_features.description: Gain resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage from nonmagical attacks.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with martial weapons.

class_features.name: Bloodletting Focus
class_features.description: When you cast an instantaneous damage-dealing spell of 1st level or higher, any creature with blood that takes damage from it takes extra necrotic damage equal to 2 + the spell's level.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Crimson Bond
class_features.description: Use Channel Divinity to form a 1-hour (or until concentration breaks) bond with a creature you can see or have a blood sample from. While bonded, use an action to learn its distance/direction, HP, and conditions within 10 miles, or take 2d6 necrotic damage to attempt to see/hear through its senses (target makes a Constitution save against your spell DC; success ends the bond, failure lets you use its senses for minutes equal to your Wisdom modifier, min 1, blinding/deafening you to your own senses meanwhile).

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Blood Puppet
class_features.description: As an action, target a Large or smaller bleeding creature or corpse within 60 feet; it must succeed on a Wisdom save (your spell DC) or be charmed and controlled by you (unconscious creatures auto-fail). On its turn you can command it (no action) to move half speed and interact with an object, attack once, or do nothing; a living target can re-save at the end of each turn to end the effect. Lasts 1 minute or until concentration ends. At 17th level, can target Huge or smaller.

class_features.name: Sanguine Recall
class_features.description: As an action, recover expended spell slots with a combined level up to half your cleric level (rounded up), none 6th level or higher, taking 1d8 necrotic damage per slot level recovered (damage can't be reduced).

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 necrotic damage. Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Vascular Corruption Aura
class_features.description: As an action, emit a 30-foot aura for 1 minute: any hostile bleeding creature that enters or starts its turn there takes 3d6 necrotic damage and regains only half hit points from healing while inside.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor, martial weapons, brewer's supplies, and cook's utensils.

class_features.name: Table-Turner
class_features.description: When a creature within 5 feet that you can see hits you with an attack, use your reaction to force a Constitution save (your spell DC); on a failure it takes 1d12 poison damage and is poisoned until the end of its next turn, or half damage and not poisoned on a success. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Create Healing Draft
class_features.description: As an action, use Channel Divinity to create a potion that a creature can drink as a bonus action to regain 2d6 + your cleric level hit points. The potion turns to dust at your next short/long rest if unused.

class_features.name: Strong Stomach
class_features.description: Gain advantage on saves against poison and resistance to acid and poison damage. Create food and water cast by you can produce ale or wine instead of up to 5 gallons of water. As an action, suppress your own drunk or poisoned condition for 1 minute (once per long rest).

class_features.name: Divine Strike
class_features.description: Once on each of your turns when you hit with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 acid or poison damage (your choice). Increases to 2d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Invigorating Feast
class_features.description: Before a meal, enchant food within 30 feet for yourself and up to six willing creatures; eating it within the next 10 minutes grants (after a delay until those 10 minutes pass) 2d6 + 10 temp HP, immunity to charm, and immunity to magical sleep, lasting 8 hours.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with two martial weapons of your choice and one of: Animal Handling, Nature, or Survival.

class_features.name: Mark Prey
class_features.description: As a bonus action, mark a creature within 90 feet as your quarry for 1 hour; weapon attacks against it deal an extra 1d6 damage, and you have advantage on Perception/Survival checks to find it. Marking a new creature removes the old mark.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Honed Instincts
class_features.description: Use Channel Divinity (no action) on a creature within 120 feet to learn either its saving throw/skill proficiencies or its damage resistances/immunities/vulnerabilities and condition immunities. The next time you hit it with a weapon attack within a minute, you deal maximum damage instead of rolling.

class_features.name: Pack Hunter
class_features.description: As a reaction, issue a Kill command (when another creature hits your Mark Prey target, deal the mark's extra damage to it as well) or a Retreat command (when your marked target attacks a creature within 60 feet, let that creature use its reaction to move half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks, potentially avoiding the attack). Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), regained on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Unflinching Mark
class_features.description: Mark Prey's bonus damage increases to 2d6, then 3d6 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Rite of the Hunt
class_features.description: As a bonus action while you can see your Mark Prey target within 120 feet, force a Wisdom save (your spell DC); on a failure, choose Chase (it has disadvantage on attacks against others and must save to move more than 30 feet from you) or Avoid (it has disadvantage on attacks against you and must save to move within 30 feet of you) for 1 minute, with a save at the end of each of its turns to end it. A success grants 24 hours of immunity to this feature.

class_features.name: Clarity of Catha
class_features.description: When a creature within 30 feet that you can see makes a Wisdom save, use your reaction to grant it advantage on the save. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Blessing of the Full Moon
class_features.description: As an action, use Channel Divinity to grant a willing creature within 30 feet one blessing of your choice: Blessing of the Watchful Moon (+10 feet speed and advantage on Perception/Survival checks involving smell or tracking, for 1 hour) or Blessing of the Blood-Drenched Moon (advantage on attack rolls against a target if an ally is within 5 feet of it and not incapacitated, for 10 minutes).

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Mind of Two Moons
class_features.description: Expend a Channel Divinity use to concentrate on a second Moon Domain spell while already concentrating on a first, as long as both are Moon Domain spells; Constitution saves to maintain both are made with disadvantage, and failure breaks concentration on both.

class_features.name: Empowered Cantrips
class_features.description: Your cleric cantrips deal extra damage equal to your Wisdom modifier (minimum 1).

class_features.name: Eclipse of Ill Omen
class_features.description: As a bonus action, manifest a 60-foot-radius area of dim reddish light (excluding any creatures you choose) for up to 1 minute while concentrating; creatures in the area make saves with disadvantage. Once per turn when you deal radiant damage to a creature in the area, you can curse it (no action) until the eclipse ends, halving its speed and preventing it from regaining hit points.

class_features.name: Druidic
class_features.description: You know Druidic, a secret language. You can speak it and hide messages in normal speech/text that only other Druidic speakers automatically notice; non-speakers can detect a hidden message with a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check but can't decipher it.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast Wisdom-based spells from the druid spell list. Know 2 cantrips at level 1 (more at higher levels). Prepare a number of spells equal to Wisdom modifier + druid level (min 1) each day, drawn from the full druid list, and can cast any prepared spell using a slot of its level or higher. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier; spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier. Can cast prepared ritual-tagged spells as rituals, and can use a druidic focus as a spellcasting focus.

class_features.name: Wild Shape
class_features.description: Use your action to magically transform into a beast you've seen before, with a CR/speed limit based on level (CR 1/4, no flying or swimming, at 2nd). Lasts hours equal to half your druid level (rounded down), or until you revert as a bonus action or are knocked unconscious/to 0 HP/killed. While transformed you use the beast's statistics (keeping your own Int/Wis/Cha and proficiencies), can't cast spells, and revert with your prior HP total (excess damage past 0 HP in beast form carries over to your normal form).

class_features.name: Druid Circle
class_features.description: Choose a druid circle subclass, granting features at 2nd, 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

class_features.name: Wild Shape Improvement (CR 1/2)
class_features.description: Your Wild Shape's beast-form limit increases: you can transform into a beast of CR 1/2 or lower with no flying speed restriction removed yet.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Wild Shape Improvement (CR 1)
class_features.description: Your Wild Shape's beast-form limit increases again: you can transform into a beast of CR 1 or lower (no flying-speed restriction at this tier).

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Timeless Body
class_features.description: You age only 1 year for every 10 years that pass.

class_features.name: Beast Spells
class_features.description: You can perform the verbal and somatic components of druid spells while in a beast shape from Wild Shape, but still can't provide material components.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Archdruid
class_features.description: Wild Shape now has unlimited uses. You can also ignore the verbal and somatic components of your druid spells, plus any material components that lack a cost and aren't consumed, in both your normal and beast form.

class_features.name: Wild Companion
class_features.description: Expend a use of Wild Shape to cast find familiar without material components. The familiar is a fey instead of a beast and disappears after a number of hours equal to half your druid level.

class_features.name: Cantrip Versatility
class_features.description: Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you can swap one druid cantrip you know for another from the druid spell list.

class_features.name: Balm of the Summer Court
class_features.description: You have a pool of d6s equal to your druid level. As a bonus action, choose a creature within 120 feet and spend up to half your druid level's worth of dice (rounded down); the target regains HP equal to the total rolled and gains 1 temp HP per die spent. Regain all dice on a long rest.

class_features.name: Hearth of Moonlight and Shadow
class_features.description: During a short or long rest, create an invisible 30-foot-radius sphere centered on a point you touch (blocked by total cover). You and allies inside gain +5 to Dexterity (Stealth) and Wisdom (Perception) checks, and open-flame light inside isn't visible from outside. Vanishes at the end of the rest or if you leave it.

class_features.name: Hidden Paths
class_features.description: As a bonus action, teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, or use your action to teleport a willing creature you touch up to 30 feet. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Walker in Dreams
class_features.description: When you finish a short rest, you can cast dream, scrying, or teleportation circle without a slot or material components (the teleportation circle version opens to the last place you finished a long rest on your current plane; fails harmlessly if you haven't). Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Circle Spells
class_features.description: Learn the chill touch cantrip at 2nd level. Gain access to a fixed list of always-prepared bonus spells at 3rd (blindness/deafness, gentle repose), 5th (animate dead, gaseous form), 7th (blight, confusion), and 9th level (cloudkill, contagion) that don't count against your prepared spell total.

class_features.name: Halo of Spores
class_features.description: When a creature you can see moves within 10 feet of you or starts its turn there, deal 1d4 necrotic damage (1d6 at 6th, 1d8 at 10th, 1d10 at 14th level) unless it succeeds on a Constitution save vs. your spell save DC.

class_features.name: Symbiotic Entity
class_features.description: Expend a Wild Shape use to gain 4 temp HP per druid level instead of transforming. For 10 minutes (or until the temp HP is gone or you use Wild Shape again), your Halo of Spores damage doubles (roll the die twice) and your melee weapon attacks deal an extra 1d6 necrotic damage.

class_features.name: Fungal Infestation
class_features.description: When a Small/Medium beast or humanoid dies within 10 feet of you, animate it as a zombie (1 HP, uses zombie stat block) for 1 hour; it acts right after your turn, obeying your commands and only able to Attack. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Spreading Spores
class_features.description: While Symbiotic Entity is active, hurl spores up to 30 feet to create a 10-foot cube of swirling spores for 1 minute (dismissable as a bonus action). Any creature moving into or starting its turn in the cube takes your Halo of Spores damage (Constitution save vs. your spell save DC negates), max once per turn per creature. While the cube persists you can't use your Halo of Spores reaction.

class_features.name: Fungal Body
class_features.description: You can't be blinded, deafened, frightened, or poisoned, and any critical hit against you counts as a normal hit instead, unless you're incapacitated.

class_features.name: Star Map
class_features.description: Create a Tiny star chart that serves as a spellcasting focus. While holding it: know the guidance cantrip, have guiding bolt always prepared (doesn't count against your prepared total), and can cast guiding bolt without a slot a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest. A 1-hour ceremony during a rest creates a replacement if lost.

class_features.name: Starry Form
class_features.description: Expend a Wild Shape use to take a luminous starry form (retains your normal statistics, sheds light) for 10 minutes instead of transforming into a beast. Choose one constellation effect: Archer (bonus-action ranged spell attack, 1d8 + Wisdom modifier radiant damage), Chalice (when you cast a healing spell with a slot, you or a creature within 30 feet regains 1d8 + Wisdom modifier extra HP), or Dragon (treat a roll of 9 or lower as a 10 on Int/Wis checks or Con saves to maintain concentration).

class_features.name: Cosmic Omen
class_features.description: On finishing a long rest, roll a die for an omen lasting until your next long rest: even (Weal) lets you use your reaction to add a rolled d6 to an ally's attack roll/save/check within 30 feet; odd (Woe) lets you subtract a rolled d6 instead. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Twinkling Constellations
class_features.description: Starry Form improves: Archer's and Chalice's dice become 2d8, and Dragon grants a 20-foot flying/hovering speed. You can also change your active constellation at the start of each turn while in Starry Form.

class_features.name: Full of Stars
class_features.description: While in Starry Form, you become partially incorporeal, gaining resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

class_features.name: Bonus Cantrip
class_features.description: Learn one additional druid cantrip; it doesn't count against your number of cantrips known.

class_features.name: Natural Recovery
class_features.description: During a short rest, recover expended spell slots with a combined level up to half your druid level (rounded up), none 6th level or higher. Usable once per long rest.

class_features.name: Circle Spells (Land)
class_features.description: Choose a terrain (arctic, coast, desert, forest, grassland, mountain, swamp, or Underdark) at 2nd level; gain access to that terrain's fixed spell list at 3rd, 5th, 7th, and 9th level, always prepared and not counting against your prepared spell total.

class_features.name: Land's Stride
class_features.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement, and you can pass through nonmagical plants without being slowed or harmed by them. You have advantage on saves against magically created/manipulated plants that impede movement.

class_features.name: Nature's Ward
class_features.description: You can't be charmed or frightened by elementals or fey, and you're immune to poison and disease.

class_features.name: Nature's Sanctuary
class_features.description: A beast or plant creature attacking you must succeed on a Wisdom save vs. your spell save DC or choose a different target (or the attack automatically misses); on success it's immune to this effect for 24 hours. The creature knows about this before attacking.

class_features.name: Combat Wild Shape
class_features.description: Use Wild Shape as a bonus action instead of an action. While transformed, you can also use a bonus action to expend a spell slot and regain 1d8 HP per level of the slot.

class_features.name: Circle Forms
class_features.description: Wild Shape can transform you into a beast of CR up to 1 (ignoring the Max CR column, but otherwise following the other Beast Shapes limitations). At 6th level this scales to CR up to your druid level divided by 3 (rounded down).

class_features.name: Primal Strike
class_features.description: Your attacks in beast form count as magical for overcoming resistance and immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

class_features.name: Elemental Wild Shape
class_features.description: Expend two uses of Wild Shape at once to transform into an air, earth, fire, or water elemental.

class_features.name: Thousand Forms
class_features.description: You can cast the alter self spell at will.

class_features.name: Speech of the Woods
class_features.description: Learn to speak, read, and write Sylvan. Beasts can understand your speech, and you can decipher their noises and gestures enough to learn basic information they've seen or heard recently.

class_features.name: Spirit Totem
class_features.description: Summon an incorporeal spirit creating a 30-foot aura for 1 minute (or until incapacitated); movable 60 feet as a bonus action. Choose Bear (allies in aura gain 5 + druid level temp HP on summon, plus advantage on Strength checks/saves), Hawk (reaction to grant advantage on an attack roll against a target in the aura, plus advantage on Wisdom (Perception) checks), or Unicorn (advantage on checks to detect creatures in the aura; healing spells you cast with a slot also heal chosen allies in the aura for your druid level). Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Mighty Summoner
class_features.description: Beasts/fey you summon or create via spells gain 2 extra HP per Hit Die, and their natural weapon attacks count as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

class_features.name: Guardian Spirit
class_features.description: A beast or fey you summoned or created with a spell that ends its turn in your Spirit Totem's aura regains HP equal to half your druid level.

class_features.name: Faithful Summons
class_features.description: If reduced to 0 HP or incapacitated against your will, immediately and freely cast conjure animals as a 9th-level slot, summoning four CR 2 or lower beasts within 20 feet of you that protect you for 1 hour (no concentration) unless commanded otherwise. Usable once per long rest.

class_features.name: Circle Spells (Wildfire)
class_features.description: Gain access to a fixed list of always-prepared bonus spells at 2nd (burning hands, cure wounds), 3rd (flaming sphere, scorching ray), 5th (plant growth, revivify), 7th (aura of life, fire shield), and 9th level (flame strike, mass cure wounds) that don't count against your prepared spell total.

class_features.name: Summon Wildfire Spirit
class_features.description: Expend a Wild Shape use to summon a friendly Small fire elemental spirit (HP = 5 + 5x druid level) within 30 feet instead of transforming; creatures within 10 feet take 2d6 fire damage (Dexterity save vs. spell save DC negates) on its arrival. It shares your initiative, acts (Dodge by default, or a commanded action via your bonus action) right after your turn, and lasts 1 hour or until reduced to 0 HP, resummoned, or you die.

class_features.name: Enhanced Bond
class_features.description: While your wildfire spirit is summoned, casting a spell that deals fire damage or restores HP adds a rolled d8 bonus to one damage/healing roll of that spell. Ranged spells can also originate from your spirit's space instead of yours.

class_features.name: Cauterizing Flames
class_features.description: When a Small or larger creature dies within 30 feet of you or your wildfire spirit, a spectral flame appears in its space for 1 minute; when a creature enters that space you can use your reaction to extinguish it and either heal that creature or deal fire damage to it, equal to 2d10 + your Wisdom modifier. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Blazing Revival
class_features.description: If your wildfire spirit is within 120 feet when you drop to 0 HP, you can drop the spirit to 0 HP instead: you regain half your HP and stand up immediately. Usable once per long rest.

class_features.name: Draconic Lore
class_features.description: Speak, read, and write Draconic. Add your proficiency bonus (or double it if already proficient) to Intelligence (History) checks related to draconic history/lore.

class_features.name: Dragon Shape
class_features.description: Expend a Wild Shape use to become a Medium dragon (keeping your own stats/senses) instead of a beast. AC = 13 + Dex modifier (max 2), speed 30 ft. walk/climb, gain temp HP equal to your HP max on transforming. Lasts hours equal to half your druid level; can't cast spells in this form. Grants a Bite attack (1d12 + Str or Wis modifier piercing, using Wisdom for the attack roll) and a Breath Weapon (action, 15-foot cone matching your chosen dragon type's damage, 2d6 damage, Dex save vs. spell save DC for half, 1/minute) whose cone size/damage improve at 6th (3d6, 20 ft), 10th (4d6, 25 ft), and 14th (5d6, 30 ft) level.

class_features.name: Improved Dragon Shape
class_features.description: In Dragon Shape, AC becomes 14 + Dex modifier (max 2), you gain a Claws attack (2d6 + Str or Wis modifier slashing) usable alongside Bite as two attacks on your Attack action, both counting as magical, and you gain or extend darkvision by 60 feet.

class_features.name: Draconic Magic
class_features.description: You can cast druid spells of 3rd level or lower (no material components) while in Dragon Shape. AC becomes 15 + Dex modifier (max 2), you gain resistance to your dragon type's damage, and a 30-foot flying speed.

class_features.name: Heart of a Dragon
class_features.description: Use your breath weapon even outside Dragon Shape (once per long rest). In Dragon Shape: AC becomes 16 + Dex modifier (max 2), flying speed increases to 40 feet, you can make three attacks (bite + two claws), and you can choose to become a Large dragon (bite reach becomes 10 feet).

class_features.name: Defile Ground
class_features.description: Corrupt a 10-foot-radius area within 60 feet for 1 minute (difficult terrain for hostile creatures, movable 30 feet as a bonus action, ignored by flying creatures). The first time each turn a creature in the area takes damage from an attack or spell, it takes an extra 1d4 necrotic damage (1d6 at 10th level, 1d8 at 14th level; radius increases to 20 feet at 10th level). Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Blighted Shape
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Charisma (Intimidation). While transformed by Wild Shape, gain +2 AC, and your beast form gains (or extends by) 60 feet of darkvision.

class_features.name: Call of the Shadowseeds
class_features.description: When a non-undead, non-construct creature takes damage within your Defile Ground area, use your reaction to summon a blighted sapling adjacent to it, directing it to attack as part of the same reaction; it then acts on your initiative. It lasts until destroyed, the end of your next long rest, or you summon another. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Foul Conjuration
class_features.description: Beasts, fey, or plants you summon or create (including your blighted sapling) gain immunity to necrotic/poison damage and the poisoned condition, and explode on death dealing necrotic damage to creatures within 5 feet (scaling with CR; Constitution save vs. your spell save DC for no damage) — you can also detonate one as an action to destroy it.

class_features.name: Incarnation of Corruption
class_features.description: Gain resistance to necrotic damage and a permanent +2 bonus to AC. While inside your Defile Ground's radius at the start of your turn, you can use a bonus action to gain temp HP equal to your proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Circle Spells (Hive)
class_features.description: Learn the swarm cantrip at 2nd level. Gain access to a fixed list of always-prepared bonus spells at 3rd (blur, web), 5th (fly, hypnotic pattern), 7th (arcane eye, giant insect), and 9th level (insect plague, mislead) that don't count against your prepared spell total.

class_features.name: Swarm Shape
class_features.description: Your Wild Shape can turn you into a swarm of creatures, following the normal Beast Shapes CR/speed limitations.

class_features.name: Symbiotic Biosphere
class_features.description: As a bonus action, activate your symbiotes for 1 minute. When a creature within 15 feet melee-attacks you on its turn, force a Constitution save vs. your spell save DC or deal 2d6 poison damage (half on success) as the swarm retaliates; the swarm can only retaliate once per round. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1) per long rest. Damage increases to 3d6 at 6th, 4d6 at 10th, 5d6 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Protect the Monarch
class_features.description: While Symbiotic Biosphere is active, when you take damage from a source you can see, use your reaction to reduce that damage by your Wisdom modifier plus half your druid level.

class_features.name: Honeydrenaline
class_features.description: As a bonus action, a willing creature within 30 feet regains HP equal to your druid level and can immediately use its reaction to move up to its speed without provoking opportunity attacks. Usable a number of times equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Swarmsense
class_features.description: Gain blindsight and tremorsense out to 10 feet, resistance to poison damage, immunity to the poisoned condition, and advantage on saves to maintain concentration and on initiative rolls.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: Choose one fighting style, gained permanently (can't pick the same one twice): Archery (+2 to ranged attack rolls), Defense (+1 AC while wearing armor), Dueling (+2 damage with a one-handed melee weapon when wielding no other weapon), Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice for two-handed/versatile melee weapons), Protection (reaction to impose disadvantage on an attack against an ally within 5 feet, requires a shield), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability modifier to the second attack's damage in two-weapon fighting).

class_features.name: Second Wind
class_features.description: Regain HP equal to 1d10 + your fighter level.

class_features.name: Action Surge (1 use)
class_features.description: Take one additional action on your turn.

class_features.name: Martial Archetype
class_features.description: Choose a martial archetype subclass, granting features at 3rd, 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: You can attack twice, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Indomitable (1 use)
class_features.description: Reroll a failed saving throw; you must use the new roll.

class_features.name: Extra Attack (2)
class_features.description: You can attack three times, instead of twice, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Indomitable (2 uses)
class_features.description: Reroll a failed saving throw; you must use the new roll. Usable twice between long rests.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Action Surge (2 uses)
class_features.description: Take one additional action on your turn. Usable twice between rests, but only once on the same turn.

class_features.name: Indomitable (3 uses)
class_features.description: Reroll a failed saving throw; you must use the new roll. Usable three times between long rests.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead if using the optional feats rule.

class_features.name: Extra Attack (3)
class_features.description: You can attack four times, instead of three, whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

class_features.name: Fighting Style: Blind Fighting
class_features.description: Optional Fighting Style choice. Gain blindsight out to 10 feet, letting you effectively see anything not behind total cover (including invisible creatures that haven't successfully hidden) within that range, even blinded or in darkness.

class_features.name: Fighting Style: Interception
class_features.description: Optional Fighting Style choice. When a creature you can see hits a target other than you within 5 feet of you, use your reaction to reduce that damage by 1d10 + your proficiency bonus (min 0). Requires wielding a shield or a simple/martial weapon.

class_features.name: Fighting Style: Superior Technique
class_features.description: Optional Fighting Style choice. Learn one Battle Master maneuver and gain one d6 superiority die (stacking with dice from another source) to fuel it; the maneuver's save DC is 8 + proficiency bonus + Str or Dex modifier. Regain the expended die on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Fighting Style: Thrown Weapon Fighting
class_features.description: Optional Fighting Style choice. Draw a thrown weapon as part of the attack using it, and gain a +2 bonus to the damage roll when you hit with a ranged attack using a thrown weapon.

class_features.name: Fighting Style: Unarmed Fighting
class_features.description: Optional Fighting Style choice. Unarmed strikes deal 1d6 + Strength modifier bludgeoning damage (1d8 if wielding no weapon or shield). At the start of each of your turns, you can deal 1d4 bludgeoning damage to one creature you're grappling.

class_features.name: Martial Versatility
class_features.description: Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you can instead swap one known fighting style for another, or swap one known Battle Master maneuver for a different one.

class_features.name: Arcane Archer Lore
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in either Arcana or Nature, and learn either the prestidigitation or druidcraft cantrip.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot
class_features.description: Once per turn, when you fire an arrow from a shortbow or longbow as part of the Attack action, apply one known Arcane Shot option to it (decided on a hit, unless the option has no attack roll). Know 2 options at 3rd level, gaining one more at 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level (options also improve at 18th level). Regain all uses on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Magic Arrow
class_features.description: Make a nonmagical arrow fired from a shortbow or longbow count as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity to nonmagical attacks, until immediately after it hits or misses.

class_features.name: Curving Shot
class_features.description: When you miss with a magic arrow attack roll, use a bonus action to reroll the attack against a different target within 60 feet of the original.

class_features.name: Ever-Ready Shot
class_features.description: If you roll initiative with no uses of Arcane Shot remaining, regain one use immediately.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Banishing Arrow
class_features.description: On a hit, target makes a Charisma save (vs. 8 + proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier) or is banished to the Feywild (speed 0, incapacitated) until the end of its next turn, then reappears. Deals an extra 2d6 force damage on hit at 18th level.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Beguiling Arrow
class_features.description: On a hit, deal an extra 2d6 (4d6 at 18th level) psychic damage; target must succeed on a Wisdom save or be charmed by an ally you choose within 30 feet until the start of your next turn (ends early if that ally attacks/damages/forces a save on the charmed target).

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Bursting Arrow
class_features.description: On a hit, the target and all creatures within 10 feet of it each take 2d6 (4d6 at 18th level) force damage.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Enfeebling Arrow
class_features.description: On a hit, deal an extra 2d6 (4d6 at 18th level) necrotic damage; target must succeed on a Constitution save or its weapon attack damage is halved until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Grasping Arrow
class_features.description: On a hit, deal an extra 2d6 (4d6 at 18th level) poison damage, reduce the target's speed by 10 feet, and it takes 2d6 (4d6 at 18th) slashing damage the first time each turn it moves 1+ feet without teleporting. Brambles last 1 minute or until removed (Strength (Athletics) check vs. your Arcane Shot save DC) or you use this option again.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Piercing Arrow
class_features.description: No attack roll; instead, fire a 1-foot-wide, 30-foot line ignoring cover and objects. Each creature in the line makes a Dexterity save, taking weapon damage plus an extra 1d6 (2d6 at 18th level) piercing damage on a failure, half on a success.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Seeking Arrow
class_features.description: No attack roll; instead, target a creature seen in the past minute. The arrow seeks it out (ignoring most cover) and forces a Dexterity save if a path exists; on a failure the target takes weapon damage plus an extra 1d6 (2d6 at 18th level) force damage and you learn its location, on a success it takes half damage and you don't.

class_features.name: Arcane Shot: Shadow Arrow
class_features.description: On a hit, deal an extra 2d6 (4d6 at 18th level) psychic damage; target must succeed on a Wisdom save or be unable to see anything beyond 5 feet until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Combat Superiority
class_features.description: Learn 3 maneuvers (each usable once per attack), gaining 2 more at 7th, 10th, and 15th level (can also swap one known maneuver each time). Have 4 d8 superiority dice (one more at 7th level, one more at 15th level), each expended on use and regained on a short or long rest. Maneuver save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Str or Dex modifier (your choice).

class_features.name: Student of War
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with one type of artisan's tools of your choice.

class_features.name: Ambush (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die: add it to a Dexterity (Stealth) check or an initiative roll (not while incapacitated).

class_features.name: Bait and Switch (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die: swap places with a willing, non-incapacitated creature within 5 feet (costing at least 5 feet of movement, no opportunity attacks), and you or that creature (your choice) gains a bonus to AC equal to a rolled die until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Brace (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die: when a creature you can see moves into your melee weapon's reach, use your reaction to make one attack with that weapon; on a hit, add the die to the damage roll.

class_features.name: Commander's Strike (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die: forgo one of your Attack-action attacks and use a bonus action to direct an ally who can see/hear you; that ally can immediately use its reaction to make one weapon attack, adding the die to its damage roll.

class_features.name: Commanding Presence (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die: add it to a Charisma (Intimidation), Charisma (Performance), or Charisma (Persuasion) check.

class_features.name: Disarming Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll, and the target makes a Strength save or drops an item of your choice it's holding.

class_features.name: Distracting Strike (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll; the next attack roll against the target by anyone other than you before the start of your next turn has advantage.

class_features.name: Evasive Footwork (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die while moving: add the rolled number to your AC until you stop moving.

class_features.name: Feinting Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die and a bonus action to feint against a creature within 5 feet: gain advantage on your next attack roll against it this turn, and add the die to the damage roll if it hits.

class_features.name: Goading Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll; the target makes a Wisdom save or has disadvantage on attacks against anyone but you until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Grappling Strike (maneuver)
class_features.description: Immediately after hitting with a melee attack, spend 1 superiority die and use a bonus action to attempt a grapple, adding the die to your Strength (Athletics) check.

class_features.name: Lunging Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a melee weapon attack: increase your reach by 5 feet for that attack, and add the die to the damage roll on a hit.

class_features.name: Maneuvering Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll; a friendly creature who can see/hear you can then use its reaction to move up to half its speed without provoking opportunity attacks from your target.

class_features.name: Menacing Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll; target makes a Wisdom save or is frightened of you until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Parry (maneuver)
class_features.description: When damaged by a melee attack, use your reaction and spend 1 superiority die to reduce that damage by the die roll plus your Dexterity modifier.

class_features.name: Precision Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die to add it to a weapon attack roll, before or after the roll but before effects are applied.

class_features.name: Pushing Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll; if the target is Large or smaller it makes a Strength save or is pushed up to 15 feet away.

class_features.name: Quick Toss (maneuver)
class_features.description: As a bonus action, spend 1 superiority die to draw and make a ranged attack with a thrown weapon; on a hit, add the die to the damage roll.

class_features.name: Rally (maneuver)
class_features.description: As a bonus action, spend 1 superiority die to bolster an ally who can see/hear you, granting it temp HP equal to the die roll plus your Charisma modifier.

class_features.name: Riposte (maneuver)
class_features.description: When a creature misses you with a melee attack, use your reaction and spend 1 superiority die to make a melee weapon attack against it; on a hit, add the die to the damage roll.

class_features.name: Sweeping Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a melee weapon attack hit: choose another creature within 5 feet of the original target and within your reach; if your original attack roll would have hit it too, it takes damage equal to the die roll (same damage type).

class_features.name: Tactical Assessment (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die: add it to an Intelligence (Investigation), Intelligence (History), or Wisdom (Insight) check.

class_features.name: Trip Attack (maneuver)
class_features.description: Spend 1 superiority die on a weapon attack hit: add it to the damage roll; if the target is Large or smaller it makes a Strength save or is knocked prone.

class_features.name: Know Your Enemy
class_features.description: After observing or interacting with a creature for at least 1 minute outside combat, learn (via the DM) whether it's your equal, superior, or inferior in two chosen traits among Strength, Dexterity, Constitution, AC, current HP, total class levels, and fighter class levels.

class_features.name: Improved Combat Superiority (d10)
class_features.description: Your superiority dice become d10s.

class_features.name: Relentless
class_features.description: If you roll initiative with no superiority dice remaining, regain one superiority die.

class_features.name: Improved Combat Superiority (d12)
class_features.description: Your superiority dice become d12s.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in one of Animal Handling, History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion, or learn one language of your choice.

class_features.name: Born to the Saddle
class_features.description: Advantage on saves to avoid falling off your mount; land on your feet (if not incapacitated) when falling 10 feet or less off a mount; mounting/dismounting costs only 5 feet of movement instead of half your speed.

class_features.name: Unwavering Mark
class_features.description: When you hit a creature with a melee attack, mark it until the end of your next turn (ends early if you're incapacitated/die or someone else marks it); while within 5 feet of you, the marked creature has disadvantage on attacks that don't target you. If a marked creature damages someone other than you, use a bonus action on your next turn to make a special melee attack against it with advantage, dealing extra damage equal to half your fighter level on a hit. Usable a number of times equal to your Strength modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Warding Maneuver
class_features.description: When you or a creature within 5 feet is hit by an attack, use your reaction (while wielding a melee weapon or shield) to roll 1d8 and add it to the target's AC against that attack; if it still hits, the target has resistance to that attack's damage. Usable a number of times equal to your Constitution modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Hold the Line
class_features.description: Creatures provoke an opportunity attack from you when they move 5+ feet while within your reach; if you hit a creature with an opportunity attack, its speed becomes 0 until the end of the current turn.

class_features.name: Ferocious Charger
class_features.description: If you move at least 10 feet in a straight line and then hit a creature with an attack, it makes a Strength save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Strength modifier) or is knocked prone. Usable once per turn.

class_features.name: Vigilant Defender
class_features.description: Gain a special reaction usable once on every creature's turn except your own (only to make an opportunity attack, and can't be used on the same turn as your normal reaction).

class_features.name: Improved Critical
class_features.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

class_features.name: Remarkable Athlete
class_features.description: Add half your proficiency bonus (round up) to any Strength, Dexterity, or Constitution check that doesn't already use your proficiency bonus. Running long jump distance increases by your Strength modifier.

class_features.name: Additional Fighting Style
class_features.description: Choose a second Fighting Style option.

class_features.name: Superior Critical
class_features.description: Your weapon attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 18-20.

class_features.name: Survivor
class_features.description: At the start of each of your turns, if you have no more than half your HP left (and aren't at 0), regain HP equal to 5 + your Constitution modifier.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast Intelligence-based wizard spells, focused on abjuration and evocation. Know 2 cantrips (3 at 10th level) and a growing number of 1st-level+ wizard spells (2 of your first 3 must be abjuration/evocation, and all spells learned afterward must be abjuration/evocation except those gained at 8th, 14th, and 20th level, which can be from any school). Cast known spells using spell slots from the Eldritch Knight Spellcasting table; spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier, spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier. On leveling up, can swap one known spell for another (same restriction).

class_features.name: Weapon Bond
class_features.description: Perform a 1-hour ritual (can be done during a short rest) to bond with a weapon; you can't be disarmed of a bonded weapon unless incapacitated, and can summon it to your hand as a bonus action if it's on the same plane. You can have up to two bonded weapons, but summon only one at a time; bonding a third breaks one of the existing bonds.

class_features.name: War Magic
class_features.description: When you use your action to cast a cantrip, you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Eldritch Strike
class_features.description: When you hit a creature with a weapon attack, it has disadvantage on the next saving throw it makes against a spell you cast before the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Arcane Charge
class_features.description: When you use Action Surge, you can teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, before or after the additional action.

class_features.name: Improved War Magic
class_features.description: When you use your action to cast any spell (not just a cantrip), you can make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Psionic Power
class_features.description: Gain Psionic Energy dice (d6s, increasing to d8 at 5th, d10 at 11th, d12 at 17th level) equal to twice your proficiency bonus, regained on a long rest (regain 1 as a bonus action, once per short/long rest). Powers: Protective Field (reaction, expend a die to reduce damage to you or a creature within 30 feet by the roll plus Intelligence modifier), Psionic Strike (once per turn after hitting with a weapon attack within 30 feet, expend a die to deal extra force damage equal to the roll plus Intelligence modifier), and Telekinetic Movement (action, move a Large or smaller object or willing creature up to 30 feet; usable once per short/long rest unless you expend a die to use it again).

class_features.name: Telekinetic Adept
class_features.description: Psi-Powered Leap: bonus action to gain a flying speed equal to twice your walking speed until end of turn, usable once per short/long rest (or again by expending a Psionic Energy die). Telekinetic Thrust: when your Psionic Strike damages a target, it makes a Strength save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Intelligence modifier) or you knock it prone or move it up to 10 feet.

class_features.name: Guarded Mind
class_features.description: Resistance to psychic damage. If you start your turn charmed or frightened, you can expend a Psionic Energy die to end those conditions on yourself.

class_features.name: Bulwark of Force
class_features.description: As a bonus action, grant half cover for 1 minute (or until incapacitated) to creatures (including yourself) within 30 feet, up to a number equal to your Intelligence modifier (min 1). Usable once per long rest unless you expend a Psionic Energy die to use it again.

class_features.name: Telekinetic Master
class_features.description: Cast telekinesis with no components, using Intelligence as your spellcasting ability; while concentrating on it (including the casting turn), make one weapon attack as a bonus action each turn. Usable once per long rest unless you expend a Psionic Energy die to cast it again.

class_features.name: Rallying Cry
class_features.description: When you use Second Wind, up to three allies within 60 feet who can see/hear you each regain HP equal to your fighter level.

class_features.name: Royal Envoy
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Persuasion (or another social skill of your choice if already proficient). Double your proficiency bonus for any Persuasion check, regardless of which skill you gained from this feature.

class_features.name: Inspiring Surge
class_features.description: When you use Action Surge, one ally within 60 feet who can see/hear you can make one melee or ranged weapon attack with its reaction (two allies starting at 18th level).

class_features.name: Bulwark
class_features.description: When you use Indomitable to reroll an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma save (and aren't incapacitated), an ally within 60 feet who also failed against the same effect and can see/hear you can also reroll its save and must use the new roll.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with smith's tools and learn to speak, read, and write Giant.

class_features.name: Rune Carver
class_features.description: Learn 2 runes (3 at 7th, 4 at 10th, 5 at 15th level; can swap one known rune for another each level). On a long rest, inscribe a different rune onto one object per rune known (a weapon, armor, shield, jewelry, or other wearable/holdable item; one rune per object), lasting until your next long rest.

class_features.name: Rune: Cloud Rune
class_features.description: While wearing/carrying the inscribed object: advantage on Dexterity (Sleight of Hand) and Charisma (Deception) checks. When you or a creature within 30 feet is hit by an attack roll, use your reaction to redirect the attack (same roll) to a different creature within 30 feet (not the attacker). Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Rune: Fire Rune
class_features.description: While wearing/carrying the inscribed object: double your proficiency bonus on tool-proficiency ability checks. When you hit with a weapon attack, invoke the rune to deal an extra 2d6 fire damage and force a Strength save or the target is restrained for 1 minute, taking 2d6 fire damage at the start of each of its turns (repeatable save to end early). Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Rune: Frost Rune
class_features.description: While wearing/carrying the inscribed object: advantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) and Charisma (Intimidation) checks. As a bonus action, invoke the rune for a +2 bonus to Strength/Constitution checks and saves for 10 minutes. Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Rune: Stone Rune
class_features.description: While wearing/carrying the inscribed object: advantage on Wisdom (Insight) checks, plus 120-foot darkvision. When a creature you can see ends its turn within 30 feet, use your reaction to force a Wisdom save or it's charmed for 1 minute (speed 0, incapacitated; repeatable save each turn). Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Rune: Hill Rune
class_features.description: Requires 7th level. While wearing/carrying the inscribed object: advantage on saves against poison and resistance to poison damage. As a bonus action, invoke the rune for resistance to bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage for 1 minute. Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Rune: Storm Rune
class_features.description: Requires 7th level. While wearing/carrying the inscribed object: advantage on Intelligence (Arcana) checks, and you can't be surprised unless incapacitated. As a bonus action, enter a prophetic state for 1 minute, letting you use your reaction to impose advantage or disadvantage on a roll made by you or a creature within 60 feet. Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Giant's Might
class_features.description: As a bonus action, become Large (if smaller) for 1 minute, gaining advantage on Strength checks/saves; once per turn, one weapon or unarmed attack deals an extra 1d6 damage on a hit (1d8 at 10th level, 1d10 at 18th level). Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Runic Shield
class_features.description: When a creature within 60 feet you can see is hit by an attack roll, use your reaction to force the attacker to reroll the d20 and use the new result. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Great Stature
class_features.description: Permanently grow in height (roll 3d4 inches). Giant's Might's extra damage increases to 1d8 (superseded by the level-10 bump noted in Giant's Might above).

class_features.name: Master of Runes
class_features.description: Each known rune can be invoked twice instead of once between rests; regain all expended rune uses on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Runic Juggernaut
class_features.description: Giant's Might's extra damage increases to 1d10; while using Giant's Might you can become Huge instead of Large, gaining 5 extra feet of reach.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in one of History, Insight, Performance, or Persuasion, or learn one language of your choice.

class_features.name: Fighting Spirit
class_features.description: As a bonus action, gain advantage on weapon attack rolls until the end of the current turn and gain 5 temp HP (10 at 10th level, 15 at 15th level). Usable three times per long rest.

class_features.name: Elegant Courtier
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to Charisma (Persuasion) checks. Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws (or Intelligence/Charisma saves, your choice, if already proficient in Wisdom saves).

class_features.name: Tireless Spirit
class_features.description: If you roll initiative with no uses of Fighting Spirit remaining, regain one use.

class_features.name: Rapid Strike
class_features.description: If you take the Attack action and have advantage on an attack roll against a target, you can forgo the advantage to make an additional weapon attack against that target as part of the same action. Usable once per turn.

class_features.name: Strength before Death
class_features.description: If damage reduces you to 0 HP without killing you outright, use your reaction to delay falling unconscious and immediately take an extra turn (interrupting the current turn); you still take death save failures from damage taken at 0 HP. You fall unconscious when the extra turn ends if still at 0 HP. Usable once per long rest.

class_features.name: Manifest Echo
class_features.description: Summon a translucent echo of yourself in an unoccupied space within 15 feet (AC 14 + proficiency bonus, 1 HP, immune to all conditions, uses your save bonus). It lasts until destroyed, dismissed, replaced, or you're incapacitated; you can move it 30 feet on your turn for free (destroyed if it ends your turn more than 30 feet from you). You can teleport-swap places with it as a bonus action (costs 15 feet of movement), make Attack-action attacks originate from either your or its space, and use your reaction to make an opportunity attack from its position when a creature within 5 feet of it moves away.

class_features.name: Unleash Incarnation
class_features.description: When you take the Attack action, make one additional melee attack from your echo's position. Usable a number of times equal to your Constitution modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Echo Avatar
class_features.description: See and hear through your echo's senses for up to 10 minutes (you're deafened and blinded meanwhile, ending at will with no action); while used this way the echo can be up to 1,000 feet away without being destroyed.

class_features.name: Shadow Martyr
class_features.description: Before an attack roll against another creature you can see resolves, use your reaction to teleport your echo into the line of fire (within 5 feet of the target); the attack is instead made against your echo. Usable once per short or long rest.

class_features.name: Reclaim Potential
class_features.description: When your echo is destroyed by damage, gain temp HP equal to 2d6 + your Constitution modifier, provided you don't already have temp HP. Usable a number of times equal to your Constitution modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Legion of One
class_features.description: Use a bonus action to manifest two coexisting echoes (creating a third destroys both existing ones); either echo can do anything a single echo could. When you roll initiative with no uses of Unleash Incarnation remaining, regain one use.

class_features.name: Firearm Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with firearms, adding your proficiency bonus to firearm attack rolls.

class_features.name: Gunsmith
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with tinker's tools, usable to craft ammunition at half cost, repair damaged firearms, or craft new ones (DM's discretion). Firearms use unique properties (Reload, Misfire, Explosive) instead of the DMG's optional firearm rules.

class_features.name: Adept Marksman
class_features.description: Learn 2 trick shots (one more at 7th, 10th, 15th, and 18th level; can swap one known trick shot each time). Gain grit points equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1), spent to fuel trick shots; regain 1 on a natural 20 firearm attack roll or a significant killing blow with a firearm, and regain all on a short or long rest. Trick shot save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Dexterity modifier.

class_features.name: Quickdraw
class_features.description: Add your proficiency bonus to initiative. You can stow one firearm and draw another as a single object interaction on your turn.

class_features.name: Rapid Repair
class_features.description: Spend a grit point as a bonus action to attempt to repair a misfired (but not broken) firearm.

class_features.name: Lightning Reload
class_features.description: Reload any firearm as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Vicious Intent
class_features.description: Firearm attacks score a critical hit on a roll of 19-20, and you regain a grit point on a natural 19 or 20 attack roll.

class_features.name: Hemorrhaging Critical
class_features.description: On a critical hit with a firearm, the target additionally takes half the attack's damage again at the end of its next turn.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Bullying Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point to gain advantage on a Charisma (Intimidation) check using your firearm's blast/sound to intimidate.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Dazing Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point on a firearm attack hit: normal damage, plus the target makes a Constitution save or has disadvantage on attacks until the end of its next turn.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Deadeye Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point to gain advantage on a firearm attack roll.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Disarming Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point on a firearm attack hit: normal damage, plus the target makes a Strength save or drops one held item of your choice, pushed 10 feet away.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Forceful Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point on a firearm attack hit: normal damage, plus the target makes a Strength save or is pushed 15 feet away.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Piercing Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point (raises the firearm's misfire score by 1 on the initial attack only) on a firearm attack hit: normal damage, then make disadvantaged attack rolls against every creature in a line behind the target within your first range increment.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Violent Shot
class_features.description: Expend one or more grit points (each raises the firearm's misfire score by 2) on a firearm attack hit to roll one extra weapon damage die per grit point spent.

class_features.name: Trick Shot: Winging Shot
class_features.description: Expend 1 grit point on a firearm attack hit against a moving target: normal damage, plus the target makes a Strength save or is knocked prone.

class_features.name: Launch
class_features.description: As a bonus action from solid ground, leap horizontally/vertically up to a combined 15 feet (30 feet at 7th level; doesn't provoke opportunity attacks; up to 30 feet of fall damage can be subtracted if you fall right after). If you make a melee attack immediately after using Launch, gain advantage on the roll and deal an extra 1d8 (1d10 at 10th, 1d12 at 18th level) damage of the weapon's type on a hit. Usable three times per short or long rest (four at 7th level, five at 15th level).

class_features.name: Nimble Lancer
class_features.description: Lances gain the versatile property for you while unmounted (1d8 one-handed/1d12 two-handed piercing); a lance attack made immediately after Launch counts as two-handed. Hitting a creature within 5 feet with a lance lets you move 5 feet away without provoking an opportunity attack (requires movement remaining).

class_features.name: Bird Caller
class_features.description: Advantage on Wisdom (Animal Handling) checks with flying beasts. Can cast animal messenger as a ritual, but only targeting a beast with an innate flying speed.

class_features.name: Steel Grace
class_features.description: No disadvantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks from wearing armor. On a Dexterity save, you can use Launch as a reaction: take no damage on a success, half on a failure.

class_features.name: Eagle Eye
class_features.description: Your Launch-attack scores a critical hit on a 19-20; hitting a flying creature with it also forces a Strength save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Strength modifier) or its speed becomes 0 until the start of its next turn. Gain Perception proficiency if you lack it, and double your proficiency bonus on sight-based Wisdom (Perception) checks.

class_features.name: Predatory Instinct
class_features.description: Advantage on initiative rolls. If you roll initiative with no uses of Launch remaining, regain one use.

class_features.name: Improved Launch
class_features.description: Hitting with a melee attack immediately after/during Launch also forces a Strength save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Strength modifier) or knocks the target prone. You can push Launch to a maximum 90-foot leap with no fall damage; doing so costs one level of exhaustion and can't be used again until a short or long rest, and can't be used at all with two or more levels of exhaustion.

class_features.name: Unarmored Defense
class_features.description: While wearing no armor and not wielding a shield, AC equals 10 + Dexterity modifier + Wisdom modifier.

class_features.name: Martial Arts
class_features.description: While unarmed or wielding only monk weapons (shortswords and simple melee weapons without two-handed/heavy properties) and not wearing armor or a shield: use Dexterity instead of Strength for attack/damage rolls; roll a martial arts die (d4, scaling up with level) in place of normal unarmed/monk weapon damage; and when taking the Attack action with an unarmed strike or monk weapon, make one unarmed strike as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Ki
class_features.description: Gain a pool of ki points (number scales with monk level) usable to fuel ki features. Points refresh on a short or long rest (must spend at least 30 minutes meditating). Ki save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier.

class_features.name: Flurry of Blows
class_features.description: Immediately after taking the Attack action, spend 1 ki point to make two unarmed strikes as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Patient Defense
class_features.description: Spend 1 ki point to take the Dodge action as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Step of the Wind
class_features.description: Spend 1 ki point to take the Disengage or Dash action as a bonus action; jump distance is doubled for the turn.

class_features.name: Unarmored Movement
class_features.description: Speed increases by 10 feet while not wearing armor or wielding a shield. Bonus increases at higher monk levels (15 ft at 6th, 20 ft at 10th, 25 ft at 14th, 30 ft at 18th). At 9th level, can move along vertical surfaces and across liquids without falling.

class_features.name: Deflect Missiles
class_features.description: When hit by a ranged weapon attack, reduce damage taken by 1d10 + Dexterity modifier + monk level. If reduced to 0, can catch the missile (if small enough) and spend 1 ki point to make a ranged attack with it as part of the same reaction (proficient, range 20/60).

class_features.name: Slow Fall
class_features.description: Reduce falling damage taken by an amount equal to 5 times monk level.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever taking the Attack action.

class_features.name: Stunning Strike
class_features.description: When hitting with a melee weapon attack, spend 1 ki point to force a Constitution save; on a failure the target is stunned until the end of the monk's next turn.

class_features.name: Ki-Empowered Strikes
class_features.description: Unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity to nonmagical attacks and damage.

class_features.name: Evasion
class_features.description: On a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on a success and half damage on a failure.

class_features.name: Stillness of Mind
class_features.description: End one effect on self causing charmed or frightened condition.

class_features.name: Purity of Body
class_features.description: Immune to disease and poison.

class_features.name: Tongue of the Sun and Moon
class_features.description: Understand all spoken languages; any creature that understands a language understands what you say.

class_features.name: Diamond Soul
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in all saving throws. On a failed save, may spend 1 ki point to reroll it.

class_features.name: Timeless Body
class_features.description: Suffer none of the frailty of old age and cannot be aged magically (can still die of old age); no longer need food or water.

class_features.name: Empty Body
class_features.description: Spend 4 ki points to become invisible for 1 minute with resistance to all damage but force; or spend 8 ki points to cast astral projection without material components (cannot bring other creatures).

class_features.name: Perfect Self
class_features.description: When rolling initiative with no ki points remaining, regain 4 ki points.

class_features.name: Dedicated Weapon
class_features.description: Optional feature. On finishing a short or long rest, designate one simple or martial weapon you're proficient with (lacking heavy/special properties) to count as a monk weapon until used again.

class_features.name: Ki-Fueled Attack
class_features.description: Optional feature. If you spend 1+ ki points as part of your action this turn, make one unarmed strike or monk weapon attack as a bonus action before the turn ends.

class_features.name: Quickened Healing
class_features.description: Optional feature. Spend 2 ki points and roll a Martial Arts die; regain hit points equal to the roll plus proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Focused Aim
class_features.description: Optional feature. On a missed attack roll, spend 1-3 ki points to increase the attack roll by 2 per point spent, potentially turning the miss into a hit.

class_features.name: Implements of Mercy
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Insight and Medicine and with the herbalism kit.

class_features.name: Hand of Healing
class_features.description: Spend 1 ki point to touch a creature and restore hit points equal to a roll of your Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier. Can replace one Flurry of Blows unarmed strike with this, without spending the ki point for the healing.

class_features.name: Hand of Harm
class_features.description: When hitting with an unarmed strike, spend 1 ki point to deal extra necrotic damage equal to a roll of your Martial Arts die + Wisdom modifier. Usable once per turn.

class_features.name: Physician's Touch
class_features.description: Hand of Healing can also end one disease or one condition (blinded, deafened, paralyzed, poisoned, stunned) on the target. Hand of Harm can instead inflict the poisoned condition until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Flurry of Healing and Harm
class_features.description: When using Flurry of Blows, can replace each unarmed strike with a use of Hand of Healing without spending ki, and can apply Hand of Harm free with one of the strikes (still once per turn).

class_features.name: Hand of Ultimate Mercy
class_features.description: Touch a corpse dead within 24 hours and expend 5 ki points to return it to life with 4d10 + Wisdom modifier hit points, removing blinded, deafened, paralyzed, poisoned, and stunned conditions present at death.

class_features.name: Shadow Arts
class_features.description: Spend 2 ki points to cast darkness, darkvision, pass without trace, or silence without material components. Also learn the minor illusion cantrip.

class_features.name: Shadow Step
class_features.description: While in dim light or darkness, teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space you can see that's also in dim light or darkness; gain advantage on the first melee attack before end of turn.

class_features.name: Cloak of Shadows
class_features.description: While in dim light or darkness, become invisible until you attack, cast a spell, or enter bright light.

class_features.name: Opportunist
class_features.description: Whenever a creature within 5 feet is hit by an attack from someone other than you, make a melee attack against that creature.

class_features.name: Draconic Disciple
class_features.description: Gain three benefits: reroll a failed Charisma (Intimidation/Persuasion) check once per long rest via reaction; change unarmed strike damage type to acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison; and learn to speak/read/write Draconic or another language.

class_features.name: Breath of the Dragon
class_features.description: Replace one attack of the Attack action with an elemental breath in a 20-foot cone or 30-foot line (5 ft wide); choose acid, cold, fire, lightning, or poison. Targets make a Dexterity save against your ki save DC, taking damage equal to two rolls of your Martial Arts die (three at 11th level) on a failure, half on success. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest; can spend 2 ki points to use again when out of uses.

class_features.name: Wings Unfurled
class_features.description: When using Step of the Wind, can unfurl spectral wings granting a flying speed equal to walking speed until end of turn. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Aspect of the Wyrm
class_features.description: Create a 10-foot aura for 1 minute granting either Frightful Presence (bonus action to frighten a creature within the aura on a failed Wisdom save against ki save DC) or Resistance (you and allies in the aura resist a chosen damage type: acid, cold, fire, lightning, poison). Can spend 3 ki points to use again after the daily use is spent.

class_features.name: Ascendant Aspect
class_features.description: Augment Breath of the Dragon by spending 1 ki point to expand it to a 60-foot cone/90-foot line dealing four die rolls of damage. Gain blindsight to 10 feet. Activating Aspect of the Wyrm lets you force any number of seen creatures in the aura to make a Dexterity save against ki save DC or take 3d10 damage of a chosen elemental type.

class_features.name: Arms of the Astral Self
class_features.description: Spend 1 ki point to summon spectral arms for 10 minutes (vanish early if incapacitated or killed); each creature within 10 feet you choose makes a Dexterity save or takes force damage equal to two rolls of your Martial Arts die. While active: use Wisdom instead of Strength for Strength checks/saves; make unarmed strikes with the arms at 5 feet extra reach, using Wisdom for attack/damage rolls, dealing force damage.

class_features.name: Visage of the Astral Self
class_features.description: Spend 1 ki point to summon a spectral visage for 10 minutes, granting darkvision to 120 feet, advantage on Wisdom (Insight) and Charisma (Intimidation) checks, and the ability to direct speech to one chosen creature within 60 feet or amplify your voice to 600 feet.

class_features.name: Body of the Astral Self
class_features.description: When both astral arms and visage are summoned, a spectral body also appears (no action). Grants: reaction to reduce acid/cold/fire/force/lightning/thunder damage taken by 1d10 + Wisdom modifier (min 1); and once per turn, deal extra Martial Arts die damage when hitting with the astral arms.

class_features.name: Awakened Astral Self
class_features.description: Spend 5 ki points to summon arms, visage, and body together for 10 minutes, gaining +2 AC and the ability to make three attacks with the astral arms instead of two when using Extra Attack.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Performance and with brewer's supplies.

class_features.name: Drunken Technique
class_features.description: Whenever you use Flurry of Blows, gain the benefit of the Disengage action and your walking speed increases by 10 feet until end of turn.

class_features.name: Tipsy Sway
class_features.description: Stand up from prone by spending only 5 feet of movement. Also, when a creature misses you with a melee attack, spend 1 ki point as a reaction to redirect that attack to hit another creature within 5 feet (not the attacker).

class_features.name: Drunkard's Luck
class_features.description: When you have disadvantage on an ability check, attack roll, or saving throw, spend 2 ki points to cancel the disadvantage for that roll.

class_features.name: Intoxicated Frenzy
class_features.description: When using Flurry of Blows, can make up to three additional attacks (up to five total Flurry attacks), provided each targets a different creature.

class_features.name: Disciple of the Elements
class_features.description: Learn the Elemental Attunement discipline plus one other elemental discipline; learn one additional discipline at 6th, 11th, and 17th level (can swap a known discipline whenever a new one is learned). Spells cast via disciplines use ki points instead of slots; from 5th level, extra ki points can be spent to upcast such a spell, capped by a max-ki-per-spell table tied to monk level (3 at 5-8, 4 at 9-12, 5 at 13-16, 6 at 17-20).

class_features.name: Elemental Attunement
class_features.description: Control elemental forces within 30 feet to create a harmless sensory effect, light/snuff a small flame, warm or chill up to 1 lb of material for an hour, or shape a 1-foot cube of earth/fire/water/mist into a crude form for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Fangs of the Fire Snake
class_features.description: Elemental discipline. On the Attack action, spend 1 ki point to extend unarmed strike reach by 10 feet for the turn; hits deal fire damage instead of bludgeoning, and spending 1 more ki point on a hit adds 1d10 fire damage.

class_features.name: Fist of Unbroken Air
class_features.description: Elemental discipline. Spend 2 ki points; target within 30 feet makes a Strength save or takes 3d10 bludgeoning damage (plus 1d10 per extra ki point spent) and is pushed 20 feet and knocked prone; half damage and no push/prone on a success.

class_features.name: Water Whip
