class_features.description: Elemental discipline. Spend 2 ki points; target within 30 feet makes a Dexterity save or takes 3d10 bludgeoning damage (plus 1d10 per extra ki point spent) and is knocked prone or pulled 25 feet closer; half damage and no effect on a success.

class_features.name: Shape the Flowing River
class_features.description: Elemental discipline. Spend 1 ki point to reshape up to a 30-foot area of ice/water within 120 feet: change water to ice or vice versa and reshape ice (raise/lower elevation, dig a trench, erect a wall, etc., up to half the area's largest dimension); can't trap or damage a creature this way.

class_features.name: Sweeping Cinder Strike
class_features.description: Elemental discipline. Spend 2 ki points to cast burning hands.

class_features.name: Rush of the Gale Spirits
class_features.description: Elemental discipline. Spend 2 ki points to cast gust of wind.

class_features.name: Clench of the North Wind
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 6th level). Spend 3 ki points to cast hold person.

class_features.name: Gong of the Summit
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 6th level). Spend 3 ki points to cast shatter.

class_features.name: Flames of the Phoenix
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 11th level). Spend 4 ki points to cast fireball.

class_features.name: Mist Stance
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 11th level). Spend 4 ki points to cast gaseous form on self.

class_features.name: Ride the Wind
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 11th level). Spend 4 ki points to cast fly on self.

class_features.name: Breath of Winter
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 17th level). Spend 6 ki points to cast cone of cold.

class_features.name: Eternal Mountain Defense
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 17th level). Spend 5 ki points to cast stoneskin on self.

class_features.name: River of Hungry Flame
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 17th level). Spend 5 ki points to cast wall of fire.

class_features.name: Wave of Rolling Earth
class_features.description: Elemental discipline (requires 17th level). Spend 6 ki points to cast wall of stone.

class_features.name: Path of the Kensei
class_features.description: Choose two kensei weapons (one melee, one ranged; any simple/martial weapon lacking heavy/special properties, longbow allowed); gain proficiency and they count as monk weapons. Choose another kensei weapon at 6th, 11th, and 17th level. Grants Agile Parry (+2 AC until your next turn when making an unarmed strike as part of Attack action while holding a melee kensei weapon) and Kensei's Shot (bonus action: ranged kensei weapon hits deal +1d4 damage of the weapon's type until end of turn). Also grants proficiency with calligrapher's or painter's supplies.

class_features.name: One with the Blade
class_features.description: Kensei weapon attacks count as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity. Once per turn when hitting with a kensei weapon, spend 1 ki point for extra damage equal to your Martial Arts die.

class_features.name: Sharpen the Blade
class_features.description: Spend up to 3 ki points to grant one touched kensei weapon a bonus to attack and damage rolls equal to points spent, for 1 minute or until used again. No effect on a magic weapon that already has such a bonus.

class_features.name: Unerring Accuracy
class_features.description: Once per turn, reroll a missed attack roll made with a monk weapon.

class_features.name: Touch of Death
class_features.description: When reducing a creature within 5 feet to 0 hit points, gain temporary hit points equal to Wisdom modifier + monk level (minimum 1).

class_features.name: Hour of Reaping
class_features.description: Each creature within 30 feet that can see you must succeed on a Wisdom save or be frightened of you until end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Mastery of Death
class_features.description: When reduced to 0 hit points, can expend 1 ki point (no action) to have 1 hit point instead.

class_features.name: Touch of the Long Death
class_features.description: Touch a creature within 5 feet and expend 1-10 ki points; target makes a Constitution save, taking 2d10 necrotic damage per ki point spent on a failure, half on success.

class_features.name: Open Hand Technique
class_features.description: Whenever you hit with a Flurry of Blows attack, impose one of: target makes a Dexterity save or is knocked prone; target makes a Strength save or is pushed up to 15 feet; or target can't take reactions until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Wholeness of Body
class_features.description: Regain hit points equal to three times your monk level.

class_features.name: Tranquility
class_features.description: At the end of a long rest, gain the effect of a sanctuary spell (DC 8 + Wisdom modifier + proficiency bonus) lasting until your next long rest or until it ends early as normal.

class_features.name: Quivering Palm
class_features.description: When hitting with an unarmed strike, spend 3 ki points to set up lethal vibrations lasting a number of days equal to monk level. Using an action later to trigger them forces a Constitution save: failure reduces the target to 0 hit points, success deals 10d10 necrotic damage. Only one creature can be affected at a time.

class_features.name: Radiant Sun Bolt
class_features.description: Gain a ranged spell attack (30 ft range, Dexterity-based) dealing radiant damage using your Martial Arts die, usable as part of the Attack action. Spend 1 ki point to make the attack twice as a bonus action. Once Extra Attack is gained, this attack can be used for any attack made as part of the Attack action.

class_features.name: Searing Arc Strike
class_features.description: Immediately after the Attack action, spend 2 ki points to cast burning hands as a bonus action; can spend additional ki points to cast it at a higher level, up to a max of half your monk level total points spent.

class_features.name: Searing Sunburst
class_features.description: Create a 20-foot-radius sphere of radiant light at a point within 150 feet; each creature in it makes a Constitution save or takes 2d6 radiant damage (no save needed behind total cover). Spend up to 3 additional ki points to increase damage by 2d6 each.

class_features.name: Sun Shield
class_features.description: Shed bright light (30 ft) and dim light (additional 30 ft), togglable as a bonus action. While shining, when hit by a melee attack, use your reaction to deal radiant damage to the attacker equal to 5 + Wisdom modifier.

class_features.name: Spirit Strike
class_features.description: Unarmed strikes can instead be made as a melee spell attack (proficient, 30 ft reach, Wisdom modifier for attack/damage), dealing force damage using your Martial Arts die. At 6th level, Stunning Strike can be applied to a Spirit Strike hit.

class_features.name: Spirit Hand
class_features.description: Learn the mage hand cantrip, castable and controllable as a bonus action with no verbal/somatic components; the hand appears as a spectral copy of your own.

class_features.name: Spectral Guide
class_features.description: Immune to possession by ghosts/undead. Spend 2 ki points to cast gentle repose or see invisibility without material components; also learn spare the dying. Gain Dismiss Undead: when hitting an undead with a Flurry of Blows attack, force a Wisdom save against ki save DC (auto-success above a CR threshold scaling with monk level) or destroy/lay it to rest.

class_features.name: Ghost Walker
class_features.description: Spend 1 ki point (bonus action) to turn invisible until end of next turn or until attacking/casting; spending an extra ki point during Step of the Wind also lets you move through hostile creatures/thin objects while invisible. Also gain Phase: reaction to reduce attack damage taken by an amount equal to monk level, usable a number of times equal to Wisdom modifier (min 1) per long rest.

class_features.name: Sight Beyond Sight
class_features.description: Gain truesight and telepathy out to 60 feet. Can use an action to cast etherealness (lasting 1 minute), usable once per long rest.

class_features.name: Extract Aspects
class_features.description: When hitting a creature with a Flurry of Blows attack, analyze it: learn its damage vulnerabilities, resistances, immunities, and condition immunities, and gain a reaction to make an unarmed strike against it whenever it misses you (lasts until next short or long rest).

class_features.name: Extort Truth
class_features.description: When hitting with an unarmed strike, spend 1 ki point to force a Charisma save; on a failure the creature can't speak a deliberate lie and is targeted with advantage on Charisma checks for up to 10 minutes (can attack to deal no damage just to apply the effect).

class_features.name: Mystical Erudition
class_features.description: Learn one language and gain proficiency in one of Arcana/History/Investigation/Nature/Religion (or double proficiency bonus for an already-proficient skill on that list). Gain an additional language and skill choice (or double bonus) at 11th and 17th level.

class_features.name: Mind of Mercury
class_features.description: Once per turn, if you've already used your reaction, spend 1 ki point to take an additional reaction (still only one reaction per triggering effect).

class_features.name: Debilitating Barrage
class_features.description: When hitting with an unarmed strike, spend 3 ki points to give the creature vulnerability to a chosen damage type for 1 minute (or suppress existing resistance to it instead); no effect on immunity. A creature can't be affected again for 24 hours.

class_features.name: Divine Sense
class_features.description: Detect the location of any celestial, fiend, or undead within 60 feet (not behind total cover) until the end of your next turn, learning its type but not identity. Also detects consecrated/desecrated places or objects. Usable a number of times equal to 1 + Charisma modifier per long rest.

class_features.name: Lay on Hands
class_features.description: Pool of healing power equal to paladin level x 5 hit points, replenished on a long rest. As an action, touch a creature to restore hit points from the pool, or expend 5 hit points to cure one disease or neutralize one poison (can do both, paying separately, multiple times). No effect on undead or constructs.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: Choose a fighting style: Defense (+1 AC while wearing armor), Dueling (+2 damage with a one-handed melee weapon when wielding no other weapon), Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s and 2s on damage dice with a two-handed/versatile melee weapon), or Protection (reaction to impose disadvantage on an attack against another creature within 5 feet, requires a shield).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast paladin spells using Charisma. Prepare a number of spells equal to Charisma modifier + half paladin level (rounded down, min 1) chosen from the paladin spell list; spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Charisma modifier. Spell slots regain on a long rest. Can use a holy symbol as a spellcasting focus.

class_features.name: Divine Smite
class_features.description: When hitting with a melee weapon attack, expend a spell slot to deal extra radiant damage: 2d8 for a 1st-level slot plus 1d8 per slot level above 1st, to a max of 5d8 (+1d8, max 6d8, if the target is undead or a fiend).

class_features.name: Divine Health
class_features.description: Immune to disease.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever taking the Attack action.

class_features.name: Aura of Protection
class_features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) gain a bonus to saving throws equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum +1). Requires you to be conscious.

class_features.name: Aura of Courage
class_features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) can't be frightened while you're conscious.

class_features.name: Improved Divine Smite
class_features.description: All melee weapon hits deal an extra 1d8 radiant damage.

class_features.name: Cleansing Touch
class_features.description: End one spell on yourself or a willing creature you touch. Usable a number of times equal to Charisma modifier (minimum once) per long rest.

class_features.name: Harness Divine Power
class_features.description: Optional feature. Expend a use of Channel Divinity to touch your holy symbol and regain an expended spell slot of level no higher than half your proficiency bonus (rounded up). Usable once at 3rd level, twice at 7th, thrice at 15th, per long rest.

class_features.name: Martial Versatility
class_features.description: Optional feature. Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you can replace a known fighting style with another available paladin fighting style.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Conquering Presence
class_features.description: Force each chosen creature within 30 feet to make a Wisdom save or become frightened of you for 1 minute (repeatable save at end of each of its turns).

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Guided Strike
class_features.description: Gain a +10 bonus to an attack roll, chosen after seeing the roll but before the DM announces hit or miss.

class_features.name: Aura of Conquest
class_features.description: While not incapacitated, emanate a 10-foot (30 feet at 18th level) aura: frightened creatures within it have their speed reduced to 0 and take psychic damage equal to half your paladin level if they start their turn there.

class_features.name: Scornful Rebuke
class_features.description: Whenever a creature hits you with an attack, it takes psychic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1), provided you're not incapacitated.

class_features.name: Invincible Conqueror
class_features.description: For 1 minute, gain resistance to all damage, one additional attack when taking the Attack action, and melee weapon attacks score a critical hit on 19-20.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Sacred Weapon
class_features.description: Imbue a held weapon with positive energy for 1 minute: add Charisma modifier (min +1) to attack rolls with it, it sheds light (20 ft bright/20 ft dim), and becomes magical if it wasn't already.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Unholy
class_features.description: Each fiend or undead within 30 feet that can see/hear you makes a Wisdom save or is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage (must flee from you, can't approach within 30 feet, can't take reactions).

class_features.name: Aura of Devotion
class_features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) can't be charmed while you're conscious.

class_features.name: Purity of Spirit
class_features.description: Always under the effect of a protection from evil and good spell.

class_features.name: Holy Nimbus
class_features.description: For 1 minute, shine bright light (30 ft) and dim light (additional 30 ft); enemies starting their turn in the bright light take 10 radiant damage; gain advantage on saves against fiend/undead spells.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Peerless Athlete
class_features.description: For 10 minutes, gain advantage on Strength (Athletics) and Dexterity (Acrobatics) checks, carry/push/drag/lift twice as much weight, and add 10 feet to long/high jump distance.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Inspiring Smite
class_features.description: Immediately after dealing Divine Smite damage, distribute 2d8 + paladin level temporary hit points among creatures within 30 feet (including yourself).

class_features.name: Aura of Alacrity
class_features.description: Your walking speed increases by 10 feet. Allies who start their turn within 5 feet (10 feet at 18th level) of you, while you're not incapacitated, gain +10 feet walking speed until end of that turn.

class_features.name: Glorious Defense
class_features.description: When you or a creature within 10 feet you can see is hit by an attack, grant a bonus to its AC equal to your Charisma modifier (min +1) against that attack, possibly causing a miss; if it misses, make one weapon attack against the attacker if in range. Usable a number of times equal to Charisma modifier (minimum once) per long rest.

class_features.name: Living Legend
class_features.description: For 1 minute: advantage on all Charisma checks; once per turn, turn a missed weapon attack into a hit; reroll a failed saving throw once via reaction. Usable again before a long rest by expending a 5th-level spell slot.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Emissary of Peace
class_features.description: Grant yourself a +5 bonus to Charisma (Persuasion) checks for 10 minutes.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Rebuke the Violent
class_features.description: Immediately after an attacker within 30 feet damages a creature other than you, force a Wisdom save on the attacker; on a failure it takes radiant damage equal to the damage it just dealt, half on a success.

class_features.name: Aura of the Guardian
class_features.description: When a creature within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) takes damage, magically take that damage yourself instead (no other effects transfer, and the damage to you can't be reduced).

class_features.name: Protective Spirit
class_features.description: Regain 1d6 + half your paladin level hit points if you end your turn in combat below half hit points and aren't incapacitated.

class_features.name: Emissary of Redemption
class_features.description: Resistance to all damage from other creatures; whenever a creature hits you with an attack, it takes radiant damage equal to half the damage you take. Both benefits stop working against a creature you attack/damage/target with a spell, until your next long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Nature's Wrath
class_features.description: Spectral vines reach for a creature within 10 feet; it makes a Strength or Dexterity save (its choice) or is restrained, repeating the save at the end of each of its turns to escape.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Faithless
class_features.description: Each fey or fiend within 30 feet that can hear you makes a Wisdom save or is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage; reveals a disguised true form while turned.

class_features.name: Aura of Warding
class_features.description: You and friendly creatures within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) have resistance to damage from spells.

class_features.name: Undying Sentinel
class_features.description: When reduced to 0 hit points and not killed outright, can choose to drop to 1 hit point instead. Also suffer none of the drawbacks of old age and can't be aged magically.

class_features.name: Elder Champion
class_features.description: For 1 minute: regain 10 hit points at the start of each turn; cast paladin spells with a 1-action casting time as a bonus action instead; enemies within 10 feet have disadvantage on saves against your paladin spells and Channel Divinity options.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Champion Challenge
class_features.description: Each chosen creature within 30 feet makes a Wisdom save or can't willingly move more than 30 feet away from you until you're incapacitated, die, or it moves more than 30 feet away.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Turn the Tide
class_features.description: Each chosen creature that can hear you within 30 feet and at or below half hit points regains 1d6 + Charisma modifier (minimum 1) hit points.

class_features.name: Divine Allegiance
class_features.description: When a creature within 5 feet takes damage, magically take that damage yourself instead (can't be reduced or prevented).

class_features.name: Unyielding Spirit
class_features.description: Advantage on saving throws to avoid being paralyzed or stunned.

class_features.name: Exalted Champion
class_features.description: For 1 hour: resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage; allies within 30 feet have advantage on death saves; you and allies within 30 feet have advantage on Wisdom saves. Ends early if incapacitated or killed.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Watcher's Will
class_features.description: Choose a number of creatures within 30 feet (including yourself) up to your Charisma modifier (min 1); for 1 minute they have advantage on Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma saving throws.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Abjure the Extraplanar
class_features.description: Each aberration, celestial, elemental, fey, or fiend within 30 feet that can hear you makes a Wisdom save or is turned for 1 minute or until it takes damage.

class_features.name: Aura of the Sentinel
class_features.description: While not incapacitated, you and chosen creatures within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) gain a bonus to initiative equal to your proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Vigilant Rebuke
class_features.description: Whenever you or a creature within 30 feet succeeds on an Intelligence, Wisdom, or Charisma save, deal 2d8 + Charisma modifier force damage to the creature that forced the save.

class_features.name: Mortal Bulwark
class_features.description: For 1 minute: gain truesight to 120 feet; advantage on attacks against aberrations/celestials/elementals/fey/fiends; on hit and damage, force a Charisma save against your spell save DC or banish the creature to its native plane (immune to further banishment by this feature for 24 hours on success). Usable again before a long rest by expending a 5th-level spell slot.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Abjure Enemy
class_features.description: One creature within 60 feet makes a Wisdom save (disadvantage if a fiend or undead; immune creatures unaffected). On a failure, frightened for 1 minute or until damaged, with speed 0 and unable to benefit from speed bonuses; on a success, speed halved for 1 minute or until damaged.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Vow of Enmity
class_features.description: Gain advantage on attack rolls against one chosen creature within 10 feet for 1 minute or until it drops to 0 hit points or falls unconscious.

class_features.name: Relentless Avenger
class_features.description: When you hit with an opportunity attack, move up to half your speed immediately after as part of the same reaction, without provoking opportunity attacks.

class_features.name: Soul of Vengeance
class_features.description: When a creature under your Vow of Enmity attacks, use your reaction to make a melee weapon attack against it if within range.

class_features.name: Avenging Angel
class_features.description: For 1 hour: gain a 60-foot flying speed via wings; emanate a 30-foot aura that frightens enemies entering it or starting their turn there on a failed Wisdom save (lasting 1 minute or until damaged); attacks against frightened creatures have advantage.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Control Undead
class_features.description: Target one undead creature within 30 feet; it makes a Wisdom save or must obey your commands for 24 hours or until you use this again. An undead of CR equal to or greater than your level is immune.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Dreadful Aspect
class_features.description: Each chosen creature within 30 feet that can see you makes a Wisdom save or is frightened of you for 1 minute (can retry the save if it ends its turn more than 30 feet away).

class_features.name: Aura of Hate
class_features.description: You and fiends/undead within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) gain a bonus to melee weapon damage rolls equal to your Charisma modifier (min +1). A creature benefits from only one paladin's aura at a time.

class_features.name: Supernatural Resistance
class_features.description: Resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning, piercing, and slashing damage.

class_features.name: Dread Lord
class_features.description: For 1 minute, create a 30-foot aura of gloom (dims bright light): frightened enemies starting their turn there take 4d10 psychic damage; chosen creatures in the aura gain attack-roll disadvantage against them from sight-reliant attackers. As a bonus action, make a melee spell attack with the shadows dealing 3d10 + Charisma modifier necrotic damage on a hit.

class_features.name: Oath Tools
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with cook's utensils.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Vow of Sustenance
class_features.description: Ward one creature within 60 feet; it gains temporary hit points equal to twice your Charisma modifier (min 2) immediately and at the start of each of its turns for the next minute.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Share Vitality
class_features.description: Take necrotic damage up to your current hit points (can't be reduced); up to four creatures within 30 feet regain hit points equal to half the damage taken.

class_features.name: Aura of Rejuvenation
class_features.description: A chosen creature within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) that regains hit points from a spell, potion, magic effect, or food regains an additional 1d6 hit points; a creature spending Hit Dice during a short rest within range regains 1 extra hit point per die spent.

class_features.name: Host of Heroes
class_features.description: Over 1 hour (can be done during a short rest), spend 25 gp rare spices and 25 gp diamond dust to prepare a feast for up to 10 creatures. For 8 hours after eating, each gains advantage on Constitution saves, resistance to poison damage, immunity to frightened, and 2d10 temporary hit points.

class_features.name: Avatar of Nourishment
class_features.description: For 1 minute: each turn, chosen creatures within 30 feet (including you) regain hit points and gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1); can cast revivify as a bonus action without a slot or it being prepared (material components still required); reaction to grant a damaged creature within 30 feet resistance to that damage. Usable again before a long rest by expending a 5th-level spell slot.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Marine Layer
class_features.description: Create a 20-foot fog cloud centered on and moving with you, heavily obscuring its area (lightly obscured within 5 feet of you) for 10 minutes; spreads around corners and persists until you end it (no action).

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Fury of the Tides
class_features.description: For 1 minute, once per turn when you hit with a weapon attack, push the target 10 feet away; if it hits an obstacle or creature, it takes bludgeoning damage equal to your Charisma modifier.

class_features.name: Aura of Liberation
class_features.description: While not incapacitated, you and chosen creatures within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) can't be grappled or restrained and ignore underwater movement/attack penalties; already-grappled/restrained creatures entering the aura can spend 5 feet of movement to auto-escape (unless magically bound).

class_features.name: Stormy Waters
class_features.description: When a creature moves into or out of your reach, it takes 1d12 bludgeoning damage and makes a Strength save against your spell save DC or is knocked prone.

class_features.name: Mythic Swashbuckler
class_features.description: For 1 minute: advantage on Strength (Athletics) checks and gain/double a climbing speed equal to walking speed; advantage on attacks when alone in melee with a target; Dash or Disengage as a bonus action; advantage on Dexterity checks and saves against seen effects.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Absorb Magic
class_features.description: Interrupt a creature within 30 feet casting a spell of level no higher than 1 + (paladin level / 3, rounded up), max 6th level; the spell fails and you gain temporary hit points equal to your Charisma modifier plus 5 times the spell's level.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity: Expeditious Command
class_features.description: Choose creatures within 30 feet up to your Charisma modifier (min 1); until the start of your next turn they can use a bonus action to Dash or Disengage. You can also take Dash or Disengage as part of using this.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiency
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in the Arcana skill.

class_features.name: Aura of Disruption
class_features.description: A hostile creature concentrating on a spell that ends its turn within 10 feet (30 feet at 18th level) makes a Constitution save against your spell save DC or loses concentration. You and friendly creatures in range can't be perceived through magical scrying sensors.

class_features.name: Armored Focus
class_features.description: Concentration on a paladin spell can't be broken by taking damage.

class_features.name: Arcane Conduit
class_features.description: For 1 minute, emanate a 30-foot field: resistance to spell damage and advantage on saves against spells; melee attackers against you take force damage equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1); whenever you expend a spell slot, friendly creatures in the field regain hit points equal to your Charisma modifier (min 1) while hostile ones take that much force damage.

class_features.name: Favored Enemy
class_features.description: Choose a favored enemy type (or two humanoid races); gain advantage on Wisdom (Survival) checks to track them and Intelligence checks to recall information about them, plus learn one language they speak. Choose an additional favored enemy and language at 6th and 14th level.

class_features.name: Natural Explorer
class_features.description: Choose a favored terrain type; double your proficiency bonus on related Intelligence/Wisdom checks you're proficient in. While traveling an hour or more in it: ignore difficult terrain, can't get lost except by magic, stay alert while doing another activity, move stealthily at normal pace alone, forage double food, and learn extra tracking detail. Choose an additional favored terrain at 6th and 10th level.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: Choose a fighting style: Archery (+2 to ranged weapon attack rolls), Defense (+1 AC while wearing armor), Dueling (+2 damage with a one-handed melee weapon when wielding no other weapon), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability modifier to the second attack's damage in two-weapon fighting).

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast ranger spells using Wisdom. Know two 1st-level spells at 2nd level, learning more per the Spells Known table; spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Wisdom modifier. Spell slots regain on a long rest. Can use a druidic focus as a spellcasting focus.

class_features.name: Primeval Awareness
class_features.description: Expend a ranger spell slot to sense whether aberrations, celestials, dragons, elementals, fey, fiends, or undead are present within 1 mile (6 miles in favored terrain) for 1 minute per slot level expended (doesn't reveal location or number).

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice, instead of once, whenever taking the Attack action.

class_features.name: Land's Stride
class_features.description: Moving through nonmagical difficult terrain costs no extra movement; pass through nonmagical thorny/hazardous plants without being slowed or damaged. Advantage on saves against magically created/manipulated plants that impede movement.

class_features.name: Hide in Plain Sight
class_features.description: Spend 1 minute creating camouflage from natural materials; while pressed against a same-sized-or-larger solid surface and motionless/actionless, gain +10 to Dexterity (Stealth) checks. Must recamouflage after moving or acting.

class_features.name: Vanish
class_features.description: Use the Hide action as a bonus action. Can't be tracked by nonmagical means unless you choose to leave a trail.

class_features.name: Feral Senses
class_features.description: Attacking a creature you can't see no longer imposes disadvantage on the attack roll. Aware of the location of any invisible creature within 30 feet that isn't hidden, provided you aren't blinded or deafened.

class_features.name: Foe Slayer
class_features.description: Once per turn, add your Wisdom modifier to the attack roll or damage roll of an attack against a favored enemy, chosen before or after the roll but before effects are applied.

class_features.name: Deft Explorer
class_features.description: Optional feature replacing Natural Explorer. Grants Canny (double proficiency bonus on one chosen skill check, plus two extra languages) at 1st level; Roving (+5 walking speed, gain climbing and swimming speed equal to walking speed) at 6th level; and Tireless (action to grant temporary hit points equal to 1d8 + Wisdom modifier, usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest; also reduce exhaustion by 1 on finishing a short rest) at 10th level.

class_features.name: Favored Foe
class_features.description: Optional feature replacing Favored Enemy. When you hit a creature, mark it as your favored enemy for 1 minute or until concentration breaks; the first hit each turn deals an extra 1d4 damage (1d6 at 6th level, 1d8 at 14th level). Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Martial Versatility
class_features.description: Optional feature. Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you can replace a known fighting style with another available ranger fighting style.

class_features.name: Primal Awareness
class_features.description: Optional feature replacing Primeval Awareness. Learn speak with animals (3rd), beast sense (5th), speak with plants (9th), locate creature (13th), and commune with nature (17th); each can be cast once without a slot, regained on a long rest.

class_features.name: Nature's Veil
class_features.description: Optional feature replacing Hide in Plain Sight. Magically turn invisible, along with worn/carried equipment, until the start of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Ranger's Companion
class_features.description: Gain a beast companion (Medium or smaller, CR 1/4 or lower) that fights alongside you, adding your proficiency bonus to its AC, attack/damage rolls, and proficient saves/skills. Its HP max is the higher of its stat block value or 4x your ranger level. Command it on your turn to move freely or use a bonus action to command Attack/Dash/Disengage/Help (otherwise it Dodges); once you have Extra Attack, you can also make one weapon attack yourself when commanding it to Attack. If it dies, you can bond a new one over 8 hours.

class_features.name: Exceptional Training
class_features.description: On turns when your beast doesn't attack, use a bonus action to command it to Dash, Disengage, or Help. The beast's attacks now count as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity to nonmagical attacks.

class_features.name: Bestial Fury
class_features.description: When you command your beast companion to Attack, it can make two attacks, or use its Multiattack action if it has one.

class_features.name: Share Spells
class_features.description: When you cast a spell targeting only yourself, you can also affect your beast companion with it if the beast is within 30 feet.

class_features.name: Draconic Gift
class_features.description: Learn the thaumaturgy cantrip (counts as a ranger spell) and learn to speak/read/write Draconic or another language.

class_features.name: Drake Companion
class_features.description: Summon a bonded drake companion (Small Dragon, AC 14+PB, HP 5 + 5x ranger level, choose a damage type for its Draconic Essence on each summon). It shares your initiative, acts on Dodge unless you spend a bonus action to command another action, and remains until reduced to 0 HP, resummoned, or you die. Usable again before a long rest by expending a 1st-level spell slot.

class_features.name: Bond of Fang and Scale
class_features.description: The summoned drake grows wings (flying speed = walking speed) and grows to Medium size, becoming usable as a mount (can't fly while mounted). Its Bite deals extra damage of its Draconic Essence type, and you gain resistance to that damage type while it's summoned.

class_features.name: Drake's Breath
class_features.description: You or your drake exhale a 30-foot cone of a chosen elemental damage type; each creature in it makes a Dexterity save against your spell save DC, taking 8d6 damage (10d6 at 15th level) on a failure, half on success. Usable again before a long rest by expending a 3rd-level spell slot.

class_features.name: Perfected Bond
class_features.description: While your drake is summoned: its Bite deals an extra 1d6 damage (total 2d6 extra) of its Draconic Essence type; it grows to Large size and can use its flying speed while mounted; and you or the drake can use a reaction to grant either of you resistance to damage taken while within 30 feet of each other, usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Dreadful Strikes
class_features.description: When hitting with a weapon, deal an extra 1d4 (1d6 at 11th level) psychic damage, once per turn.

class_features.name: Fey Wanderer Magic
class_features.description: Learn charm person (3rd), misty step (5th), dispel magic (9th), dimension door (13th), and mislead (17th) as bonus known spells not counted against your known spell total. Also gain a minor cosmetic fey blessing.

class_features.name: Otherworldly Glamour
class_features.description: Gain a bonus to Charisma checks equal to your Wisdom modifier (min +1); gain proficiency in Deception, Performance, or Persuasion.

class_features.name: Beguiling Twist
class_features.description: Advantage on saves against being charmed or frightened. Whenever you or a creature within 120 feet succeeds on such a save, force a different creature within 120 feet to make a Wisdom save against your spell save DC or be charmed/frightened (your choice) for 1 minute (repeatable save each turn).

class_features.name: Fey Reinforcements
class_features.description: Learn summon fey (doesn't count against known spells, castable without material components); cast it once per long rest without a spell slot. Can modify the spell to not require concentration, with duration becoming 1 minute.

class_features.name: Misty Wanderer
class_features.description: Cast misty step without a spell slot a number of times equal to Wisdom modifier (min once) per long rest; can bring one willing creature within 5 feet along to a space within 5 feet of your destination.

class_features.name: Gloom Stalker Magic
class_features.description: Learn disguise self (3rd), rope trick (5th), fear (9th), greater invisibility (13th), and seeming (17th) as bonus known spells not counted against your known spell total.

class_features.name: Dread Ambusher
class_features.description: Add your Wisdom modifier to initiative rolls. On your first turn of combat, gain +10 feet walking speed for that turn, and if you take the Attack action, make one additional weapon attack that deals an extra 1d8 damage of the weapon's type on a hit.

class_features.name: Umbral Sight
class_features.description: Gain darkvision to 60 feet (or +30 feet if you already have it). While in darkness, you're invisible to creatures relying on darkvision to see you there.

class_features.name: Iron Mind
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws (or Intelligence/Charisma, your choice, if already proficient in Wisdom).

class_features.name: Stalker's Flurry
class_features.description: Once per turn when you miss with a weapon attack, make another weapon attack as part of the same action.

class_features.name: Shadowy Dodge
class_features.description: Whenever a creature makes an attack roll against you without advantage, use your reaction (before knowing the outcome) to impose disadvantage on it.

class_features.name: Horizon Walker Magic
class_features.description: Learn protection from evil and good (3rd), misty step (5th), haste (9th), banishment (13th), and teleportation circle (17th) as bonus known spells not counted against your known spell total.

class_features.name: Detect Portal
class_features.description: Detect the distance and direction to the closest planar portal within 1 mile.

class_features.name: Planar Warrior
class_features.description: Choose a creature within 30 feet; the next weapon hit against it this turn deals all damage as force damage plus an extra 1d8 force damage (2d8 at 11th level).

class_features.name: Ethereal Step
class_features.description: Cast etherealness without expending a spell slot, but it ends at the end of the current turn.

class_features.name: Distant Strike
class_features.description: When taking the Attack action, teleport up to 10 feet before each attack to an unoccupied space you can see. If you attack at least two different creatures with the action, make one additional attack against a third creature.

class_features.name: Spectral Defense
class_features.description: When you take damage from an attack, give yourself resistance to all of that attack's damage on this turn.

class_features.name: Hunter's Prey: Colossus Slayer
class_features.description: Choice for Hunter's Prey. When you hit a creature below its hit point maximum with a weapon attack, deal an extra 1d8 damage, once per turn.

class_features.name: Hunter's Prey: Giant Killer
class_features.description: Choice for Hunter's Prey. When a Large or larger creature within 5 feet hits or misses you with an attack, use your reaction to attack it immediately after, if you can see it.

class_features.name: Hunter's Prey: Horde Breaker
class_features.description: Choice for Hunter's Prey. Once per turn when you make a weapon attack, make another attack with the same weapon against a different creature within 5 feet of the original target and within weapon range.

class_features.name: Defensive Tactics: Escape the Horde
class_features.description: Choice for Defensive Tactics. Opportunity attacks against you are made with disadvantage.

class_features.name: Defensive Tactics: Multiattack Defense
class_features.description: Choice for Defensive Tactics. When a creature hits you with an attack, gain +4 AC against all subsequent attacks from that same creature for the rest of the turn.

class_features.name: Defensive Tactics: Steel Will
class_features.description: Choice for Defensive Tactics. Advantage on saving throws against being frightened.

class_features.name: Multiattack: Volley
class_features.description: Choice for Multiattack. Make a ranged attack against any number of creatures within 10 feet of a point within your weapon's range, with a separate attack roll (and ammunition) for each target.

class_features.name: Multiattack: Whirlwind Attack
class_features.description: Choice for Multiattack. Make a melee attack against any number of creatures within 5 feet of you, with a separate attack roll for each target.

class_features.name: Superior Hunter's Defense: Evasion
class_features.description: Choice for Superior Hunter's Defense. On a Dexterity save for half damage, take no damage on a success and half damage on a failure.

class_features.name: Superior Hunter's Defense: Stand Against the Tide
class_features.description: Choice for Superior Hunter's Defense. When a hostile creature misses you with a melee attack, force it to repeat the same attack against another creature (other than itself) of your choice.

class_features.name: Superior Hunter's Defense: Uncanny Dodge
class_features.description: Choice for Superior Hunter's Defense. When a seen attacker hits you with an attack, halve that attack's damage against you.

class_features.name: Monster Slayer Magic
class_features.description: Learn protection from evil and good (3rd), zone of truth (5th), magic circle (9th), banishment (13th), and hold monster (17th) as bonus known spells not counted against your known spell total.

class_features.name: Hunter's Sense
class_features.description: Learn a chosen creature's damage immunities, resistances, and vulnerabilities within 60 feet. Usable a number of times equal to Wisdom modifier (minimum once) per long rest.

class_features.name: Slayer's Prey
class_features.description: Designate a creature within 60 feet; the first weapon hit each turn against it deals an extra 1d6 damage. Lasts until a short or long rest or until you designate a different target.

class_features.name: Supernatural Defense
class_features.description: Add 1d6 to any saving throw forced by your Slayer's Prey target, and to any check made to escape its grapple.

class_features.name: Magic-User's Nemesis
class_features.description: When you see a creature within 60 feet casting a spell or teleporting, force a Wisdom save against your spell save DC or its spell/teleport fails and is wasted.

class_features.name: Slayer's Counter
class_features.description: If your Slayer's Prey target forces a saving throw on you, make one weapon attack against it immediately before making the save; a hit auto-succeeds the save in addition to the attack's normal effects.

class_features.name: Gathered Swarm
class_features.description: A swarm of nature spirits bonds to you and occupies your space. Once per turn, immediately after you hit a creature with an attack, choose one: the target takes 1d6 (1d8 at 11th level) piercing damage from the swarm; the target makes a Strength save against your spell save DC or is moved up to 15 feet horizontally; or you are moved 5 feet horizontally.

class_features.name: Swarmkeeper Magic
class_features.description: Learn the mage hand cantrip (taking the form of your swarm). Also learn faerie fire (3rd), web (5th), gaseous form (9th), arcane eye (13th), and insect plague (17th) as bonus known spells not counted against your known spell total.

class_features.name: Writhing Tide
class_features.description: Gain a flying speed of 10 feet and the ability to hover for 1 minute or until incapacitated. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Mighty Swarm
class_features.description: Gathered Swarm's damage increases to 1d8; a creature that fails its move save can also be knocked prone; and when you're moved by the swarm, you gain half cover until your next turn.

class_features.name: Swarming Dispersal
class_features.description: When you take damage, gain resistance to it and teleport into your swarm, reappearing in an unoccupied space within 30 feet you can see. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus per long rest.

class_features.name: Rocborne Magic
class_features.description: Learn feather fall (3rd), gust of wind (5th), lightning bolt (9th), ice storm (13th), and legend lore (17th) as bonus known spells not counted against your known spell total.

class_features.name: Guiding Wind
class_features.description: Once per turn, choose one: a weapon hit deals an extra 1d4 (1d8 at 11th level) damage of the weapon's type; or redirect a missed weapon attack to a different target within 5 feet (15 feet at 11th level) using the original roll plus your Wisdom modifier.

class_features.name: Whispers of Knowledge
class_features.description: Spend 10 minutes communing with wind spirits to gain proficiency in one skill or tool you lack, until the next time you use this feature or finish a rest. Usable a number of times equal to Wisdom modifier (minimum once) per long rest.

class_features.name: Windswept
class_features.description: Walking speed increases by 5 feet; ignore movement penalties from strong wind and can't be involuntarily pushed by it; gain resistance to cold damage and acclimation to high altitude.

class_features.name: Soar
class_features.description: Immediately after a running jump, grow spectral wings granting a flying speed equal to walking speed, lasting until the end of your next turn or until you touch the ground.

class_features.name: Hurricane
class_features.description: When you take damage, gain resistance to it (or negate it if falling damage); each chosen creature within 15 feet makes a Strength save against your spell save DC or takes bludgeoning damage equal to your ranger level and is knocked prone (half damage, no prone on success). Can also fly yourself to an unoccupied space within 30 feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

class_features.name: Trapper's Tools
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with thieves' tools; double your proficiency bonus on checks made with them to disarm or manipulate a trap.

class_features.name: Trapped Weapons
class_features.description: On a short or long rest, augment one weapon or up to 20 pieces of ammunition with a concealed elemental charge (acid/cold/fire/lightning), lasting until your next rest. Once per turn, a hit with the augmented weapon/ammo deals an extra 1d8 (2d8 at 11th level, with one additional item/20 ammo augmentable) damage of that type, activated for free.

class_features.name: Set Trap
class_features.description: Learn to make physical and magical traps, gaining new trap options at 3rd, 5th, 9th, 13th, and 17th level. Physical traps take 1 hour and consumable materials to build; magical traps (up to a number equal to Wisdom modifier, min 1) are created fresh after a long rest, some costing a spell slot, and lose effect if undeployed by the next long rest. Traps are thrown (action) to a space within 30 feet and arm on your next turn; can be concealed over 1 minute. DC for trap saves/checks equals your ranger spell save DC.

class_features.name: Trapper Traps: Tier 1 (Bear Trap, Tanglevine, Snare Trap, Solestriker)
class_features.description: Learn four 3rd-level traps via Set Trap: Bear Trap (physical, 2d8 piercing damage and speed 0 to a Large-or-smaller creature in the area, Dexterity save); Tanglevine (magical, 1st-level slot, replicates entangle in a 20-ft radius); Snare Trap (physical, knocks prone and zeroes speed on a failed Strength save); Solestriker (magical, 1st-level slot, replicates spike growth in a 20-ft radius).

class_features.name: Trapper Traps: Tier 2 (Immolation, Miasma, Soulbind, Pit Trap)
class_features.description: Learn four 5th-level traps via Set Trap: Immolation (magical, 2nd-level slot, 6d6 fire damage in a 20-ft sphere, Dexterity save for half); Miasma (magical, 2nd-level slot, poison gas dealing 3d6 poison damage and poisoning on a failed Constitution save); Soulbind (magical, 2nd-level slot, Charisma save or become soulbound per the preserve spell); Pit Trap (physical, fixed-location 7-ft pit dealing 4d8 piercing damage on a failed Dexterity save).

class_features.name: Tracker
class_features.description: Add your proficiency bonus to checks to find or follow tracks even without relevant proficiency; double it if already proficient.

class_features.name: Trapper's Avoidance
class_features.description: On a trap-activation effect allowing a save for half damage, take no damage on a success and half on a failure; attack rolls made by traps against you have disadvantage.

class_features.name: Trapper Traps: Tier 3 (Bewilderment, Net Trap, Thunder Charge)
class_features.description: Learn three 9th-level traps via Set Trap: Bewilderment (magical, 3rd-level slot, 3d10 psychic damage plus confusion effect on a failed Wisdom save); Net Trap (physical, restrains and hoists creatures 20 feet up on a failed Dexterity save); Thunder Charge (magical, 3rd-level slot, 8d6 thunder damage and deafened on a failed Constitution save).

class_features.name: Leave No Trace
class_features.description: When deploying a trap, expend a 1st-level+ spell slot to make it invisible the instant it leaves your hands, and physical traps gain disadvantage on saves against them. Also learn invisibility (counts as a ranger spell, doesn't count against known spells); cast it once per short or long rest without a slot.

class_features.name: Trapper Traps: Tier 4 (Catapult Trap, Infection, Snapfrost)
class_features.description: Learn three 13th-level traps via Set Trap: Catapult Trap (physical, flings a creature 60 feet for 6d10 bludgeoning damage on a failed Dexterity save); Infection (magical, 4th-level slot, inflicts a chosen contagion disease on a failed Constitution save); Snapfrost (magical, 4th-level slot, 6d6 cold damage plus halved speed and no reactions on a failed Constitution save).

class_features.name: Booby Trap
class_features.description: On a long rest, choose one self-augmenting magical defense (lasting until your next long rest): Defibrillate (shock an attacker, no-reaction effect, plus a once-per-long-rest extra turn when reduced to 0 HP instead of falling unconscious); Dissolve (acid coats attackers, plus an AoE acid burst on dropping to 0 HP); Entomb (chills attackers, plus encasing yourself in a protective ice block at 0 HP); or Self-Destruct (a small fire burst on being hit, plus a large fiery explosion on dropping to 0 HP).

class_features.name: Trapper Traps: Tier 5 (Banisher, Gravity Well)
class_features.description: Learn two 17th-level traps via Set Trap: Banisher (magical, 5th-level slot, banishes creatures to a demiplane for 1 minute on a failed Charisma save); Gravity Well (magical, 5th-level slot, knocks prone, breaks concentration, pulls creatures inward, and deals up to 6d8 force damage over its duration).

class_features.name: Expertise
class_features.description: Double your proficiency bonus on ability checks using two chosen skill proficiencies (or one skill plus thieves' tools).

class_features.name: Sneak Attack
class_features.description: Once per turn, deal an extra 1d6 damage (scaling with level) to a creature you hit with a finesse or ranged weapon if you have advantage on the attack, or if another (non-incapacitated) enemy of the target is within 5 feet of it and you don't have disadvantage.

class_features.name: Thieves' Cant
class_features.description: You know a secret coded language and set of signs/symbols for conveying short hidden messages to other rogues.

class_features.name: Cunning Action
class_features.description: Take a bonus action each turn in combat to Dash, Disengage, or Hide.

class_features.name: Roguish Archetype
class_features.description: Choose a roguish archetype, granting features at 3rd, 9th, 13th, and 17th level.

class_features.name: Steady Aim
class_features.description: As a bonus action, gain advantage on your next attack roll this turn, provided you haven't moved this turn; your speed becomes 0 until end of turn.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead.

class_features.name: Uncanny Dodge
class_features.description: When an attacker you can see hits you, use your reaction to halve the attack's damage.

class_features.name: Expertise (6th level)
class_features.description: Choose two more proficiencies (skills or thieves' tools) to double your proficiency bonus on checks using them.

class_features.name: Evasion
class_features.description: On a Dexterity saving throw against an effect that deals half damage on a success, take no damage on a success and only half on a failure.

class_features.name: Reliable Talent
class_features.description: Whenever you make an ability check using a proficiency you have, treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10.

class_features.name: Blindsense
class_features.description: If you can hear, you know the location of any hidden or invisible creature within 10 feet of you.

class_features.name: Slippery Mind
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Wisdom saving throws.

class_features.name: Elusive
class_features.description: No attack roll has advantage against you while you aren't incapacitated.

class_features.name: Stroke of Luck
class_features.description: Turn a missed attack into a hit, or treat a failed ability check as a 20.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Gain the ability to cast wizard spells using Intelligence, with cantrips and a limited list of known spells, slots per the Arcane Trickster table.

class_features.name: Mage Hand Legerdemain
class_features.description: Your Mage Hand can be made invisible, stow/retrieve objects from another creature's container, and use thieves' tools at range; can be controlled with your Cunning Action bonus action.

class_features.name: Magical Ambush
class_features.description: If you are hidden from a creature when you cast a spell on it, that creature has disadvantage on its save against the spell this turn.

class_features.name: Versatile Trickster
class_features.description: As a bonus action, designate a creature within 5 feet of your Mage Hand's spectral hand to gain advantage on attack rolls against that creature until end of turn.

class_features.name: Spell Thief
class_features.description: When targeted by a spell, force the caster to save or have the spell negated against you; on a failed save you also steal the spell for 8 hours if it's a level you can cast.

class_features.name: Bonus Proficiencies
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with the disguise kit and the poisoner's kit.

class_features.name: Assassinate
class_features.description: Advantage on attack rolls against any creature that hasn't taken a turn yet in combat; any hit against a surprised creature is a critical hit.

class_features.name: Infiltration Expertise
class_features.description: Spend 7 days and 25 gp to create a false identity; once adopted as a disguise, others believe you are that person until given reason otherwise.

class_features.name: Impostor
class_features.description: After studying a person for at least 3 hours, you can unerringly mimic their speech, writing, and behavior; advantage on Deception checks if your ruse is suspected.

class_features.name: Death Strike
class_features.description: When you hit a surprised creature, it must succeed a Constitution save (DC 8 + Dex mod + proficiency bonus) or take double damage from the attack.

class_features.name: Ear for Deceit
class_features.description: On Wisdom (Insight) checks to detect lies, treat a d20 roll of 7 or lower as an 8.

class_features.name: Eye for Detail
class_features.description: Use a bonus action to make a Wisdom (Perception) check to spot a hidden creature/object, or an Intelligence (Investigation) check to decipher clues.

class_features.name: Insightful Fighting
class_features.description: As a bonus action, contest a Wisdom (Insight) check against a target's Charisma (Deception); on success you can use Sneak Attack against that target without advantage (but not with disadvantage) for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Steady Eye
class_features.description: Advantage on Wisdom (Perception) or Intelligence (Investigation) checks if you move no more than half your speed that turn.

class_features.name: Unerring Eye
class_features.description: As an action, sense the presence of illusions, shapechangers not in true form, and other deceptive magic within 30 feet; uses equal to Wisdom modifier (min 1).

class_features.name: Eye for Weakness
class_features.description: While Insightful Fighting applies to a target, your Sneak Attack damage against that target increases by 3d6.

class_features.name: Master of Intrigue
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with the disguise kit, forgery kit, and one gaming set; learn two languages; can mimic speech patterns/accents heard for at least 1 minute.

class_features.name: Master of Tactics
class_features.description: Use the Help action as a bonus action; when helping an ally attack, the target can be within 30 feet instead of 5 feet if it can see/hear you.

class_features.name: Insightful Manipulator
class_features.description: After observing/interacting with a creature for 1 minute outside combat, learn how it compares to you in two chosen traits (Int, Wis, Cha, class levels).

class_features.name: Misdirection
class_features.description: When targeted by an attack while a creature within 5 feet grants you cover against it, use your reaction to redirect the attack to that creature instead.

class_features.name: Soul of Deceit
class_features.description: Your thoughts can't be read without permission; you can present false thoughts and always appear truthful to magic that detects lies.

class_features.name: Whispers of the Dead
class_features.description: At the end of a short or long rest, gain one skill or tool proficiency you lack; you lose it if you pick a different one later.

class_features.name: Wails from the Grave
class_features.description: Immediately after dealing Sneak Attack damage, target a second creature within 30 feet of the first; it takes necrotic damage equal to half your Sneak Attack dice (rounded up). Uses equal to proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Tokens of the Departed
class_features.description: When a creature dies within 30 feet of you, create a soul trinket (max equal to proficiency bonus). While carried, you have advantage on death saves and Con saves; can be destroyed to fuel a free Wails from the Grave or to ask a question of the departed spirit.

class_features.name: Ghost Walk
class_features.description: Assume a spectral form for 10 minutes: fly speed 10 ft and hover, attack rolls against you have disadvantage, you can move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain (1d10 force damage if you end turn inside one). Usable again on a long rest or by destroying a soul trinket.

class_features.name: Death's Friend
class_features.description: Wails from the Grave can now damage both the first and second target; a soul trinket appears in hand at the end of a long rest if you have none.

class_features.name: Skirmisher
class_features.description: When an enemy ends its turn within 5 feet of you, move up to half your speed as a reaction without provoking opportunity attacks.

class_features.name: Survivalist
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Nature and Survival (if not already), doubling your proficiency bonus on checks using them.

class_features.name: Superior Mobility
class_features.description: Walking speed increases by 10 feet; climbing/swimming speed also increases if you have one.

class_features.name: Ambush Master
class_features.description: Advantage on initiative rolls; the first creature you hit in the first round of combat has attack rolls against it made with advantage until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Sudden Strike
class_features.description: If you take the Attack action, make one additional attack as a bonus action; this attack can use Sneak Attack even if already used this turn (but not against the same target twice).

class_features.name: Psionic Power
class_features.description: Gain Psionic Energy dice (d6, sized up at 5th/11th/17th level) equal to twice proficiency bonus, fueling psionic powers; can regain one die as a bonus action once per short/long rest.

class_features.name: Psi-Bolstered Knack
class_features.description: If you fail an ability check using a skill/tool you're proficient in, roll a Psionic Energy die and add it to the check; the die is expended only if the roll then succeeds.

class_features.name: Psychic Whispers
class_features.description: Establish telepathic communication with a number of creatures equal to your proficiency bonus, lasting hours equal to a rolled Psionic Energy die; first use after a long rest doesn't expend the die.

class_features.name: Psychic Blades
class_features.description: When you take the Attack action, manifest a psychic blade (finesse, thrown, 60 ft range, 1d6 + ability mod psychic damage) from your free hand; can follow with a second bonus-action attack (1d4) from your other free hand.

class_features.name: Soul Blades
class_features.description: Gain Homing Strikes (spend a Psionic Energy die to add to a missed Psychic Blades attack roll) and Psychic Teleportation (bonus action: expend a die, throw a blade that distance x10 feet, then teleport to that space).

class_features.name: Psychic Veil
class_features.description: Become invisible (with worn/carried gear) for 1 hour or until dismissed; ends early if you deal damage or force a save. Usable again by spending a Psionic Energy die.

class_features.name: Rend Mind
class_features.description: When you deal Sneak Attack damage with Psychic Blades, force a Wisdom save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Dex mod) or the target is stunned for 1 minute (repeat save each turn). Usable again by spending 3 Psionic Energy dice.

class_features.name: Fancy Footwork
class_features.description: During your turn, a creature you make a melee attack against can't make opportunity attacks against you for the rest of your turn.

class_features.name: Rakish Audacity
class_features.description: Add your Charisma modifier to initiative rolls. You can use Sneak Attack without advantage if no other creatures are within 5 feet of you and you don't have disadvantage.

class_features.name: Panache
class_features.description: Contest a Charisma (Persuasion) check against a creature's Wisdom (Insight); on success a hostile creature has disadvantage attacking others and can't make opportunity attacks against others for 1 minute, or a non-hostile creature is charmed for 1 minute.

class_features.name: Elegant Maneuver
class_features.description: As a bonus action, gain advantage on your next Dexterity (Acrobatics) or Strength (Athletics) check this turn.

class_features.name: Master Duelist
class_features.description: If you miss with an attack roll, reroll it with advantage.

class_features.name: Fast Hands
class_features.description: Use the bonus action from Cunning Action to make a Sleight of Hand check, use thieves' tools to disarm a trap or pick a lock, or take the Use an Object action.

class_features.name: Second-Story Work
class_features.description: Climbing no longer costs extra movement; running jump distance increases by your Dexterity modifier in feet.

class_features.name: Supreme Sneak
class_features.description: Advantage on Dexterity (Stealth) checks if you move no more than half your speed that turn.

class_features.name: Use Magic Device
class_features.description: Ignore all class, race, and level requirements on the use of magic items.

class_features.name: Thief's Reflexes
class_features.description: Take two turns during the first round of combat: one at your normal initiative, one at initiative minus 10. Doesn't work if you're surprised.

class_features.name: Medic
class_features.description: Gain (or double proficiency in) Medicine. As a bonus action, stabilize an unconscious creature within 5 feet, or expend a healer's kit use on a creature to heal it 1d4 + proficiency bonus HP (once per short/long rest per creature).

class_features.name: Transfusion
class_features.description: Once per turn when you deal Sneak Attack damage to a non-construct, non-undead creature, gain temporary HP equal to your Wisdom modifier (min 1, doubled at 13th level) until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Field Surgeon
class_features.description: At the start of a short rest, roll your Sneak Attack dice; a willing creature you choose regains that many HP at the end of the rest. A creature can only benefit once per long rest.

class_features.name: Toxic Shock
class_features.description: When you gain temporary HP from Transfusion, the target's speed is reduced by 10 feet and it has disadvantage on its next attack or ability check until the end of its next turn.

class_features.name: Bloodbound
class_features.description: Immediately after dealing Sneak Attack damage to a beast or humanoid, force a Constitution save (DC 8 + proficiency bonus + Wis mod); on failure, the creature is dominated (as dominate beast/dominate person) for 1 minute or until you end it.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Cast sorcerer spells using Charisma; know cantrips and a limited number of known spells with spell slots per the Sorcerer table.

class_features.name: Sorcerous Origin
class_features.description: Choose a sorcerous origin describing the source of your innate magic, granting features at 1st, 6th, 14th, and 18th level.

class_features.name: Font of Magic (Sorcerer Points)
class_features.description: Gain a pool of sorcery points (scales with level) that fuel Flexible Casting: convert sorcery points into a bonus-action-created spell slot (no higher than 5th level, costing 2/3/5/6/7 points for slot levels 1-5; unused created slots vanish on long rest), or convert a spell slot into sorcery points equal to its level.

class_features.name: Metamagic
class_features.description: Choose two Metamagic options (gaining one more at 10th and 17th level) that let you spend sorcery points to twist how a spell is cast (e.g. Careful, Distant, Empowered, Extended, Heightened, Quickened, Subtle, Twinned Spell). Implemented as its own separate system in this app - see Metamagic UI.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead.

class_features.name: Magical Guidance
class_features.description: When you fail an ability check, spend 1 sorcery point to reroll the d20 and use the new roll.

class_features.name: Sorcerous Restoration
class_features.description: Regain 4 expended sorcery points whenever you finish a short rest.

class_features.name: Psionic Spells
class_features.description: Learn additional spells (Arms of Hadar, Dissonant Whispers, Mind Sliver at 1st; more at 3rd/5th/7th/9th) that don't count against your known spells.

class_features.name: Telepathic Speech
class_features.description: As a bonus action, form a telepathic link with a creature within 30 feet, lasting minutes equal to your sorcerer level.

class_features.name: Psionic Sorcery
class_features.description: Cast any Psionic Spells feature spell using sorcery points equal to its level instead of a spell slot, requiring no verbal/somatic/material components (unless consumed).

class_features.name: Psychic Defenses
class_features.description: Resistance to psychic damage; advantage on saves against being charmed or frightened.

class_features.name: Revelation in Flesh
class_features.description: Spend 1+ sorcery points to transform your body for 10 minutes, gaining one benefit per point spent (see invisible creatures, flying speed, swimming speed and waterbreathing, or squeeze through 1-inch gaps and escape restraints/grapples cheaply).

class_features.name: Warping Implosion
class_features.description: Teleport up to 120 feet; each creature within 30 feet of your old space makes a Strength save or takes 3d10 force damage and is pulled to your former space (half damage, no pull on success). Usable again for 5 sorcery points.

class_features.name: Clockwork Magic
class_features.description: Learn additional spells (Alarm, Protection from Evil and Good at 1st; more at 3rd/5th/7th/9th) that don't count against your known spells.

class_features.name: Restore Balance
class_features.description: When a creature within 60 feet is about to roll a d20 with advantage or disadvantage, use your reaction to negate that advantage/disadvantage. Uses equal to proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Bastion of Law
class_features.description: Spend 1-5 sorcery points to create a warding shield (that many d8s) around yourself or a creature within 30 feet; the warded creature can expend dice to reduce damage taken. Lasts until a long rest or reused.

class_features.name: Trance of Order
class_features.description: Enter a 1-minute trance: attack rolls against you can't have advantage, and you treat a d20 roll of 9 or lower as a 10 on attacks, checks, and saves. Usable again for 5 sorcery points.

class_features.name: Clockwork Cavalcade
class_features.description: Summon spirits of order in a 30-foot cube: restore up to 100 HP among chosen creatures, repair damaged objects, and end spells of 6th level or lower on chosen creatures/objects. Usable again for 7 sorcery points.

class_features.name: Divine Magic
class_features.description: You may learn cleric spells in place of sorcerer spells; choose an affinity (good/evil/law/chaos/neutrality) to learn a free bonus spell tied to that alignment.

class_features.name: Favored by the Gods
class_features.description: If you fail a save or miss with an attack roll, roll 2d4 and add it to the total.

class_features.name: Empowered Healing
class_features.description: Once per turn, when you or an ally within 5 feet rolls healing dice, spend 1 sorcery point to reroll any number of those dice once.

class_features.name: Otherworldly Wings
class_features.description: Manifest spectral wings, granting a flying speed of 30 feet until incapacitated, dead, or dismissed.

class_features.name: Unearthly Recovery
class_features.description: When below half HP, regain HP equal to half your hit point maximum.

class_features.name: Dragon Ancestor
class_features.description: Choose a dragon type, determining an associated damage type used by later features; you can speak/read/write Draconic and double your proficiency bonus on Charisma checks involving dragons.

class_features.name: Draconic Resilience
class_features.description: Hit point maximum increases by 1 per sorcerer level; while not wearing armor your AC equals 13 + Dex modifier.

class_features.name: Elemental Affinity
class_features.description: When casting a spell that deals damage of your draconic ancestry's type, add your Charisma modifier to one damage roll; can spend 1 sorcery point for 1 hour resistance to that damage type.

class_features.name: Dragon Wings
class_features.description: Sprout dragon wings granting a flying speed equal to your current speed; lasts until dismissed as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Draconic Presence
class_features.description: Spend 5 sorcery points to exude an aura of awe or fear in a 60-foot radius for 1 minute (or until concentration breaks); hostile creatures that start their turn in it must save or be charmed/frightened until the aura ends.

class_features.name: Lunar Embodiment
class_features.description: Learn additional spells tied to three lunar phases (Full/New/Crescent Moon, scaling at 1st/3rd/5th/7th/9th level); after a long rest, choose a phase and can cast one 1st-level spell of that phase's list for free once.

class_features.name: Moon Fire
class_features.description: Learn the Sacred Flame cantrip for free; when cast, you can target two creatures within 5 feet of each other instead of one.

class_features.name: Lunar Boons
class_features.description: Reduce the sorcery point cost of Metamagic by 1 (min 0) when used on a spell from the school associated with your current lunar phase; uses equal to proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Waxing and Waning
class_features.description: Spend 1 sorcery point as a bonus action to change your current lunar phase; you can now cast a free 1st-level spell from each phase once per long rest when in the matching phase.

class_features.name: Lunar Empowerment
class_features.description: Gain an ongoing benefit tied to your current lunar phase: Full Moon (control light, advantage on Investigation/Perception in it), New Moon (advantage on Stealth, disadvantage on attacks against you in darkness), or Crescent Moon (resistance to necrotic and radiant damage).

class_features.name: Lunar Phenomenon
class_features.description: Tap a powerful effect tied to your current lunar phase (blind and heal via Full Moon, necrotic damage and invisibility via New Moon, or teleport with an ally and gain resistance via Crescent Moon). Usable again for 5 sorcery points.

class_features.name: Eyes of the Dark
class_features.description: Gain darkvision out to 120 feet; at 3rd level, learn Darkness for free and can cast it for 2 sorcery points (seeing through it) or a spell slot.

class_features.name: Strength of the Grave
class_features.description: When damage drops you to 0 HP, make a Charisma save (DC 5 + damage taken); on success, drop to 1 HP instead. Doesn't work against radiant damage or critical hits.

class_features.name: Hound of Ill Omen
class_features.description: Spend 3 sorcery points to summon a spectral hound (dire wolf stats, modified) that hunts one target within 120 feet; it knows the target's location and gives the target disadvantage on saves against your spells while within 5 feet of it.

class_features.name: Shadow Walk
class_features.description: While in dim light or darkness, teleport up to 120 feet to an unoccupied space also in dim light or darkness.

class_features.name: Umbral Form
class_features.description: Spend 6 sorcery points to transform into a shadowy form for 1 minute, gaining resistance to all damage except force and radiant, and can move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain.

class_features.name: Wind Speaker
class_features.description: Speak, read, and write Primordial, allowing communication with its Aquan, Auran, Ignan, and Terran dialects.

class_features.name: Tempestuous Magic
class_features.description: Immediately before or after casting a spell of 1st level or higher, use a bonus action to fly up to 10 feet without provoking opportunity attacks.

class_features.name: Heart of the Storm
class_features.description: Resistance to lightning and thunder damage; whenever you cast a lightning/thunder spell of 1st level or higher, chosen creatures within 10 feet take lightning or thunder damage equal to half your sorcerer level.

class_features.name: Storm Guide
class_features.description: Use an action to stop rain in a 20-foot radius around you (until dismissed as bonus action), or a bonus action each round to control wind direction in a 100-foot radius for one round.

class_features.name: Storm's Fury
class_features.description: When hit by a melee attack, use your reaction to deal lightning damage equal to your sorcerer level to the attacker; on a failed Strength save, the attacker is pushed up to 20 feet away.

class_features.name: Wind Soul
class_features.description: Immunity to lightning and thunder damage; gain a 60-foot flying speed. Can spend an action to grant flying speed to nearby creatures for 1 hour (once per short/long rest).

class_features.name: Wild Magic Surge
class_features.description: Once per turn, after casting a sorcerer spell of 1st level or higher, the DM may have you roll a d20; on a 1, roll on the Wild Magic Surge table for a random magical effect.

class_features.name: Tides of Chaos
class_features.description: Gain advantage on one attack roll, ability check, or saving throw; using this can trigger a Wild Magic Surge roll on your next sorcerer spell cast before you regain the use of this feature.

class_features.name: Bend Luck
class_features.description: When another creature makes an attack roll, ability check, or saving throw, spend 2 sorcery points to roll 1d4 and apply it as a bonus or penalty to that roll after it's rolled but before effects occur.

class_features.name: Controlled Chaos
class_features.description: Whenever you roll on the Wild Magic Surge table, roll twice and use either result.

class_features.name: Spell Bombardment
class_features.description: Once per turn, when you roll the highest possible number on a damage die for a spell, reroll one of those dice and add it to the damage.

class_features.name: Dunetreader
