class_features.description: Ignore difficult terrain created by sand; tolerate temperatures up to 150°F without extra protection.

class_features.name: Sandstorm
class_features.description: When you cast a spell of 1st level or higher, use a bonus action to create a 5-foot sand twister within 30 feet; Large or smaller creatures in it make a Strength save or are pushed 5-10 feet (plus bludgeoning or fire damage starting at 6th level, scaling at 14th/18th).

class_features.name: Mirage
class_features.description: Learn Mirror Image for free (or another sorcerer spell if already known); can cast it for 2 sorcery points, dealing fire damage equal to half your sorcerer level to creatures within 10 feet that destroy an illusion when cast this way.

class_features.name: Desert Nomad
class_features.description: After a creature is pushed by Sandstorm (or when creating it in an unoccupied space), spend 2 sorcery points to teleport into the storm's space, becoming invisible until end of turn.

class_features.name: Sand Form
class_features.description: Spend 5 sorcery points to become sand-like for 1 minute: can't be grappled, squeeze through 1-inch gaps, move through creatures' spaces, ignore difficult terrain; also can turn to sand as a reaction when hit for resistance to all damage that turn.

class_features.name: Essence Runes
class_features.description: Gain essence runes (1 + one per level) that become charged runes when you spend sorcery points; charged runes fuel your Runechild features and revert to inert on a long rest. Can convert essence runes to charged runes via bonus action/action.

class_features.name: Runic Magic
class_features.description: Learn additional spells (Longstrider, Protection from Evil and Good at 1st; more at 3rd/5th/7th/9th) that don't count against your known spells.

class_features.name: Glyph of Aegis
class_features.description: When you take damage, expend charged runes to roll that many d6s and reduce the damage by the total; at 6th level can transfer this protection to another creature via touch, and the die becomes a d8 at 14th level.

class_features.name: Sigilic Augmentation
class_features.description: Expend a charged rune to gain advantage on a Strength/Dexterity/Constitution ability check, or (once per long rest) on a Strength/Dexterity/Constitution saving throw.

class_features.name: Manifest Inscriptions
class_features.description: Expend a charged rune to reveal hidden/invisible arcane traps, marks, wards, and glyphs within 60 feet for 1 minute; advantage on Arcana checks about anything revealed this way.

class_features.name: Runic Torrent
class_features.description: When you cast a spell, expend 2 charged runes to make it deal force damage instead of its usual type, and force a Strength save on all targets or be knocked prone or pushed 15 feet.

class_features.name: Arcane Exemplar
class_features.description: Expend a charged rune to become a being of pure magic until end of turn (extendable by expending more runes): 60 ft flying speed, disadvantage on saves against your spells for enemies, resistance to spell damage, and heal HP equal to spell level cast. Stunned when it ends.

class_features.name: Skinshifter Magic
class_features.description: Learn additional spells (Chameleon Skin, Inflict Wounds at 1st; more at 3rd/5th/7th/9th) that don't count against your known spells.

class_features.name: Skinshift
class_features.description: Immediately after casting a sorcerer spell of 1st level or higher, roll a d20; if equal to or under one-third your sorcerer level (min 1), roll a random body-altering adaptation lasting until end of next turn (extendable to 10 minutes for 1 sorcery point). At 6th level, you can add up to half your sorcerer level to the roll.

class_features.name: Selective Shift
class_features.description: Spend 1+ sorcery points to transform for 10 minutes, choosing one adaptation per point spent from the Skinshift Adaptations table (within your level-based range).

class_features.name: Reactive Mutations
class_features.description: Immediately after taking damage, spend 1 sorcery point to gain resistance to that damage type for 10 minutes or until used again.

class_features.name: Shapeshift
class_features.description: Transform for 10 minutes: end all grapples/restraints on you, gain six adaptations of your choice ignoring stacking restrictions, and gain resistance to the last three damage types you've taken (oldest lost when exceeding 3).

class_features.name: Otherworldly Patron
class_features.description: Strike a bargain with an otherworldly patron, granting features at 1st, 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

class_features.name: Pact Magic
class_features.description: Cast warlock spells using Charisma; all your spell slots are the same (higher) level, and you regain all expended Pact Magic slots on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Eldritch Invocations
class_features.description: Gain two eldritch invocations of your choice (more at higher levels per the Warlock table); each grants a unique magical ability detailed in its own entry.

class_features.name: Pact Boon
class_features.description: Choose a pact boon gift from your patron: Pact of the Blade, Pact of the Chain, or Pact of the Tome (see individual entries).

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead.

class_features.name: Eldritch Versatility
class_features.description: Whenever you gain an Ability Score Improvement, you can instead swap a known cantrip, your Pact Boon option, or (12th level+) a Mystic Arcanum spell.

class_features.name: Mystic Arcanum (6th level)
class_features.description: Choose one 6th-level warlock spell as an arcanum; cast it once without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Mystic Arcanum (7th level)
class_features.description: Choose one 7th-level warlock spell as an arcanum; cast it once without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Mystic Arcanum (8th level)
class_features.description: Choose one 8th-level warlock spell as an arcanum; cast it once without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Mystic Arcanum (9th level)
class_features.description: Choose one 9th-level warlock spell as an arcanum; cast it once without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Eldritch Master
class_features.description: Spend 1 minute entreating your patron to regain all expended Pact Magic spell slots.

class_features.name: Pact of the Blade
class_features.description: Pact Boon option. Use your action to create a magical melee pact weapon in your empty hand (you choose its form); proficient with it, and it counts as magical for resistance/immunity purposes. Can also bind an existing magic weapon as your pact weapon via a 1-hour ritual.

class_features.name: Pact of the Chain
class_features.description: Pact Boon option. Learn Find Familiar as a ritual (doesn't count against spells known); can choose an imp, pseudodragon, quasit, or sprite form. When you take the Attack action, you can forgo one attack to let your familiar attack with its reaction.

class_features.name: Pact of the Tome
class_features.description: Pact Boon option. Receive a Book of Shadows; choose three cantrips from any class's spell list that you can cast at will while the book is on your person (don't count against cantrips known).

class_features.name: Pact of the Talisman
class_features.description: Pact Boon option. Receive a talisman amulet; when the wearer fails an ability check, they can add a d4 to the roll. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Agonizing Blast
class_features.description: Add your Charisma modifier to the damage of Eldritch Blast on a hit.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Eldritch Blast cantrip

class_features.name: Armor of Shadows
class_features.description: Cast Mage Armor on yourself at will without a spell slot or material components.

class_features.name: Ascendant Step
class_features.description: Cast Levitate on yourself at will without a spell slot or material components.

class_features.name: Aspect of the Moon
class_features.description: You no longer need to sleep and can't be forced to sleep; gain the benefit of a long rest by spending 8 hours on light activity instead.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Tome

class_features.name: Beast Speech
class_features.description: Cast Speak with Animals at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Beguiling Influence
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in the Deception and Persuasion skills.

class_features.name: Bewitching Whispers
class_features.description: Cast Compulsion once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Bond of the Talisman
class_features.description: You and the wearer of your talisman can each use their action to teleport to the other's location, provided you're on the same plane. Uses equal to proficiency bonus.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 12th-level warlock, requires Pact of the Talisman

class_features.name: Book of Ancient Secrets
class_features.description: Inscribe two 1st-level ritual spells from any class list into your Book of Shadows; cast them only as rituals unless learned otherwise. Can add more ritual spells found during adventures.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Tome

class_features.name: Chains of Carceri
class_features.description: Cast Hold Monster at will (targeting only a celestial, fiend, or elemental) without a spell slot or material components; can't target the same creature again until a long rest.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 15th level, requires Pact of the Chain

class_features.name: Cloak of Flies
class_features.description: Surround yourself with a 5-foot buzzing-fly aura: advantage on Intimidation but disadvantage on other Charisma checks, and other creatures starting their turn in it take poison damage equal to your Charisma modifier.

class_features.name: Devil's Sight
class_features.description: See normally in darkness, both magical and nonmagical, to a distance of 120 feet.

class_features.name: Dreadful Word
class_features.description: Cast Confusion once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Eldritch Mind
class_features.description: Advantage on Constitution saving throws to maintain concentration on a spell.

class_features.name: Eldritch Sight
class_features.description: Cast Detect Magic at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Eldritch Smite
class_features.description: Once per turn when you hit with your pact weapon, expend a warlock spell slot to deal an extra 1d8 force damage plus 1d8 per slot level, and can knock the target prone if Huge or smaller.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 5th level, requires Pact of the Blade

class_features.name: Eldritch Spear
class_features.description: Eldritch Blast's range becomes 300 feet.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Eldritch Blast cantrip

class_features.name: Eyes of the Rune Keeper
class_features.description: You can read all writing.

class_features.name: Far Scribe
class_features.description: A page appears in your Book of Shadows for others to write their name on; you can cast Sending to a named creature without a spell slot or material components by writing on the page.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 5th-level warlock, requires Pact of the Tome

class_features.name: Fiendish Vigor
class_features.description: Cast False Life on yourself at will as a 1st-level spell without a spell slot or material components.

class_features.name: Gaze of Two Minds
class_features.description: Touch a willing humanoid and perceive through its senses until the end of your next turn; can extend the duration each turn while on the same plane.

class_features.name: Ghostly Gaze
class_features.description: See through solid objects to a range of 30 feet (with darkvision) for 1 minute or until your concentration ends.

class_features.name: Gift of the Depths
class_features.description: Breathe underwater and gain a swimming speed equal to your walking speed; can also cast Water Breathing once per long rest without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Gift of the Ever-Living Ones
class_features.description: Whenever you regain HP while your familiar is within 100 feet, treat any healing dice as having rolled their maximum value.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Chain

class_features.name: Gift of the Protectors
class_features.description: A page appears in your Book of Shadows; when a named creature is reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, it drops to 1 HP instead. Triggers once per long rest.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 9th-level warlock, requires Pact of the Tome

class_features.name: Grasp of Hadar
class_features.description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with Eldritch Blast, pull it 10 feet closer to you in a straight line.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Eldritch Blast cantrip

class_features.name: Heliana's Guide to Monster Hunting: Parasitic Leech
class_features.description: When you score a critical hit or reduce a creature to 0 HP with your parasitic weapon (or later pact weapon), gain temporary HP equal to the weapon's rolled damage dice.

class_features.name: Improved Pact Weapon
class_features.description: Your Pact of the Blade weapon can serve as a spellcasting focus, gains a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls (unless already magical with a bonus), and can take the form of a shortbow, longbow, light crossbow, or heavy crossbow.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Blade

class_features.name: Investment of the Chain Master
class_features.description: Your Find Familiar familiar gains a 40-foot fly or swim speed, can Attack as a bonus action on your command, its attacks count as magical, it uses your spell save DC, and you can grant it resistance to damage as a reaction.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Chain

class_features.name: Lance of Lethargy
class_features.description: Once per turn when you hit a creature with Eldritch Blast, reduce its speed by 10 feet until the end of your next turn.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Eldritch Blast cantrip

class_features.name: Lifedrinker
class_features.description: When you hit with your pact weapon, the target takes extra necrotic damage equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1).
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 12th level, requires Pact of the Blade

class_features.name: Maddening Hex
class_features.description: Deal psychic damage equal to your Charisma modifier to a target cursed by your Hex spell or curse feature, and to each creature you choose within 5 feet of it; target must be visible and within 30 feet.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 5th level, requires hex spell or a curse feature

class_features.name: Mask of Many Faces
class_features.description: Cast Disguise Self at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Master of Myriad Forms
class_features.description: Cast Alter Self at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Minions of Chaos
class_features.description: Cast Conjure Elemental once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Mire the Mind
class_features.description: Cast Slow once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Misty Visions
class_features.description: Cast Silent Image at will without a spell slot or material components.

class_features.name: One with Shadows
class_features.description: While in dim light or darkness, use your action to become invisible until you move, take an action, or take a reaction.

class_features.name: Otherworldly Leap
class_features.description: Cast Jump on yourself at will without a spell slot or material components.

class_features.name: Protection of the Talisman
class_features.description: When the wearer of your talisman fails a saving throw, they can add a d4 to the roll. Usable a number of times equal to your proficiency bonus, restored on a long rest.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 7th-level warlock, requires Pact of the Talisman

class_features.name: Rebuke of the Talisman
class_features.description: When the wearer of your talisman is hit by an attacker within 30 feet, use your reaction to deal psychic damage equal to your proficiency bonus to the attacker and push it 10 feet away.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Talisman

class_features.name: Relentless Hex
class_features.description: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space within 5 feet of a creature cursed by your Hex spell or curse feature.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 7th level, requires hex spell or a curse feature

class_features.name: Repelling Blast
class_features.description: When you hit a creature with Eldritch Blast, push it up to 10 feet away from you in a straight line.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Eldritch Blast cantrip

class_features.name: Sculptor of Flesh
class_features.description: Cast Polymorph once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Shroud of Shadow
class_features.description: Cast Invisibility at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Sign of Ill Omen
class_features.description: Cast Bestow Curse once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Thief of Five Fates
class_features.description: Cast Bane once using a warlock spell slot.

class_features.name: Thirsting Blade
class_features.description: Attack twice with your pact weapon, instead of once, whenever you take the Attack action.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, 5th level, requires Pact of the Blade

class_features.name: Tomb of Levistus
class_features.description: When you take damage, entomb yourself in ice for temporary HP equal to 10 per warlock level, absorbing as much of the triggering damage as possible; you then gain vulnerability to fire, speed 0, and are incapacitated until the ice melts at the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Trickster's Escape
class_features.description: Cast Freedom of Movement once on yourself without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Undying Servitude
class_features.description: Cast Animate Dead without using a spell slot.

class_features.name: Visions of Distant Realms
class_features.description: Cast Arcane Eye at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Voice of the Chain Master
class_features.description: Communicate telepathically with your familiar and perceive through its senses while on the same plane; can also speak through it in your own voice.
class_features.prerequisite: Eldritch Invocation, requires Pact of the Chain

class_features.name: Whispers of the Grave
class_features.description: Cast Speak with Dead at will without a spell slot.

class_features.name: Witch Sight
class_features.description: See the true form of any shapechanger or illusion/transmutation-concealed creature within 30 feet and line of sight.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Faerie Fire, Sleep, Calm Emotions, Phantasmal Force, Blink, Plant Growth, Dominate Beast, Greater Invisibility, Dominate Person, and Seeming to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Fey Presence
class_features.description: Force each creature in a 10-foot cube from you to make a Wisdom save or be charmed or frightened (your choice) until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Misty Escape
class_features.description: When you take damage, turn invisible and teleport up to 60 feet to an unoccupied space; remain invisible until the start of your next turn or until you attack/cast a spell.

class_features.name: Beguiling Defenses
class_features.description: Immune to being charmed; when a creature attempts to charm you, use your reaction to attempt to turn the charm back on it (Wisdom save against your spell save DC).

class_features.name: Dark Delirium
class_features.description: Force a creature within 60 feet to save or be charmed/frightened and trapped in an illusory realm for 1 minute or until your concentration ends; ends early if it takes damage.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Cure Wounds, Guiding Bolt, Flaming Sphere, Lesser Restoration, Daylight, Revivify, Guardian of Faith, Wall of Fire, Flame Strike, and Greater Restoration to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Bonus Cantrips
class_features.description: Learn the Light and Sacred Flame cantrips for free; don't count against cantrips known.

class_features.name: Healing Light
class_features.description: Spend d6s from a pool (1 + warlock level dice) to heal a creature within 60 feet; max dice per use equals your Charisma modifier (min 1).

class_features.name: Radiant Soul
class_features.description: Resistance to radiant damage; when you cast a spell dealing radiant or fire damage, add your Charisma modifier to one damage roll against one target.

class_features.name: Celestial Resilience
class_features.description: Gain temporary HP equal to warlock level + Charisma modifier after a short or long rest; up to five chosen creatures gain half that amount.

class_features.name: Searing Vengeance
class_features.description: Instead of making a death saving throw, spring back up with half your hit point maximum restored; nearby creatures of your choice within 30 feet take 2d8 + Charisma modifier radiant damage and are blinded until end of turn.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Create or Destroy Water, Thunderwave, Gust of Wind, Silence, Lightning Bolt, Sleet Storm, Control Water, Summon Elemental (water), Bigby's Hand, and Cone of Cold to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Tentacle of the Deeps
class_features.description: Summon a 10-foot spectral tentacle within 60 feet for 1 minute; make a melee spell attack against a creature within 10 feet of it (1d8 cold damage, 2d8 at 10th level, speed reduced 10 feet). Can move it 30 feet and attack again as a bonus action. Uses equal to proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Gift of the Sea
class_features.description: Gain a swimming speed of 40 feet and the ability to breathe underwater.

class_features.name: Oceanic Soul
class_features.description: Resistance to cold damage; while fully submerged, you and other fully-submerged creatures can understand each other's speech.

class_features.name: Guardian Coil
class_features.description: When you or a creature within 10 feet of your tentacle takes damage, use your reaction to reduce it by 1d8 (2d8 at 10th level).

class_features.name: Grasping Tentacles
class_features.description: Learn Evard's Black Tentacles for free (doesn't count against spells known); can cast it once without a spell slot, gaining temporary HP equal to your warlock level, and damage can't break your concentration on it.

class_features.name: Fathomless Plunge
class_features.description: Teleport yourself and up to five willing creatures within 30 feet up to 1 mile to a body of water you've seen (or within 30 feet of it).

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Burning Hands, Command, Blindness/Deafness, Scorching Ray, Fireball, Stinking Cloud, Fire Shield, Wall of Fire, Flame Strike, and Hallow to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Dark One's Blessing
class_features.description: When you reduce a hostile creature to 0 HP, gain temporary HP equal to your Charisma modifier + warlock level (minimum 1).

class_features.name: Dark One's Own Luck
class_features.description: Add a d10 to an ability check or saving throw after seeing the roll but before effects occur.

class_features.name: Fiendish Resilience
class_features.description: Choose a damage type after a short or long rest; gain resistance to it until you choose a different one. Magical/silver weapon damage ignores this resistance.

class_features.name: Hurl Through Hell
class_features.description: When you hit a creature with an attack, banish it through the lower planes until the end of your next turn; if it isn't a fiend, it takes 10d10 psychic damage upon returning.

class_features.name: Genie Kind
class_features.description: Choose your patron's genie kind (Dao/Earth, Djinni/Air, Efreeti/Fire, or Marid/Water), determining the element tied to your later features.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds a shared genie spell list plus spells specific to your patron's kind (dao/djinni/efreeti/marid) to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Genie's Vessel
class_features.description: Gain a magical vessel usable as a spellcasting focus. Bottled Respite: as an action, vanish into the vessel's extradimensional interior for up to twice your proficiency bonus in hours (once per long rest). Genie's Wrath: once per turn on a hit, deal extra damage equal to your proficiency bonus of a type determined by your patron's kind.

class_features.name: Elemental Gift
class_features.description: Gain resistance to a damage type tied to your patron's kind; as a bonus action, gain a 30-foot flying speed for 10 minutes (uses equal to proficiency bonus).

class_features.name: Sanctuary Vessel
class_features.description: Bottled Respite can now bring up to five willing creatures into the vessel with you; anyone inside for 10+ minutes gains the benefit of a short rest, with bonus Hit Dice healing equal to your proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Limited Wish
class_features.description: Request the effect of any 6th-level-or-lower spell with a casting time of 1 action from any class list, ignoring its requirements/costly components. Usable again only after 1d4 long rests.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Dissonant Whispers, Tasha's Hideous Laughter, Detect Thoughts, Phantasmal Force, Clairvoyance, Sending, Dominate Beast, Evard's Black Tentacles, Dominate Person, and Telekinesis to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Awakened Mind
class_features.description: Telepathically speak to any creature you can see within 30 feet, without needing a shared language (it must understand a language).

class_features.name: Entropic Ward
class_features.description: Impose disadvantage on an attack roll against you; if it misses, your next attack against that creature has advantage before the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Thought Shield
class_features.description: Your thoughts can't be read without permission; resistance to psychic damage, and creatures dealing psychic damage to you take the same amount.

class_features.name: Create Thrall
class_features.description: Touch an incapacitated humanoid to charm it indefinitely (until Remove Curse, the condition is removed, or you reuse this feature); can communicate telepathically with it on the same plane.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Shield, Wrathful Smite, Blur, Branding Smite, Blink, Elemental Weapon, Phantasmal Killer, Staggering Smite, Banishing Smite, and Cone of Cold to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Hexblade's Curse
class_features.description: Curse a creature within 30 feet for 1 minute: gain a damage bonus equal to your proficiency bonus against it, score a critical hit on a 19-20 against it, and regain HP equal to warlock level + Charisma modifier if it dies.

class_features.name: Hex Warrior
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with medium armor, shields, and martial weapons. Once per long rest, bond to a one-handed weapon to use Charisma instead of Strength/Dexterity for its attack and damage rolls; extends to pact weapons if you gain Pact of the Blade.

class_features.name: Accursed Specter
class_features.description: When you slay a humanoid, raise its spirit as a specter under your command (with temporary HP and a Charisma-based attack bonus) until your next long rest ends.

class_features.name: Armor of Hexes
class_features.description: If your Hexblade's Curse target hits you with an attack, roll a d6; on a 4+ the attack misses you entirely.

class_features.name: Master of Hexes
class_features.description: When your cursed creature dies, apply Hexblade's Curse to a new creature within 30 feet without regaining HP from the death.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Bane, False Life, Blindness/Deafness, Phantasmal Force, Phantom Steed, Speak with Dead, Death Ward, Greater Invisibility, Antilife Shell, and Cloudkill to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Form of Dread
class_features.description: Transform for 1 minute: gain temporary HP (1d10 + warlock level), once per turn force a hit creature to save or be frightened until end of your next turn, and become immune to frightened. Uses equal to proficiency bonus.

class_features.name: Grave Touched
class_features.description: You don't need to eat, drink, or breathe. Once per turn on a hit, replace the damage type with necrotic (rolling an extra die while in Form of Dread).

class_features.name: Necrotic Husk
class_features.description: Resistance to necrotic damage (immunity while in Form of Dread). When reduced to 0 HP, drop to 1 HP instead and deal 2d10 + warlock level necrotic damage to chosen creatures within 30 feet, then gain a level of exhaustion. Usable again only after 1d4 long rests.

class_features.name: Spirit Projection
class_features.description: Project your spirit from your unconscious body for up to 1 hour, gaining a flying speed, damage resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing, removed component costs for conjuration/necromancy spells, and healing from necrotic damage dealt while in Form of Dread.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds False Life, Ray of Sickness, Blindness/Deafness, Silence, Feign Death, Speak with Dead, Aura of Life, Death Ward, Contagion, and Legend Lore to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Among the Dead
class_features.description: Learn Spare the Dying for free; advantage on saves against disease. Undead targeting you directly must save or redirect their attack/spell elsewhere (immune to this effect for 24 hours after either outcome).

class_features.name: Defy Death
class_features.description: Regain HP equal to 1d8 + Constitution modifier when you succeed a death save or stabilize a creature with Spare the Dying.

class_features.name: Undying Nature
class_features.description: Hold your breath indefinitely; don't require food, water, or sleep (still need rest to remove exhaustion); age at one-tenth the normal rate and are immune to magical aging.

class_features.name: Indestructible Life
class_features.description: Regain HP equal to 1d8 + warlock level; reattach a severed body part if put back in place when used.

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Entangle, Magic Missile, Scorching Ray, See Invisibility, Blink, Nondetection, Arcane Eye, Black Tentacles, Mislead, and Telepathic Bond to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Eldritch Heads
class_features.description: Gain spectral heads (equal to proficiency bonus) visible only to you and truesight; expend a head once per turn on a hit for extra psychic damage (1 + proficiency bonus), to gain advantage on an Intimidation check, or to succeed a failed death save. Can also restore two heads as a bonus action once per long rest.

class_features.name: Guarded
class_features.description: While you have at least one eldritch head remaining, you can't be surprised, and an attacker doesn't gain advantage from having an ally adjacent to you.

class_features.name: Improved Eldritch Heads
class_features.description: Expend a head as a bonus action for 2d6 + Charisma modifier temporary HP, to take an extra reaction once per turn, or to reroll a failed save against being charmed/frightened/put to sleep.

class_features.name: Groupthink
class_features.description: Gain a bonus equal to half your proficiency bonus to Intelligence checks, Wisdom (Perception) checks, and Intelligence saving throws.

class_features.name: Eldritch Frenzy
class_features.description: Regain all expended eldritch heads; chosen creatures within 60 feet (up to the number regained) make an Intelligence save or take 4d8 psychic damage and are incapacitated until end of your next turn (half damage, no incapacitation on success).

class_features.name: Expanded Spell List
class_features.description: Adds Heroism, Sanctuary, Enhance Ability, Enlarge/Reduce, Haste, Spirit Guardians, Black Tentacles, Freedom of Movement, Contagion, and Dominate Person to your warlock spell list.

class_features.name: Parasitic Weapon
class_features.description: Manifest a parasitic melee spell-attack weapon (reach 5x proficiency bonus, 1d12 damage, no ability modifier added) usable with the Attack action; gains additional attacks at 5th/11th/17th level, and counts as magical starting at 6th level.

class_features.name: Symbiotic Reinforcement
class_features.description: Use Charisma instead of Strength for Strength saving throws; as a bonus action, manifest a shield in your free hand (+2 AC, +3 at 10th level) until dismissed or incapacitated.

class_features.name: Liquefied Body
class_features.description: Transform into a viscous liquid for 10 minutes: squeeze through 6-inch gaps and ignore difficult terrain.

class_features.name: Birth Parasite
class_features.description: Spend 1 minute extruding an independent parasitic ooze familiar (find familiar-like) with its own stat block; counts as a familiar for Pact of the Chain purposes.

class_features.name: Transmit Parasite
class_features.description: Command your parasitic ooze to detonate (forcing a Dexterity save for necrotic damage and blindness in a 10-foot radius) or attach to a willing creature to absorb damage on its behalf.

class_features.name: Virulent Form
class_features.description: For 1 minute: grow one size category, gain temporary HP each turn equal to your Charisma modifier, parasitic weapon damage increases to 2d8 and crits on 19-20, and you can make a reaction attack with it whenever you take damage in its reach.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: You maintain a spellbook of wizard spells. You know 3 cantrips, gaining more at higher levels. Your spellbook holds six 1st-level spells at 1st level, plus two more spells of a level you have slots for each time you gain a wizard level. You prepare a number of spells from your spellbook equal to your INT modifier + wizard level (minimum 1); prepared spells can be cast using any slot of that spell's level or higher. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + INT modifier; spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + INT modifier. Ritual-tagged spells in your spellbook can be cast as rituals without being prepared. An arcane focus can serve as your spellcasting focus.

class_features.name: Arcane Recovery
class_features.description: Once per day on finishing a short rest, recover expended spell slots with a combined level up to half your wizard level (rounded up); none of the recovered slots can be 6th level or higher.

class_features.name: Arcane Tradition
class_features.description: Choose a school of magic (Arcane Tradition) at 2nd level, granting features at 2nd, 6th, 10th, and 14th level.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead. Gained again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Spell Mastery
class_features.description: Choose a 1st-level and a 2nd-level wizard spell in your spellbook. While prepared, you can cast each at its lowest level without expending a spell slot. Casting at a higher level still costs a slot. After 8 hours of study, you can swap either chosen spell for a different one of the same level.

class_features.name: Signature Spells
class_features.description: Choose two 3rd-level wizard spells in your spellbook as signature spells. They are always prepared, don't count against your prepared spell total, and each can be cast once at 3rd level without expending a slot; once cast this way, that spell can't be cast for free again until a short or long rest. Casting at a higher level still costs a slot.

class_features.name: Cantrip Formulas
class_features.description: Optional feature. On finishing a long rest, you can swap one known wizard cantrip for a different one from the wizard spell list.

class_features.name: Training in War and Song
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with light armor, one one-handed melee weapon of your choice, and the Performance skill.

class_features.name: Bladesong
class_features.description: While not wearing medium/heavy armor or using a shield, spend a bonus action to activate Bladesong for 1 minute (ends early if incapacitated, donning medium/heavy armor or a shield, or attacking two-handed; can be dismissed free). While active: +AC equal to INT modifier (min +1), +10 ft walking speed, advantage on DEX (Acrobatics) checks, and a bonus equal to INT modifier (min +1) on concentration saves. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus, all uses restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice instead of once when you take the Attack action; you can substitute one of those attacks for a cantrip you know.

class_features.name: Song of Defense
class_features.description: While Bladesong is active, when you take damage you can use your reaction and expend a spell slot to reduce that damage by 5 times the slot's level.

class_features.name: Song of Victory
class_features.description: While Bladesong is active, add your INT modifier (min +1) to the damage of your melee weapon attacks.

class_features.name: Wizardly Quill
class_features.description: Conjure a magic quill in your free hand that writes in ink of any color with no ink needed, halves the time to copy a spell into your spellbook (2 min/level when used), and can erase its own writing as a bonus action within 5 feet. Disappears if you make a new one or die.

class_features.name: Awakened Spellbook
class_features.description: While holding your spellbook: it serves as a spellcasting focus; when casting a spell with a slot, you can swap its damage type for one matching a same-level spell in your book for that casting only; and casting a ritual spell from it skips the +10 minute ritual tax once per long rest. The book can be replaced over a short rest using the Wizardly Quill if lost or destroyed.

class_features.name: Manifest Mind
class_features.description: While your spellbook is on you, manifest its mind as an intangible Tiny spectral object within 60 feet, with darkvision 60 ft that you can perceive through telepathically. You can cast wizard spells from its location instead of your own, a number of times per day equal to proficiency bonus (all restored on long rest, or by spending a spell slot of any level to re-summon early). Move it up to 30 feet as a bonus action; it ends if more than 300 feet away, dispelled, the book is destroyed, you die, or you dismiss it.

class_features.name: Master Scrivener
class_features.description: On finishing a long rest, create one magic scroll containing a 1st- or 2nd-level spell with a 1-action casting time from your Awakened Spellbook (must be within 5 feet during creation); the scroll's spell counts one level higher and can be cast by reading it as an action, vanishing on cast or at your next long rest. Crafting normal spell scrolls also costs half the usual gold/time with the Wizardly Quill.

class_features.name: One with the Word
class_features.description: While holding your spellbook, advantage on INT (Arcana) checks. If you take damage while the spellbook's mind is manifested, use your reaction to dismiss the mind and prevent all that damage; roll 3d6, and the book temporarily loses spells of your choosing with combined levels equal to or exceeding the roll (you drop to 0 HP if it can't cover the cost). Lost spells can't be cast until you finish 1d6 long rests.

class_features.name: Abjuration Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy an abjuration spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Arcane Ward
class_features.description: When you cast an abjuration spell of 1st level or higher, create a ward on yourself with HP equal to twice your wizard level + INT modifier (once per long rest). The ward absorbs damage you'd take until it hits 0; while at 0 it can't absorb damage but regains HP equal to twice the level of each abjuration spell you cast afterward.

class_features.name: Projected Ward
class_features.description: When a creature you can see within 30 feet takes damage, use your reaction to have your Arcane Ward absorb that damage instead.

class_features.name: Improved Abjuration
class_features.description: Add your proficiency bonus to ability checks made as part of casting an abjuration spell (e.g. counterspell, dispel magic).

class_features.name: Spell Resistance
class_features.description: Advantage on saving throws against spells, and resistance to spell damage.

class_features.name: Conjuration Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy a conjuration spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Minor Conjuration
class_features.description: Conjure a nonmagical object you've seen (up to 3 ft per side, 10 lbs) in your hand or within 10 feet, visibly magical and dimly lit. Vanishes after 1 hour, on reuse, or if it takes/deals damage.

class_features.name: Benign Transposition
class_features.description: Teleport up to 30 feet to an unoccupied space you can see, or swap places with a willing Small/Medium creature in range. Usable once until a long rest or until you cast a conjuration spell of 1st level or higher.

class_features.name: Focused Conjuration
class_features.description: Your concentration on a conjuration spell can't be broken by taking damage.

class_features.name: Durable Summons
class_features.description: Any creature you summon or create with a conjuration spell gains 30 temporary hit points.

class_features.name: Divination Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy a divination spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Portent
class_features.description: On finishing a long rest, roll two d20s and record the results. Before any attack roll, save, or check made by you or a creature you can see, you may replace the roll with one of these foretelling rolls (once per turn). Unused rolls are lost at the next long rest.

class_features.name: Expert Divination
class_features.description: When you cast a divination spell of 2nd level or higher with a slot, regain an expended slot of a lower level (max 5th).

class_features.name: The Third Eye
class_features.description: Gain one benefit of your choice until incapacitated or you rest: 60 ft darkvision, ethereal sight within 60 ft, ability to read any language, or seeing invisible creatures/objects within 10 feet.

class_features.name: Greater Portent
class_features.description: Roll three d20s for Portent instead of two.

class_features.name: Enchantment Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy an enchantment spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Hypnotic Gaze
class_features.description: Target a creature within 5 feet that can see/hear you; it must succeed on a WIS save vs your spell DC or be charmed (speed 0, incapacitated, dazed) until the end of your next turn. Maintain it on later turns with your action as long as you stay within 5 feet and it can see/hear you; ends if it takes damage. Can't reuse on the same creature until a long rest once the effect ends or the save succeeds.

class_features.name: Instinctive Charm
class_features.description: When a creature within 30 feet attacks you, force a WIS save vs your spell DC (if another valid target is in range); on a failure the attacker must redirect the attack to the nearest other creature. On a success, you can't use this on that attacker again until a long rest. Must decide before knowing hit/miss; immune creatures unaffected.

class_features.name: Split Enchantment
class_features.description: When you cast a single-target enchantment spell of 1st level or higher, you can target a second creature with it as well.

class_features.name: Alter Memories
class_features.description: When you charm a creature with an enchantment spell, you can make it unaware it was charmed. Once before the spell ends, force an INT save vs your spell DC or the creature loses 1 + your CHA modifier (min 1) hours of memory from the charmed period, up to the spell's duration.

class_features.name: Evocation Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy an evocation spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Sculpt Spells
class_features.description: When you cast an evocation spell affecting multiple creatures you can see, choose a number of them up to 1 + the spell's level; those creatures automatically succeed their save and take no damage on a save that would normally halve it.

class_features.name: Potent Cantrip
class_features.description: When a creature succeeds on a save against your damaging cantrip, it still takes half the cantrip's damage but suffers no other effect.

class_features.name: Empowered Evocation
class_features.description: Add your INT modifier to one damage roll of any wizard evocation spell you cast.

class_features.name: Overchannel
class_features.description: When you cast a wizard spell of 1st-5th level that deals damage, you can deal maximum damage instead of rolling. First use in a day is free; each subsequent use before a long rest deals you necrotic damage equal to 2d12 per spell level, increasing by 1d12 per spell level each additional use; this damage ignores resistance/immunity.

class_features.name: Illusion Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy an illusion spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Improved Minor Illusion
class_features.description: Learn the minor illusion cantrip (or a different cantrip if already known) without it counting against cantrips known. Casting minor illusion lets you create both a sound and an image with one casting.

class_features.name: Malleable Illusions
class_features.description: While you can see an illusion spell you cast with a duration of 1 minute or longer, use your action to change its nature within the spell's normal parameters.

class_features.name: Illusory Self
class_features.description: When attacked, use your reaction to interpose an illusory duplicate; the attack automatically misses, then the illusion dissipates. Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Illusory Reality
class_features.description: While an illusion spell of 1st level or higher you cast is ongoing, choose one inanimate nonmagical object that's part of it and make it real as a bonus action; it remains real for 1 minute and can't deal damage or otherwise directly harm anyone.

class_features.name: Necromancy Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy a necromancy spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Grim Harvest
class_features.description: Once per turn, when you kill a creature with a spell of 1st level or higher, regain HP equal to twice the spell's level (three times if it's a necromancy spell). No benefit for killing constructs or undead.

class_features.name: Undead Thralls
class_features.description: Add animate dead to your spellbook for free if not already there. When you cast it, target one additional corpse/pile of bones. Undead you create with a necromancy spell get +HP equal to your wizard level and add your proficiency bonus to their weapon damage rolls.

class_features.name: Inured to Undeath
class_features.description: Resistance to necrotic damage, and your hit point maximum can't be reduced.

class_features.name: Command Undead
class_features.description: Target an undead you can see within 60 feet, forcing a CHA save vs your spell DC. On a failure, it becomes friendly and obeys you until you use this again; on a success you can't target it again. Intelligent undead (INT 8+) have advantage; if INT 12+ they can repeat the save hourly to break free.

class_features.name: Transmutation Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time cost to copy a transmutation spell into your spellbook.

class_features.name: Minor Alchemy
class_features.description: Transform up to 1 cubic foot of wood, stone, iron, copper, or silver into a different one of those materials per 10 minutes spent; reverts after 1 hour or loss of concentration.

class_features.name: Transmuter's Stone
class_features.description: Spend 8 hours creating a transmuter's stone granting its holder one chosen benefit: 60 ft darkvision, +10 ft speed (unencumbered), proficiency in CON saves, or resistance to acid/cold/fire/lightning/thunder (chosen on creation). You can change the benefit when you cast a transmutation spell while holding the stone. Creating a new stone ends the old one.

class_features.name: Shapechanger
class_features.description: Add polymorph to your spellbook for free if not already there. You can cast it on yourself only, turning into a beast of CR 1 or lower, without expending a slot; usable once until a short or long rest (still castable normally with a slot afterward).

class_features.name: Master Transmuter
class_features.description: Consume your transmuter's stone (destroyed until next long rest) for one effect: transmute a nonmagical object (up to 5-ft cube) into another of similar size/value over 10 minutes; remove all curses/diseases/poisons and fully heal a touched creature; cast raise dead on a touched creature for free; or reduce a touched willing creature's apparent age by 3d10 years (min 13).

class_features.name: Arcane Deflection
class_features.description: When hit by an attack or you fail a save, use your reaction for +2 AC against that attack or +4 to that save. Using this prevents you from casting spells other than cantrips until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Tactical Wit
class_features.description: Add your INT modifier to initiative rolls.

class_features.name: Power Surge
class_features.description: Store up to INT modifier (min 1) power surges; resets to 1 on a long rest, gain one by successfully countering/dispelling a spell, or by ending a short rest with none. Once per turn when you damage a creature/object with a wizard spell, spend one power surge to deal extra force damage equal to half your wizard level.

class_features.name: Durable Magic
class_features.description: While concentrating on a spell, gain +2 AC and +2 to all saving throws.

class_features.name: Deflecting Shroud
class_features.description: Whenever you use Arcane Deflection, up to three creatures of your choice within 60 feet each take force damage equal to half your wizard level.

class_features.name: Blood Channeling
class_features.description: While below max HP, you can use your own body as an arcane focus. When casting a spell with a costly material component, you can forgo the component by taking 1d10 necrotic damage per 50 gp of cost (min 1d10, can't be reduced); if this drops you to 0 HP the spell fails but the slot isn't spent.

class_features.name: Sanguine Burst
class_features.description: When rolling damage for a spell of 1st level or higher, take necrotic damage equal to the spell's level (can't be reduced) to reroll up to INT modifier (min 1) damage dice, and you must use the new rolls.

class_features.name: Bond of Mutual Suffering
class_features.description: When a creature you can see hits you, use your reaction to make the attacker take damage equal to the damage you just took. Doesn't work against constructs/undead. Usable once between rests (twice at 14th level).

class_features.name: Glyph of Hemorrhaging
class_features.description: When you damage a creature with a spell, curse it for 1 minute: whenever it's hit by an attack it takes an extra 1d6 necrotic damage. It can end the curse early with a successful CON save at the end of each of its turns. Doesn't work against constructs/undead. Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Thicker than Water
class_features.description: Whenever a spell/magic effect heals you, regain additional HP equal to your proficiency bonus. While concentrating on a spell, resistance to nonmagical bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage.

class_features.name: Chronal Shift
class_features.description: After you or a creature within 30 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or save, force a reroll using your reaction (decided after seeing the result); the target must use the new result. Usable twice, restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Temporal Awareness
class_features.description: Add your INT modifier to initiative rolls.

class_features.name: Momentary Stasis
class_features.description: Force a Large or smaller creature within 60 feet to make a CON save vs your spell DC or be encased in stasis (incapacitated, speed 0) until the end of your next turn or until it takes damage. Usable a number of times equal to INT modifier (min 1), restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Arcane Abeyance
class_features.description: When you cast a spell with a 4th-level or lower slot, condense it into a Tiny gray bead (AC 15, 1 HP, immune to poison/psychic) that holds the spell frozen for 1 hour. Any creature can use an action to release the spell, which uses your attack bonus/DC and treats them as the caster. Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Convergent Future
class_features.description: When you or a creature within 60 feet makes an attack roll, ability check, or save, use your reaction to ignore the die roll and set it to either the minimum needed to succeed or one less than that. Using this gives you one level of exhaustion, removable only by a long rest.

class_features.name: Adjust Density
class_features.description: Halve or double the weight of a Large or smaller object/creature within 30 feet for up to 1 minute or until concentration ends. Halved weight: +10 ft speed, double jump distance, disadvantage on STR checks/saves. Doubled weight: -10 ft speed, advantage on STR checks/saves. At 10th level, can target Huge or smaller.

class_features.name: Gravity Well
class_features.description: Whenever you cast a spell on a creature that hits it with an attack, fails a save against it, or is willing to move, you can move that target 5 feet to an unoccupied space.

class_features.name: Violent Attraction
class_features.description: When a creature you can see within 60 feet hits with a weapon attack, use your reaction to add an extra 1d10 damage of that weapon's type. Alternatively, increase a creature's fall damage within 60 feet by 2d10. Usable a number of times equal to INT modifier (min 1), restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Event Horizon
class_features.description: Emit a gravity field for up to 1 minute or until concentration ends; hostile creatures starting their turn within 30 feet must make a STR save or take 2d10 force damage and have speed reduced to 0 until their next turn (half damage and double movement cost per foot moved on a success). Usable once until a long rest, or again by expending a 3rd-level+ spell slot.

class_features.name: Biomancy Savant
class_features.description: Halve the gold and time to copy a biomancy spell into your spellbook; gain proficiency with surgeon's tools. Certain listed spells (false life, longstrider, alter self, darkvision, spider climb, haste, water breathing, stoneskin, flesh to stone, simulacrum, shapechange) count as biomancy spells for you instead of their normal school.

class_features.name: Biostimulation
class_features.description: When you cast a biomancy spell of 1st level or higher with a slot, you or the target (your choice) regains HP equal to twice the spell's level.

class_features.name: Self Improvement
class_features.description: Spend 1 hour performing surgery on yourself to gain a bio-magical improvement chosen from a list (tripled jump distance, extra grasping appendage, detachable servant hand, light cantrip + blinding flash, 120 ft darkvision, grapple disadvantage from slime, +1 AC unarmored, +1d4 initiative, a natural slashing talon, +10 ft speed and prone-resistance, or at-will enlarge/reduce on self). You can sustain 1 improvement at a time (2 at 10th level, 3 at 14th level); gaining a new one past your max forces you to drop an old one.

class_features.name: Spell Splitter
class_features.description: When you cast a wizard spell that targets only one creature and doesn't have range self, you can simultaneously target yourself with it too. Usable a number of times equal to INT modifier (min 1), restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Endocrine Overload
class_features.description: Spend 1 hour crafting a stimulant capsule (Brutish or Swift archetype); crack it as a bonus action for a 1-minute transformation. Brutish: grow to Large, STR matches INT if lower, advantage on STR/CON checks and saves, grow a 2d10 melee natural weapon, extra attack (ignored if you already have Extra Attack), temp HP each turn. Swift: DEX matches INT if lower, advantage on DEX checks/saves, cantrips can be cast as a bonus action, gain haste's benefits (undispellable). When the minute ends you gain one exhaustion level and can't move/act until the end of your next turn; must craft a new capsule before reuse.

class_features.name: Core Wand
class_features.description: Create a personal core wand usable as your spellcasting focus, summonable to your hand as a bonus action; remakeable in 8 hours if destroyed. The wand holds up to 7 core charges (resets to 1 on a long rest); expending a slot to cast a 1st-level+ spell while holding it grants charges equal to half the spell's level (min 1). Spend any number of charges on an attack roll/save for an equal bonus (can decide after the d20 roll but before the result is known), or as a reaction when hit to gain equal AC bonus against that attack.

class_features.name: Wand Savant
class_features.description: Copy a wizard-list spell from a staff/wand you possess into your spellbook as if copying from a scroll. While holding your core wand, touch-range wizard spells can instead target a visible, non-covered creature up to 10 feet away (30 feet at 14th level).

class_features.name: Arcane Battery
class_features.description: Using Arcane Recovery also regains 3 core charges on your wand. You can also expend up to 3 core charges, while holding the wand and casting a single-target save-forcing spell, to add an equal bonus to that spell's save DC.

class_features.name: Imbue Minor Wand
class_features.description: On finishing a long rest, imbue up to INT modifier (min 1) wizard spellbook spells (cantrips/1st/2nd level, 1-action or bonus-action, non-concentration, no costly/consumed material components, non-damaging if a cantrip) into a Tiny stick, creating a temporary magic wand with charges equal to your INT modifier (min 1) - cantrips cost 0, 1st-level 1, 2nd-level 2. Anyone holding it can cast from it as an action using your DC/attack bonus/ability. Stops being magical at your next long rest.

class_features.name: Manifest Charges
class_features.description: As a bonus action, expend core charges to create that many magical force motes, each striking a different target within 60 feet for 1d4 + INT modifier force damage. As a reaction when you or a creature within 30 feet takes damage, expend core charges to reduce that damage by 3 times the charges spent. Also, expending the last charge of a staff/wand never requires a d20 check, and crafting a magic wand costs half the usual gold/time.

class_features.name: Fisticuffs
class_features.description: While unarmed or wielding only Pugilist weapons (simple melee/improvised), wearing light or no armor, no shield: gain a bonus Unarmed Strike as a bonus action; roll a Fisticuffs die (1d8, scaling to 1d10 at 5th, 1d12 at 11th, 2d6 at 17th) in place of normal unarmed/Pugilist weapon damage; and improvised weapons gain the Sap weapon mastery property for you.

class_features.name: Iron Chin
class_features.description: While wearing light or no armor and no shield, base AC = 12 + CON modifier (an alternative to the normal 10 + DEX or armor formula; choose whichever is higher).

class_features.name: Moxie
class_features.description: Gain a pool of Moxie Points (2 at 2nd level, scaling by level per the class table up to 12 at 20th) usable to fuel three known features: Brace Up (bonus action, spend 1 point, roll Fisticuffs die for temp HP equal to roll + Pugilist level + CON modifier, lasting 10 minutes), One-Two Punch (spend 1 point to make two Unarmed Strikes as a bonus action), and Stick and Move (bonus action, spend 1 point, make an Unarmed Strike and Dash or Disengage). All expended points restore on a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Bloodied But Unbowed
class_features.description: When you take damage, use your reaction to regain all expended Moxie Points; if Bloodied (at or below half HP) when you do, also gain temp HP equal to 4 times your Pugilist level (lasts until your next short rest). Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Swagger Streak
class_features.description: When you fail a STR, DEX, CON, or CHA check, spend a Moxie Point to roll your Fisticuffs die and add it to the check, potentially turning it into a success. If it still fails, the point is refunded but this can't be used again until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Heavy Hitter
class_features.description: When you hit with an Unarmed Strike, you can apply both its damage and your choice of the Grapple or Shove option in the same attack.

class_features.name: Pugilist Subclass
class_features.description: Choose a Pugilist subclass, granting features at 3rd, 6th, 11th, and 17th level.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Gain a feat (typically Ability Score Improvement) of your choice. Gained again at 8th, 12th, and 16th level.

class_features.name: Dig Deep
class_features.description: For 10 minutes, gain resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage and ignore the effects of exhaustion levels below 6. Usable once until a long rest, or restore its use early by taking 1 exhaustion level.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Haymaker
class_features.description: When attacking with an Unarmed Strike or Pugilist weapon, spend 1 Moxie Point to swing wildly; on a hit, regain the point and deal maximum damage with that attack.

class_features.name: Moxie-Fueled Fists
class_features.description: Damage from your Unarmed Strike or an improvised weapon attack can be your choice of force damage or its normal type.

class_features.name: Down But Not Out
class_features.description: When you use Bloodied But Unbowed while Bloodied, gain a damage bonus on your Unarmed Strikes/Pugilist weapon attacks for the next minute equal to CON modifier + your current exhaustion levels. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: School of Hard Knocks
class_features.description: Once per turn when you hit with an Unarmed Strike or Pugilist weapon, deal an extra 1d12 damage of the same type, or forgo it to either: Endanger (the next attack against the target deals max damage instead of rolling) or Provoke (target has disadvantage on attacks against creatures other than you until the end of your next turn).

class_features.name: Herculean
class_features.description: STR score doubles for carrying capacity; an Unarmed Strike that hits an object is automatically a critical hit; jump distance is doubled.

class_features.name: Shake It Off
class_features.description: At the start of each of your turns, you can remove one exhaustion level or end one condition on yourself (blinded, charmed, deafened, frightened, paralyzed, poisoned, restrained, or stunned). Usable once until a long rest, or restore its use early by taking 1 exhaustion level.

class_features.name: Dig Deeper
class_features.description: For 1 minute, gain all benefits of Dig Deep and can use School of Hard Knocks twice per turn instead of once. Usable once until a long rest (twice at 20th level).

class_features.name: Unbreakable
class_features.description: Advantage on STR, DEX, and CON saves. Additionally, when you fail a save, you can spend 1 Moxie Point to reroll it and must use the new result.

class_features.name: Pugnacious
class_features.description: When you roll initiative, remove one exhaustion level and regain all uses of Down But Not Out, Dig Deep, and Shake It Off. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Fighting Spirit
class_features.description: When reduced to 0 HP but not killed outright, you can drop to 1 HP instead, gain temp HP equal to half your max HP, regain all expended Moxie Points, and gain resistance to all damage except force for 1 minute. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Epic Boon
class_features.description: Gain an Epic Boon feat (Boon of Combat Prowess recommended) or another feat you qualify for.

class_features.name: Peak Physical Condition
class_features.description: STR and CON scores increase by 2 (max 23). On finishing a long rest, lose all exhaustion levels. On finishing a short rest, regain HP equal to twice your Pugilist level.

class_features.name: Brawler's Best Friend
class_features.description: Summon and bond with a Hound companion (AC 12 + your CON modifier, HP 5 + 5x Pugilist level, uses Pugilist-level d8 Hit Dice, speed 40 ft, Bite attack scaling with your stats). It acts on your turn, defaulting to Dodge unless you use a bonus action to command another action, or sacrifice one of your own attacks to command its Bite. If incapacitated, it acts independently. If it died within the last hour, spend a Magic action and 2 Moxie Points to touch it and fully revive it after 1 minute. On finishing a long rest you can summon a fresh hound, replacing any existing one.

class_features.name: Mutt with Moxie
class_features.description: Your hound benefits when you use your Moxie features: Brace Up also grants it the same temp HP; One-Two Punch lets it make one or both attacks instead of you; Stick and Move lets it Dash, Disengage, or Help instead.

class_features.name: Coordinated Attack
class_features.description: When you attack a creature within 5 feet of your hound, it can use its reaction to give your attack advantage; on a hit you deal an extra 3d4 damage. Your hound's attacks can also deal force damage instead of normal type.

class_features.name: Hound's Best Friend
class_features.description: When a creature damages your hound, use your reaction to move up to half your speed and make one melee attack with a Pugilist weapon or Unarmed Strike against that creature.

class_features.name: Off the Chain
class_features.description: When your hound becomes Bloodied or takes damage while already Bloodied, use your reaction to grant it temp HP equal to 5 times your Pugilist level; for the next minute its speed increases 15 feet and it can use its Bite without a bonus action command. Usable once until a long rest, or restore early by spending 3 Moxie Points.

class_features.name: Black Magic
class_features.description: Learn two Warlock cantrips (using CON as spellcasting ability). Choose a 1st-level Warlock spell, always prepared, castable once per long rest without a slot (or with any slot you have). You can swap a chosen spell for a different one of the same level whenever you level up.

class_features.name: Dread Hand
class_features.description: When you take the Attack action, manifest a monstrous limb for 1 minute granting: Revenging Strike (reaction Unarmed Strike against a melee attacker in reach), Unslakeable Bloodlust (roll Unarmed Strike damage dice twice and use either), and Whirlwind of Violence (reroll your first missed Unarmed Strike each turn, must use new result). Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Deal with the Devil
class_features.description: Choose one option (changeable each long rest): Cloak of Shadows (cast Invisibility once per short/long rest without a slot), Mask of Many Faces (cast Disguise Self without a slot, unlimited), or Otherworldly Walk (cast Misty Step once per short/long rest without a slot).

class_features.name: Grotesque Growth
class_features.description: When using Dread Hand, also gain the benefits of the Enlarge effect (from enlarge/reduce) and 10-foot reach. Usable once until a long rest, or restore early by taking 1 exhaustion level.

class_features.name: Fountain of Viscera
class_features.description: Spend a Magic action and 6 Moxie Points to attempt to execute a creature within reach (DEX save vs 8 + STR modifier + proficiency bonus, 100 piercing damage on a failure, 50 on a success). If this reduces the target to 0 HP, it dies graphically and each creature of your choice within a 30-foot emanation must succeed on a WIS save (same DC) or be frightened for 1 minute (repeatable save each turn). Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Bad Attitude
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Intimidation if you lack it, plus a bonus to Intimidation checks equal to your STR modifier (min +1).

class_features.name: Salty Salute
class_features.description: Provoke a creature within 60 feet that can see/hear you; on a failed WIS save (DC 8 + CON modifier + proficiency bonus) it takes psychic damage equal to your Fisticuffs die + CON modifier and has disadvantage on attacks against creatures other than you until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Dirty Tricks
class_features.description: Once per turn, use one Dirty Trick (each individually usable once until a short or long rest): Heelstomper (hit creature's speed drops to 0 for 1 minute unless it succeeds a DEX save, repeatable), Low Blow (hit creature grants attackers advantage against it until your next turn unless it succeeds a STR save), or Pocket Sand (bonus action, blind a creature within 10 feet for a round unless it succeeds a CON save).

class_features.name: Mean Old Cuss
class_features.description: Target up to your Pugilist level worth of creatures within 30 feet that can see/hear you; each makes a WIS save (DC 8 + CON modifier + proficiency bonus) or takes psychic damage equal to your Fisticuffs die + CON modifier and has disadvantage on attacks against others until the start of your next turn. Usable once until a short or long rest, or restore early by spending 3 Moxie Points.

class_features.name: Dirtier Tricks
class_features.description: Gain two more Dirty Tricks (each individually usable once until a short or long rest): Rabbit Punch (hit creature loses psychic resistance and has disadvantage on saves until your next turn) and Sucker Punch (turn a hit into a critical hit, rolling damage dice three times instead of two).

class_features.name: Groundwork
class_features.description: Compression Lock: at the start of your turn, deal Fisticuffs die + STR modifier bludgeoning damage to each creature you have grappled (no action). Inescapable: spend 1 Moxie Point to give disadvantage on a save/check made against your grapple/shove DC. Stop and Drop: hitting with an Unarmed Strike without using a mastery property lets you apply both the Grapple and Shove option.

class_features.name: Muscle Mass
class_features.description: Choose Acrobatics or Athletics: gain proficiency if you lack it, or Expertise if you already have proficiency.

class_features.name: Meat Shield
class_features.description: While you have a creature grappled, gain half cover against attacks from creatures you aren't grappling. When such a creature misses you with an attack, spend 1 Moxie Point as a reaction to force it to reroll that same attack against a creature you are grappling instead.

class_features.name: Heavyweight
class_features.description: When using the Grapple or Shove option of your Unarmed Strike, count as one size larger. You don't need extra movement to drag a grappled creature your size or smaller.

class_features.name: Clean Finish
class_features.description: When a creature grappled by you ends its turn, use your reaction to force a CON save against your grapple's escape DC or it becomes incapacitated until the end of its next turn; if it's Bloodied and already incapacitated this way, its HP drops to 0 instead. Once you reduce a creature to 0 HP this way, can't use this again until a long rest.

class_features.name: Channel Divinity
class_features.description: Choose one of two effects: Fists of Faith (for 1 minute, Unarmed Strikes deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage, 2d4 against fiends/undead) or Grace of the Gods (for 1 minute, resistance to necrotic damage, and add 1d4 to any saving throw you make). Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Lay On Hands
class_features.description: Healing pool of HP equal to 3 times your Pugilist level, refilled on a long rest. As a bonus action, touch a creature (including yourself) to restore HP up to the remaining pool, or spend 5 points to remove the poisoned condition (no healing from that use).

class_features.name: Ravaged But Resolute
class_features.description: When you use Bloodied But Unbowed, fully replenish your Lay On Hands pool. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Aura of Resilience
class_features.description: When you use Dig Deep, radiate a 10-foot protective emanation for 10 minutes (inactive while incapacitated); allies within gain resistance to bludgeoning/piercing/slashing damage. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Hallowed Hands
class_features.description: Once per turn when you hit with an Unarmed Strike or Pugilist weapon, spend points from your Lay On Hands pool (up to your Pugilist level) to deal that much extra radiant damage, doubled if the target is a fiend or undead.

class_features.name: Bare Knuckle Boxer
class_features.description: Unarmed Strike attack rolls score a critical hit on a roll of 19 or 20.

class_features.name: Cross Counter
class_features.description: When you take melee attack damage, spend 1 Moxie Point as a reaction to reduce that damage by 1d10 + STR modifier + Pugilist level. If reduced to 0, also make an Unarmed Strike or Pugilist weapon attack against a creature in reach as part of the same reaction.

class_features.name: Combo Maker
class_features.description: When you damage a creature with an Unarmed Strike, instead of using the Grapple/Shove option from Heavy Hitter, you can gain advantage on attacks against that target until the start of your next turn.

class_features.name: Combo Breaker
class_features.description: When you use Cross Counter and reduce the triggering damage to 0, regain 1 Moxie Point.

class_features.name: Knock Out
class_features.description: Coldcock: when you score a critical hit, the target must succeed a CON save (DC 8 + STR modifier + proficiency bonus) or be unconscious for 1 minute or until it takes damage. Uppercut: when you hit with an Unarmed Strike, spend 1 Moxie Point as a reaction to make that attack a critical hit; usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Baleful Interdict
class_features.description: Once per turn, place an invisible seal on a creature within 30 feet (free on a weapon hit, or as a bonus action otherwise), lasting 1 minute or until burned. You have a limited pool of seals (3 at 1st level, scaling per the class table to 7 at 20th), regained on a short or long rest. If a sealed creature dies, move its seals to a new target within 30 feet as a bonus action. Burning Seals: when a sealed creature you can see within 30 feet takes damage from another source, burn any number of its seals (no action) to deal 1d6 fire or necrotic damage (your choice) per seal, scaling to 2d6 at 5th level, 3d6 at 11th, 4d6 at 20th. Interdict save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + CHA modifier.

class_features.name: Forked Tongue
class_features.description: Speak, read, and write Infernal. Speak (but not read/write) two other languages of choice, swappable on a long rest. At 9th level, gain a third bonus language and advantage on WIS (Insight) checks to discern intentions/sincerity.

class_features.name: Combat Mastery
class_features.description: Choose one combat mastery: Bravado (unarmored AC = 10 + DEX + CHA modifier, shield still usable), Brutal (push a hit target up to one size larger 5 feet with a two-handed melee weapon), Inexorable (+1 save bonus per hostile creature within 5 feet, max +5), Lies (use CHA instead of STR/DEX for one chosen melee weapon type's attack/damage, swappable on a long rest), Lissome (move 5 feet without opportunity attacks after a melee hit), or Unfettered (Baleful Interdict range becomes 60 feet, Infernal Conduit range becomes 30 feet at 6th level, and ranged attacks within 5 feet of a hostile creature avoid disadvantage).

class_features.name: Interdiction
class_features.description: Learn interdict boons (special enhancements to your seals); know 1 at 2nd level, gaining more per the class table. Boons can be swapped when you level up. Passive boons apply automatically; others must be activated (only one non-passive boon per turn).

class_features.name: Diabolic Contract
class_features.description: Choose an archdevil patron subclass (Architect of Ruin, Hellspeaker, Painkiller, Sanguine Knight, or Shadowmaster), granting features at 3rd, 7th, 11th, and 15th level.

class_features.name: Invoke Hell
class_features.description: Use one of two diabolic-contract-granted Invoke Hell options, chosen at time of use. Usable once until a short or long rest. Effects requiring a save use your interdict save DC.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead. Gained again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Infernal Conduit
class_features.description: Touch a creature (action) and spend one or more d10s from your Infernal Conduit dice pool (size scaling by level per the class table); the target makes a CON save vs your interdict save DC (can willingly fail). Choose Invigorate (heal the target the rolled total, you take that much necrotic damage, can't be reduced, half on a successful save) or Devour (target takes that necrotic damage, you heal that much, half on a successful save; at 11th level a failed save also adds an exhaustion level, capped at 3 combined from all illriggers' use of this feature). All dice restore on a long rest.

class_features.name: Blood Price
class_features.description: Whenever you fail a saving throw, you can spend a Hit Die, rolling it and adding the result to that save.

class_features.name: Terrorizing Force
class_features.description: Choose a damage type (cold, fire, necrotic, or poison), swappable on a long rest; weapon attacks deal an extra 1d8 of that type.

class_features.name: Superior Interdict
