class_features.description: Seal damage ignores damage resistances. As a bonus action, if you have no seals remaining, regain one; usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Infernal Majesty
class_features.description: For 10 minutes: resistance to fire/cold/necrotic damage, a 60 ft flight speed from spectral wings, Blood Price's Hit Die also damages a nearby enemy, and Terrorizing Force deals 2d8 instead of 1d8. If you die during the duration, your body can vanish in flame and reform in Hell 1d6 days later, returning you to life at full HP. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Master of Hell
class_features.description: Summon a 50-ft-radius hellstorm within 150 feet, choosing one effect: Inferno (DEX save, 5d10 fire + 5d10 necrotic and burning for 1 minute on a failure, half and no burning on a success; burning deals 1d10 fire + 1d10 necrotic each turn until a save succeeds), Pestilence (CON save, 5d10 poison + 5d10 necrotic and poisoned for 1 minute on a failure, half on a success), or Darkness (CON save, 10d10 cold on a failure / half on a success, plus 1 minute of blindness and gloom in the area). Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Asmodeus's Blessing
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in one of Arcana, History, Nature, or Religion. Your Forked Tongue bonus languages can now also be read and written, not just spoken.

class_features.name: Spellcasting
class_features.description: Gain illrigger spellcasting using CHA as your spellcasting ability. Know 2 cantrips (3 more at 10th level) and a growing number of 1st-4th level spells known with dedicated spell slots, per the Architect of Ruin Spellcasting table; slots are regained on a long rest. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + CHA modifier; spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + CHA modifier. An unholy symbol serves as your spellcasting focus. You can swap one known spell for another whenever you level up.

class_features.name: Invoke Hell: Architect of Ruin
class_features.description: Grants two Invoke Hell options: Enervating Spell (when you damage a creature with an illrigger spell, expend a seal to give it vulnerability to that spell's damage, suppressing any resistance/immunity it has to that damage type instead) and Spellblade (use an action to both make a melee weapon attack and cast a known illrigger spell with a 1-action casting time).

class_features.name: Hellish Versatility
class_features.description: Once per turn, cast a known illrigger cantrip in place of one of your Extra Attack attacks.

class_features.name: Asmodeus's Interdiction
class_features.description: Learn bonus interdict boons that don't count against your known total: Axiomatic Seals (7th, passive: add CHA modifier, min 1, to burned-seal damage), Spellbreaker (13th: react to an interdicted creature's spellcast within 60 feet by burning a seal to cast counterspell on it for free, level increasing per extra seal burned), and Hell Mage (18th, passive: when you or a nearby ally save successfully against an enemy's spell/effect, place seals on that enemy up to your proficiency bonus).

class_features.name: Submit
class_features.description: When you cast a known illrigger spell, burn two seals on an interdicted creature (no action) to give it disadvantage on its save against the spell.

class_features.name: Vile Transmogrification
class_features.description: Two new bonus-action options: expend a spell slot to regain seals equal to its level, or expend seals to regain a spell slot of level equal to one-third the seals spent (e.g. 6 seals = a 2nd-level slot). Each option usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Moloch's Blessing
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Persuasion or Deception (your choice); if already proficient, double your proficiency bonus for checks with that skill instead. Forked Tongue grants an additional bonus language (3 total at 3rd level, 4 at 9th); speaking in a bonus language grants advantage on CHA checks to influence listeners who understand it.

class_features.name: Charm Enemy
class_features.description: When you bonus-action seal a Humanoid, force a CHA save or it's charmed (regards you as a friendly acquaintance) for 1 hour or until you/allies harm it; it learns it was charmed when the effect ends. You can also burn seals on other interdicted Humanoids within 30 feet at the same time, forcing the same save after they take the burn damage. Usable a number of times equal to CHA modifier (min 1), restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Invoke Hell: Hellspeaker
class_features.description: Grants two Invoke Hell options: Honey-Sweet Blades (gain advantage on a weapon attack against an interdicted creature, no action, and a hit becomes a critical hit) and Turncoat (action: force up to proficiency-bonus enemies within 60 feet who can hear you to make a CHA save or use their reaction to attack a target of your choice with a weapon, never themself).

class_features.name: Moloch's Interdiction
class_features.description: Learn bonus interdict boons that don't count against your known total: Red Cant (7th: expend a seal on a CHA check to treat a roll of 9 or lower as a 10), Slippery Ploy (13th: react to being targeted by an attack/spell/effect by sealing the creature, forcing a CHA save or it must retarget or lose the effect), and Incontrovertible (18th, passive: interdicted creatures have disadvantage on WIS and CHA saves).

class_features.name: Intransigent
class_features.description: You and creatures of your choice within 10 feet are immune to the charmed condition while you're conscious.

class_features.name: Let's Make a Deal
class_features.description: Offer a willing ally within 60 feet a deal: within 10 minutes they can gain advantage plus a proficiency-bonus bonus on one attack roll or save; success grants temp HP equal to your illrigger level, failure gives disadvantage on their next attack/save (uncancelable by advantage). One deal active per creature at a time. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus, restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Quid Pro Quo
class_features.description: Attempt to banish a creature within 30 feet; on a failed CHA save it's banished to Hell for 1 minute (repeatable save to end early), then returns nearby; a creature that succeeds is immune for 24 hours. When banished, a devil ally (devil jurist or horned devil) appears in its place and follows your commands until the banished creature returns. Usable once per success until a long rest.

class_features.name: Dispater's Blessing
class_features.description: Gain proficiency with heavy armor.

class_features.name: Devastator
class_features.description: Make a weapon attack and choose up to proficiency-bonus willing creatures within 30 feet who can see you; each can use a reaction to make a weapon attack or cast a damage cantrip with a 1-action casting time. Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Invoke Hell: Painkiller
class_features.description: Grants two Invoke Hell options: Grand Strategist (no action; up to proficiency-bonus allies within 60 feet who can hear you each move up to half speed without provoking opportunity attacks) and Punishment (reaction when damaged: attacker makes a WIS save or takes necrotic damage equal to the damage dealt, half on a success).

class_features.name: Dispater's Interdiction
class_features.description: Learn bonus interdict boons that don't count against your known total: Telekinetic Seal (7th: react to a creature moving within 5 feet by sealing it, forcing a WIS save or it's pushed 15 feet or knocked prone), By the Throat (13th: bonus-action sealing a creature no more than one size larger forces a WIS save or it's restrained until the end of its next turn), and Dispater's Supremacy (18th, passive: attacks against interdicted creatures crit on 18-20).

class_features.name: You Die on My Command!
class_features.description: When an ally within 30 feet who can hear you drops to 0 HP without being killed outright, use your reaction to make them drop to 1 HP instead. Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Deathstrike
class_features.description: When you hit an interdicted creature with a melee weapon attack, use your reaction to burn one of its seals to turn the hit into a critical hit and double that seal's damage dice. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus, restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Exsanguinate
class_features.description: Whenever you burn one or more seals on a non-construct, non-undead creature, an ally within 30 feet gains temp HP equal to the damage the seals dealt.

class_features.name: Sutekh's Blessing
class_features.description: Gain proficiency in Religion. As an action, sense creatures with blood within 120 feet (penetrating most barriers) without seeing them, learning distance/direction/type, lasting until the end of your next turn. Usable a number of times equal to proficiency bonus, restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Invoke Hell: Sanguine Knight
class_features.description: Grants two Invoke Hell options: Embolden Allies (bonus action: restore HP equal to 5 times your illrigger level, divided among yourself and creatures within 30 feet) and Vitalize (no action: for 1 minute, creatures of your choice within 30 feet gain a proficiency-bonus bonus to ability checks).

class_features.name: Sutekh's Interdiction
class_features.description: Learn bonus interdict boons that don't count against your known total: Foul Interchange (7th: action, expend a seal to end a condition on a creature within 30 feet and transfer it to another creature within 60 feet unless it succeeds a CON save), Sanguine Gift (13th: expend a seal when a creature within 30 feet heals, no action, to add bonus healing equal to your illrigger level), and Blood for Blood (18th, passive: when an ally takes damage from an interdicted creature, that creature takes necrotic damage equal to your proficiency bonus).

class_features.name: Bloodstroke
class_features.description: When an ally with temp HP from your Exsanguinate is hit by a melee attack, the attacker takes cold, fire, or necrotic damage (your choice) equal to your illrigger level.

class_features.name: Haemal Exchange
class_features.description: When an interdicted creature within 60 feet makes an attack roll or save, use your reaction to burn one of its seals; it rolls a d8 and subtracts the result from that roll. Then empower an ally within 30 feet: their next attack roll or save adds a rolled d8.

class_features.name: Marked for Death
class_features.description: Advantage on your first attack against an interdicted creature each of your turns.

class_features.name: Strike from the Dark
class_features.description: Once per turn, when you hit an interdicted creature with a melee weapon attack while you have advantage, deal extra damage equal to a number of d4s rolled equal to your proficiency bonus (+1d4 more if the target is in dim light or darkness).

class_features.name: Invoke Hell: Shadowmaster
class_features.description: Grants two Invoke Hell options: Master of Disguise (action: cast disguise self without a slot) and No Escape (bonus action: target a creature within 30 feet with a CHA save, made with disadvantage in dim light/darkness; on a failure their speed is halved and they can't move more than 30 feet from you until you're incapacitated, die, or the distance exceeds 30 feet).

class_features.name: Belial's Interdiction
class_features.description: Learn bonus interdict boons that don't count against your known total: Veil of Lies (7th: bonus action, expend a seal to become invisible for 10 minutes or until you attack/cast a spell), Hell's Assassin (13th, passive: reroll 1s and 2s on seal/weapon damage dice against interdicted creatures), and Dark Malediction (18th, passive: interdicted creatures radiate magical darkness in a 10-foot radius, visible to darkvision).

class_features.name: Umbral Killer
class_features.description: Gain 60 ft darkvision (or +60 ft if you already have it), +10 ft movement speed, advantage on DEX (Stealth) checks to hide, and DEX saves for half damage instead become no damage on a success (still half on a failure).

class_features.name: Doomed to the Shadows
class_features.description: Strike from the Dark's extra damage upgrades to a number of d8s (instead of d4s) equal to your proficiency bonus, with +2d8 in dim light/darkness (instead of +1d4). Additionally, when you deal that damage, you can react to burn a seal on the target to blind it for 1 minute instead of dealing that seal's damage.

class_features.name: Hunter's Bane
class_features.description: Advantage on WIS (Survival) checks to track fey, fiends, or undead, and on INT checks to recall information about them. Hemocraft save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + your Hemocraft modifier (INT, or WIS with DM permission).

class_features.name: Blood Maledict
class_features.description: Know one blood curse, learning more at 6th, 10th, 14th, and 18th level (swappable when learning a new one). Each use invokes one known curse; you can amplify it by taking necrotic damage equal to a hemocraft die roll (can't be reduced) for an extra effect. Creatures without blood are immune unless amplified. Usable once between rests, twice at 6th level, three times at 13th, four times at 17th.

class_features.name: Fighting Style
class_features.description: Choose one: Archery (+2 to ranged attack rolls), Dueling (+2 damage with a one-handed melee weapon wielded alone), Great Weapon Fighting (reroll 1s/2s on damage dice for two-handed/versatile melee weapons), or Two-Weapon Fighting (add ability modifier to the second attack's damage in two-weapon fighting).

class_features.name: Crimson Rite
class_features.description: As a bonus action, take necrotic damage equal to one hemocraft die roll (can't be reduced) to activate a known rite on a held weapon until your next short or long rest; attacks with it become magical and deal extra damage equal to your hemocraft die of the rite's type. Choose one rite at 2nd level (Flame=fire, Frozen=cold, Storm=lightning), learning another at 7th and 14th level (Dead=necrotic, Oracle=psychic, Roar=thunder, all requiring 14th level). Only one rite active per weapon; doesn't benefit other creatures.

class_features.name: Blood Hunter Order
class_features.description: Choose an order (Ghostslayer, Lycan, Mutant, or Profane Soul), granting features at 7th, 11th, 15th, and 18th level.

class_features.name: Ability Score Improvement
class_features.description: Increase one ability score by 2, or two ability scores by 1 each (max 20), or take a feat instead. Gained again at 8th, 12th, 16th, and 19th level.

class_features.name: Extra Attack
class_features.description: Attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action.

class_features.name: Brand of Castigation
class_features.description: When you damage a creature with a weapon that has an active crimson rite, brand it (no action). You always know its direction on the same plane, and whenever it damages you or a creature within 5 feet of you, it takes psychic damage equal to your Hemocraft modifier (min 1). The brand lasts until dismissed or replaced, can be dispelled (treated as a spell of level equal to half your blood hunter level, max 9th). Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Grim Psychometry
class_features.description: Advantage on INT (History) checks to recall the sinister or tragic history of an object/location you're touching/at.

class_features.name: Dark Augmentation
class_features.description: Speed increases by 5 feet, and gain a bonus equal to your Hemocraft modifier (min +1) on STR, DEX, and CON saves.

class_features.name: Brand of Tethering
class_features.description: Brand of Castigation's psychic damage doubles to twice your Hemocraft modifier (min 2). A branded creature can't Dash, and attempting to teleport or leave the plane deals it 4d6 psychic damage and forces a WIS save or the attempt fails.

class_features.name: Hardened Soul
class_features.description: Advantage on saving throws against being charmed and frightened.

class_features.name: Sanguine Mastery
class_features.description: Once per turn, reroll any hemocraft die roll required by a blood hunter feature and use either result. When you score a critical hit with a weapon under an active crimson rite, regain one expended use of Blood Maledict.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Anxious
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: target within 30 feet has CHA (Intimidation) checks made against it with advantage until the end of your next turn. Amplify: their next WIS save before the curse ends has disadvantage.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of Binding
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: a Large or smaller creature within 30 feet makes a STR save or its speed becomes 0 and it can't use reactions until the end of your next turn. Amplify: lasts 1 minute, works on any size, repeatable save each turn to end early.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of Bloated Agony
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: a creature within 30 feet has disadvantage on STR/DEX checks until the end of your next turn and takes 1d8 necrotic damage if it makes more than one attack on its turn. Amplify: lasts 1 minute, repeatable CON save each turn to end early.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of Exposure
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: when a creature within 30 feet takes damage from an attack/spell, use your reaction so it loses resistance to all damage types of that attack/spell until the end of its next turn (including the triggering hit). Amplify: instead removes immunity (downgrading to resistance) to those types until its next turn.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Eyeless
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: when a creature within 30 feet makes an attack, react to roll a hemocraft die and subtract it from the attack roll (decided after the roll, before hit/miss is known); doesn't affect creatures immune to blinded. Amplify: applies to all that creature's attacks until the end of its turn, rolled separately each time.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Fallen Puppet
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: when a creature within 30 feet drops to 0 HP, react to force it to make one weapon attack against a target you choose within its range. Amplify: it can first move up to half speed, and the attack gets a bonus equal to your Hemocraft modifier (min +1).

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Marked
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: mark a creature within 30 feet; until the end of your turn, hits against it with an active-crimson-rite weapon roll an extra hemocraft die for rite damage. Amplify: your next attack against it before the end of your turn has advantage.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Muddled Mind
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: a concentrating creature within 30 feet has disadvantage on its next concentration CON save before the end of your next turn. Amplify: disadvantage applies to all its concentration saves until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of Corrosion
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: poison a creature within 30 feet; it can repeat a CON save each turn to end it. Amplify: it also takes 4d6 necrotic damage immediately and again each time it fails that save.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Exorcist
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: end charmed, frightened, or possession on a target within 30 feet. Amplify: whatever charmed/frightened/possessed it takes 3d6 psychic damage and must succeed a WIS save or be stunned until the end of your next turn.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Howl
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: unleash a howl; each creature within 30 feet that hears it makes a WIS save or is frightened of you until the end of your next turn (stunned too if it fails by 5+); a success grants 24-hour immunity. You can exempt any creatures you choose. Amplify: range becomes 60 feet.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Soul Eater
class_features.description: Blood Maledict option: when a non-construct, non-undead creature within 30 feet drops to 0 HP, react to gain advantage on attacks and resistance to all damage until the end of your next turn. Amplify: also regain an expended warlock spell slot (amplify usable only once per long rest).
class_features.prerequisite: 18th level, Order of the Profane Soul

class_features.name: Rite of the Dawn
class_features.description: Learn the Rite of the Dawn crimson rite (extra damage is radiant). While active, your weapon sheds bright light 20 feet, you have resistance to necrotic damage, and hits against undead with that weapon roll an extra hemocraft die for rite damage.

class_features.name: Curse Specialist
class_features.description: Gain an additional use of Blood Maledict. Your blood curses can target any creature, blooded or not, without needing to amplify.

class_features.name: Aether Walk
class_features.description: At the start of your turn (if not incapacitated), step partway into the Ethereal Plane: you move through creatures/objects as difficult terrain and can see/affect Ethereal creatures/objects, lasting a number of rounds equal to your Hemocraft modifier (min 1). Ending your turn inside an object deals 1d10 force damage; if the effect ends while inside one, you're shunted out and take force damage equal to twice the distance moved. Usable once until a short or long rest (twice at 15th level).

class_features.name: Brand of Sundering
class_features.description: Hits with an active-crimson-rite weapon against any creature roll an extra hemocraft die for rite damage. A creature with Incorporeal Movement (or similar) can't pass through creatures/objects while branded by you.

class_features.name: Rite Revival
class_features.description: If you have one or more active crimson rites and are reduced to 0 HP but don't die outright, you can choose to end all active rites and drop to 1 HP instead.

class_features.name: Heightened Senses
class_features.description: Advantage on WIS (Perception) checks that rely on hearing or smell.

class_features.name: Hybrid Transformation
class_features.description: Transform into a hybrid form for up to 1 hour (speak/use equipment/wear armor normally; revert as a bonus action; auto-reverts if unconscious or dead). While transformed, gain: Feral Might (advantage on STR checks/saves, +1 melee damage, scaling to +2 at 11th, +3 at 18th), Resilient Hide (resistance to nonmagical/non-silvered bludgeoning/piercing/slashing, +1 AC unarmored), Predatory Strikes (crimson rite applies to unarmed strikes treated as one weapon, can use DEX instead of STR, deals 1d6 bludgeoning/slashing scaling to 1d8 at 11th, plus a bonus-action extra unarmed strike), and Bloodlust (below half HP, must succeed a DC 8 WIS save at the start of your turn or be forced to move toward and attack the nearest creature; auto-fails while concentrating or under a no-concentration effect). Usable once until a short or long rest.

class_features.name: Stalker's Prowess
class_features.description: Speed +10 ft, long jump +10 ft, high jump +3 ft. In hybrid form, gain Improved Predatory Strikes: +1 to unarmed strike attack rolls (scaling to +2 at 11th, +3 at 18th); with an active crimson rite while hybrid, your unarmed strikes count as magical for overcoming resistance/immunity.

class_features.name: Advanced Transformation
class_features.description: Hybrid Transformation can be used twice, restoring on a short or long rest. Hybrid form also gains Lycan Regeneration: at the start of your turn while between 1 HP and half max HP, regain 1 + CON modifier (min 1) HP (applied before the Bloodlust save if in hybrid form).

class_features.name: Brand of the Voracious
class_features.description: Advantage on your Bloodlust save while in hybrid form. While hybrid, you have advantage on attacks against a creature branded by your Brand of Castigation.

class_features.name: Hybrid Transformation Mastery
class_features.description: Use Hybrid Transformation unlimited times; your hybrid form now lasts until you choose to revert, fall unconscious, or die. You also gain the Blood Curse of the Howl for Blood Maledict (doesn't count against blood curses known).

class_features.name: Mutagencraft
class_features.description: Learn 4 mutagen formulas (more at higher levels per the Mutagencraft table, up to 8 at 18th), each a temporary alchemical buff-with-drawback that lasts until your next rest. Consume one as a bonus action; can flush all active mutagens early with an action. Concoct 1 mutagen per short/long rest (more at higher levels, up to 3 at 15th). Unused mutagens go inert if not consumed before your next rest.

class_features.name: Strange Metabolism
class_features.description: Immunity to poison damage and the poisoned condition. As a bonus action, ignore one mutagen's negative side effect for 1 minute. Usable once until a long rest.

class_features.name: Brand of Axiom
class_features.description: Branding a creature with Brand of Castigation ends any illusion/invisibility on it and prevents it from benefiting from either while branded. If branded while in an altered form (polymorph, Wild Shape, etc.), it must succeed a WIS save or revert and be stunned until the end of your next turn; any attempt to alter form while branded requires the same save or the attempt fails and it's stunned.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of Corrosion
class_features.description: Gain the Blood Curse of Corrosion for Blood Maledict (doesn't count against blood curses known).

class_features.name: Exalted Mutation
class_features.description: As a bonus action, end one active mutagen's effects/side effects and immediately apply a different known mutagen formula in its place. Usable a number of times equal to your Hemocraft modifier (min 1), restored on a long rest.

class_features.name: Mutagen: Alluring/Conversant/Deftness/Percipient
class_features.description: Basic mutagen formulas trading one mental/physical advantage for a disadvantage elsewhere: Alluring (advantage on CHA checks, disadvantage on initiative), Conversant (advantage on INT checks, disadvantage on WIS checks), Deftness (advantage on DEX checks, disadvantage on WIS checks), Percipient (advantage on WIS checks, disadvantage on CHA checks).

class_features.name: Mutagen: Embers/Gelid/Impermeable/Shielded/Unbreakable
class_features.description: Mutagen formulas trading resistance to one damage type for vulnerability to another: Embers (fire resist/cold vulnerable), Gelid (cold resist/fire vulnerable), Impermeable (piercing resist/slashing vulnerable), Shielded (slashing resist/bludgeoning vulnerable), Unbreakable (bludgeoning resist/piercing vulnerable).

class_features.name: Mutagen: Celerity/Potency/Sagacity
class_features.description: Mutagen formulas raising one ability score (and its max) by 3 (4 if consumed at 11th level, 5 at 18th) with a save disadvantage drawback: Celerity (+DEX, disadvantage on WIS saves), Potency (+STR, disadvantage on DEX saves), Sagacity (+INT, disadvantage on CHA saves).

class_features.name: Mutagen: Mobility/Nighteye/Rapidity
class_features.description: Mutagen formulas: Mobility (immune to grappled/restrained, disadvantage on STR checks; also immune to paralyzed at 11th level), Nighteye (60 ft darkvision, or +60 ft if already had it; disadvantage on sight-based attacks/Perception in direct sunlight affecting you, the target, or what you perceive), Rapidity (+10 ft speed, disadvantage on INT checks; +5 ft more at 15th level).

class_features.name: Mutagen: Reconstruction
class_features.description: For 1 hour, regain HP equal to your proficiency bonus at the start of each turn while between 1 HP and half max HP; speed is reduced by 10 feet during this time.

class_features.name: Mutagen: Aether/Cruelty/Precision
class_features.description: Advanced mutagen formulas: Aether (20 ft fly speed for 1 hour, disadvantage on STR/DEX checks during), Cruelty (extra bonus-action weapon attack on Attack action, disadvantage on INT/WIS/CHA saves), Precision (weapon attacks crit on 19-20, disadvantage on STR saves).

class_features.name: Mutagen: Vermillion
class_features.description: Gain an additional use of Blood Maledict while affected, but have disadvantage on death saving throws.

class_features.name: Otherworldly Patron
class_features.description: Choose an otherworldly patron (Archfey, Celestial, Fathomless, Fiend, Genie, Great Old One, Hexblade, Undead, or Undying), which modifies several of this subclass's later features.

class_features.name: Pact Magic
class_features.description: Gain warlock-style spellcasting using your Hemocraft ability (INT or WIS). Know 2 cantrips (3rd more at 10th level) and a growing number of warlock spells known per the Profane Soul Spellcasting table, sharing a small pool of same-level spell slots that regain on a short or long rest. Spell save DC = 8 + proficiency bonus + Hemocraft modifier; spell attack modifier = proficiency bonus + Hemocraft modifier. Swap one known spell when you level up.

class_features.name: Rite Focus
class_features.description: While you have an active crimson rite, your weapon serves as a spellcasting focus for warlock spells, and you gain a patron-specific benefit: Archfey (damaging a creature negates its cover/invisibility benefits until your next turn), Celestial (bonus action, spend a Blood Maledict use to heal a creature within 60 feet for a hemocraft die + Hemocraft modifier), Fathomless (water breathing; once per turn, reduce a damaged creature's speed by 10 ft), Fiend (reroll 1s/2s on Rite of the Flame's extra damage die), Genie (bonus action, spend a Blood Maledict use for a 30 ft flying speed for Hemocraft-modifier rounds, min 1), Great Old One (critical hits frighten the target and nearby creatures until your next turn), Hexblade (your next hit on a blood-cursed creature deals extra damage equal to your proficiency bonus), Undead (react to halve necrotic damage taken; your appearance shifts while a rite is active), Undying (reducing a hostile creature to 0 HP heals you a hemocraft die roll).

class_features.name: Mystic Frenzy
class_features.description: When you cast a cantrip with your action, make one weapon attack as a bonus action.

class_features.name: Revealed Arcana
class_features.description: Cast a fixed bonus spell tied to your patron (using a pact slot) once per long rest: Archfey=blur, Celestial=lesser restoration, Fathomless=gust of wind, Fiend=scorching ray, Genie=phantasmal force, Great Old One=detect thoughts, Hexblade=branding smite, Undead=blindness/deafness, Undying=silence.

class_features.name: Brand of the Sapping Scar
class_features.description: A creature branded by your Brand of Castigation has disadvantage on saving throws against your warlock spells.

class_features.name: Unsealed Arcana
class_features.description: Cast a second fixed bonus spell tied to your patron, without expending a slot, once per long rest: Archfey=slow, Celestial=revivify, Fathomless=lightning bolt, Fiend=fireball, Genie=protection from energy, Great Old One=haste, Hexblade=blink, Undead=speak with dead, Undying=bestow curse.

class_features.name: Blood Curse of the Souleater
class_features.description: Gain the Blood Curse of the Soul Eater for Blood Maledict (doesn't count against blood curses known).
